<script>
    function toggleDropdown(name) {
        const dropdown = document.getElementById(`dropdown-${name}`);
        if (dropdown.style.display === 'block') {
            dropdown.style.display = 'none';
        } else {
            dropdown.style.display = 'block';
            document.getElementById(`search-${name}`).focus();
        }
    }

    function filterOptions(name) {
        const filter = document.querySelector(`#dropdown-${name} .search-select-filter`).value.toLowerCase();
        const options = document.querySelectorAll(`#options-${name} .search-select-option`);

        options.forEach(option => {
            const text = option.textContent.toLowerCase();
            if (text.includes(filter)) {
                option.style.display = 'block';
            } else {
                option.style.display = 'none';
            }
        });
    }

    function selectOption(name, value, label) {
        // Atualiza o select real
        const realSelect = document.getElementById(`select-${name}`);
        realSelect.value = value;


        // Atualiza o input visível
        document.getElementById(`search-${name}`).value = label;

        // Fecha o dropdown
        document.getElementById(`dropdown-${name}`).style.display = 'none';

        // Dispara evento change para o select real
        const event = new Event('change');
        realSelect.dispatchEvent(event);
    }

    // Fechar dropdown quando clicar fora
    document.addEventListener('click', function(e) {
        const selects = document.querySelectorAll('.search-select-container');
        selects.forEach(container => {
            if (!container.contains(e.target)) {
                const name = container.querySelector('.search-select-dropdown').id.replace('dropdown-',
                    '');
                document.getElementById(`dropdown-${name}`).style.display = 'none';
            }
        });
    });
</script>

<script>
    document.addEventListener('DOMContentLoaded', function() {
        const checkboxes = document.querySelectorAll('.multi-select-checkbox');

        // Função para atualizar o texto dos itens selecionados
        function updateSelectedText(targetId) {
            const displayText = document.getElementById(targetId);
            let selectedLabels = [];

            document.querySelectorAll(`input[data-target="${targetId}"]:checked`).forEach(checkbox => {
                selectedLabels.push(checkbox.getAttribute('data-label'));
            });

            displayText.textContent = selectedLabels.length ? selectedLabels.join(', ') : 'Selecione';
        }

        // Evento para atualizar a seleção
        checkboxes.forEach(checkbox => {
            checkbox.addEventListener('change', function() {
                updateSelectedText(this.dataset.target);
            });
        });

        // Atualiza o texto inicialmente, caso já tenha opções marcadas
        updateSelectedText('selected-service-clubs');


        // Evento para abrir/fechar o dropdown
        const selectBox = document.querySelector('.custom-select .select-box-service-clubs');
        const dropdown = document.getElementById('service-clubs-dropdown');
        selectBox.addEventListener('click', function() {
            dropdown.classList.toggle('show');
        });



        // Fecha o dropdown ao clicar fora
        document.addEventListener('click', function(event) {
            if (!selectBox.contains(event.target) && !dropdown.contains(event.target)) {
                dropdown.classList.remove('show');
            }
        });

    });
</script>
                    </div>

<script>
    function toggleDropdown(name) {
        const dropdown = document.getElementById(`dropdown-${name}`);
        if (dropdown.style.display === 'block') {
            dropdown.style.display = 'none';
        } else {
            dropdown.style.display = 'block';
            document.getElementById(`search-${name}`).focus();
        }
    }

    function filterOptions(name) {
        const filter = document.querySelector(`#dropdown-${name} .search-select-filter`).value.toLowerCase();
        const options = document.querySelectorAll(`#options-${name} .search-select-option`);

        options.forEach(option => {
            const text = option.textContent.toLowerCase();
            if (text.includes(filter)) {
                option.style.display = 'block';
            } else {
                option.style.display = 'none';
            }
        });
    }

    function selectOption(name, value, label) {
        // Atualiza o select real
        const realSelect = document.getElementById(`select-${name}`);
        realSelect.value = value;


        // Atualiza o input visível
        document.getElementById(`search-${name}`).value = label;

        // Fecha o dropdown
        document.getElementById(`dropdown-${name}`).style.display = 'none';

        // Dispara evento change para o select real
        const event = new Event('change');
        realSelect.dispatchEvent(event);
    }

    // Fechar dropdown quando clicar fora
    document.addEventListener('click', function(e) {
        const selects = document.querySelectorAll('.search-select-container');
        selects.forEach(container => {
            if (!container.contains(e.target)) {
                const name = container.querySelector('.search-select-dropdown').id.replace('dropdown-',
                    '');
                document.getElementById(`dropdown-${name}`).style.display = 'none';
            }
        });
    });
</script>
        </div>
    </div>

    <div class="col-lg-4">
        <label for="primary-responsible-work-place" class="custom-label">Local de Trabalho</label>
        <input type="text" class="form-control" name="primary-responsible-work-place" id="primary-responsible-work-place" value="">
    </div>
</div>


<div class="row mt-4">
    <input type="hidden" class="form-control" name="secondary-responsible-associate_code" id="secondary-responsible-associate-code" value="">
    <input type="hidden" class="form-control" id="modified-secondary" name="modified-secondary" value="0">
    <input type="hidden" id="secondary-responsible-was-searched" value="0">
    <input type="hidden" id="secondary-cpf-valid" value="0">

    <div class="row pe-0">
        <div class="col">
                            <h5 class="my-auto form-subtitle">Segundo Responsável</h5>
                    </div>
        <div class="col pe-0 d-flex justify-content-end">
                            <button type="button" class="btn btn-sm btn-bw  my-auto me-3

<script>
    function toggleDropdown(name) {
        const dropdown = document.getElementById(`dropdown-${name}`);
        if (dropdown.style.display === 'block') {
            dropdown.style.display = 'none';
        } else {
            dropdown.style.display = 'block';
            document.getElementById(`search-${name}`).focus();
        }
    }

    function filterOptions(name) {
        const filter = document.querySelector(`#dropdown-${name} .search-select-filter`).value.toLowerCase();
        const options = document.querySelectorAll(`#options-${name} .search-select-option`);

        options.forEach(option => {
            const text = option.textContent.toLowerCase();
            if (text.includes(filter)) {
                option.style.display = 'block';
            } else {
                option.style.display = 'none';
            }
        });
    }

    function selectOption(name, value, label) {
        // Atualiza o select real
        const realSelect = document.getElementById(`select-${name}`);
        realSelect.value = value;


        // Atualiza o input visível
        document.getElementById(`search-${name}`).value = label;

        // Fecha o dropdown
        document.getElementById(`dropdown-${name}`).style.display = 'none';

        // Dispara evento change para o select real
        const event = new Event('change');
        realSelect.dispatchEvent(event);
    }

    // Fechar dropdown quando clicar fora
    document.addEventListener('click', function(e) {
        const selects = document.querySelectorAll('.search-select-container');
        selects.forEach(container => {
            if (!container.contains(e.target)) {
                const name = container.querySelector('.search-select-dropdown').id.replace('dropdown-',
                    '');
                document.getElementById(`dropdown-${name}`).style.display = 'none';
            }
        });
    });
</script>
        </div>
    </div>

    <div class="col-lg-4">
        <label for="secondary-responsible-work-place" class="custom-label">Local de Trabalho</label>
        <input type="text" class="form-control" name="secondary-responsible-work-place" id="secondary-responsible-work-place" value="">
    </div>
</div>

            Este dado é somente informativo, não podendo ser usado para comprovação de estrelas de atividade. A
            comprovação de estrelas de atividade deverá ser feita de acordo com a Regra 173, II, b do POR.
        </p>
    </div>
</div>

    <!-- Banner de Consentimento de Cookies -->
    <div id="cookieConsent">
        <span class="cookieConsentText">
            Utilizamos cookies para que você tenha a melhor experiência em nosso site.
        </span>
        <button id="acceptCookies" class="rounded ms-3">Confirmar</button>
    </div>

    
    
    <script src="https://cdn.jsdelivr.net/npm/fabric@latest/dist/index.min.js"></script>

    <script src="https://paxtu100.escoteiros.org.br/js/common.js"></script>
    <script src="https://cdn.jsdelivr.net/npm/bootstrap@5.3.2/dist/js/bootstrap.bundle.min.js" integrity="sha384-C6RzsynM9kWDrMNeT87bh95OGNyZPhcTNXj1NW7RuBCsyN/o0jlpcV8Qyq46cDfL" crossorigin="anonymous"></script>
    <script src="https://cdn.jsdelivr.net/npm/sweetalert2@11"></script>

    <script>
        document.addEventListener('DOMContentLoaded', async function() {
            const storageKey = 'paxtu-news-version-seen';

            try {
                const response = await fetch('https://paxtu100.escoteiros.org.br/atualizacoes/ultima', {
                    headers: {
                        'Accept': 'application/json'
                    }
                });

                if (!response.ok) {
                    return;
                }

                const latest = await response.json();

                if (!latest || !latest.version || typeof Swal === 'undefined') {
                    return;
                }

                if (window.localStorage.getItem(storageKey) === latest.version) {
                    return;
                }

                Swal.fire({
                    title: latest.title || 'Atualizações do sistema',
                    text: latest.summary || 'Temos atualizações publicadas para você.',
                    icon: 'info',
                    confirmButtonText: 'Ver Atualizações',
                    showCancelButton: true,
                    cancelButtonText: 'Agora não'
                }).then(function(result) {
                    window.localStorage.setItem(storageKey, latest.version);

                    if (result.isConfirmed && latest.url) {
                        window.location.href = latest.url;
                    }
                });
            } catch (error) {
                console.error('Erro ao carregar atualizações:', error);
            }
        });
    </script>


            <script>
            // Desativar o clique com o botão direito do mouse (somente em produção)
            document.addEventListener('contextmenu', function(e) {
                e.preventDefault();
            });

            // Desativar teclas que abrem ferramentas de dev (F12 e Ctrl+Shift+I)
            // Nota: usar addEventListener evita sobrescrever handlers existentes.
            document.addEventListener('keydown', function(e) {
                // F12
                if (e.key === 'F12' || e.keyCode === 123) {
                    e.preventDefault();
                    return false;
                }

                // Ctrl+Shift+I (atalho comum para abrir o inspector)
                if (e.ctrlKey && e.shiftKey && (e.key === 'I' || e.key === 'i' || e.keyCode === 73)) {
                    e.preventDefault();
                    return false;
                }
            });
        </script>
    

    
    <script src="https://www.drcode.com.br/nofollow/aviso-cookies/drcode.cookies.js"></script>
    <script>
        document.addEventListener('DOMContentLoaded', function() {
            // Verificar se o consentimento já foi dado
            if (!Cookies.get('cookieConsent')) {
                document.getElementById('cookieConsent').style.display = 'flex';
            }

            // Adicionar evento de clique ao botão de aceitar
            document.getElementById('acceptCookies').addEventListener('click', function() {
                Cookies.set('cookieConsent', 'accepted', {
                    expires: 365
                });
                document.getElementById('cookieConsent').style.display = 'none';
            });

        });
    </script>


    <script>
        document.addEventListener('DOMContentLoaded', function() {
            if (typeof window !== 'undefined' && 'Notification' in window) {
                try {
                    if (Notification.permission !== "granted") {
                        Notification.requestPermission().catch(function() {});
                    }
                } catch (e) {
                    console.warn('Notification API not available:', e);
                }
            }
        });

        function notifyUser(title, message) {
            if (typeof window !== 'undefined' && 'Notification' in window) {
                try {
                    if (Notification.permission === "granted") {
                        new Notification(title, {
                            body: message,
                        });
                        return;
                    }
                } catch (e) {
                    console.warn('Showing Notification failed:', e);
                }
            }

            // Fallback: if an in-app toast function exists, use it; otherwise log to console
            if (typeof showInAppToast === 'function') {
                showInAppToast(message);
            } else {
                console.log('notifyUser fallback:', title, message);
            }
        }
        $(document).ready(function() {

            var headerExists = $('.row').find('header').length > 0;
            if (headerExists) {
                $('main').css('height', '89dvh');
            } else {
                $('main').css('height', '99dvh');
            }
            if (navigator.userAgent.indexOf("Firefox") != -1) {
                document.body.classList.add('firefox');
            }
        });
        // window.addEventListener('load', function() {
        //     var link = document.querySelector("link[rel*='icon']") || document.createElement('link');
        //     link.type = 'image/x-icon';
        //     link.rel = 'shortcut icon';
        //     link.href = window.matchMedia && window.matchMedia('(prefers-color-scheme: dark)').matches ?
        //         '/lightFavIcon.ico' : '/darkFavIcon.ico';
        //     document.getElementsByTagName('head')[0].appendChild(link);
        // });


        function loading(status = true) {
            if (status) {
                $('#loading-spinner').removeClass('d-none').addClass('d-flex');
            } else {
                $('#loading-spinner').removeClass('d-flex').addClass('d-none');
            }
        }

        const tooltipTriggerList = document.querySelectorAll('[data-bs-toggle="tooltip"]')
        const tooltipList = [...tooltipTriggerList].map(tooltipTriggerEl => new bootstrap.Tooltip(tooltipTriggerEl))
    </script>
            <script>
            document.addEventListener('DOMContentLoaded', function() {
                try {
                    const timezone = Intl.DateTimeFormat().resolvedOptions().timeZone;

                    fetch('/set-timezone', {
                        method: 'POST',
                        headers: {
                            'Content-Type': 'application/json',
                            'X-CSRF-TOKEN': document.querySelector('meta[name="csrf-token"]').content
                        },
                        body: JSON.stringify({
                            timezone: timezone
                        })
                    });
                } catch (e) {
                    console.error('Erro ao detectar timezone:', e);
                }
            });
        </script>
    
    <script>
        $(document).ready(function() {
            // Botão Voltar para Região
            $('#backToRegionBtn').on('click', function() {
                //  form para voltar pra regiao
                var form = $('<form>', {
                    action: 'https://paxtu100.escoteiros.org.br/regi%C3%A3o/grupos/change-to-region',
                    method: 'POST'
                });

                form.append($('<input>', {
                    type: 'hidden',
                    name: '_token',
                    value: 'GgZY52Ro808WTPmqAgo5uU46eOYMFPdCByBx9Feg'
                }));
                $('body').append(form);
                form.submit();
            });
        });

        <script src="https://cdnjs.cloudflare.com/ajax/libs/cropperjs/1.5.12/cropper.min.js"></script>

    <script>
        document.addEventListener('DOMContentLoaded', function() {
            const fileInput = document.getElementById('foreign-document-file');
            const removeBtn = document.getElementById('remove-foreign-file');
            let currentFile = document.getElementById('current-foreign-file');
            const viewBtnId = 'view-foreign-file';

            // $('#rg-number').mask('000000000');
            // Função para criar o botão Visualizar dinamicamente
            function createViewButton() {
                const base64Input = document.getElementById('foreign-file-base64');
                const extInput = document.getElementById('foreign-file-extension');
                if (!base64Input || !extInput) return;

                let viewBtn = document.getElementById(viewBtnId);
                if (!viewBtn) {
                    viewBtn = document.createElement('button');
                    viewBtn.type = 'button';
                    viewBtn.className = 'btn btn-link p-0 ms-2';
                    viewBtn.id = viewBtnId;
                    viewBtn.textContent = 'Visualizar';
                    currentFile.appendChild(viewBtn);
                }

                viewBtn.addEventListener('click', function() {
                    const base64 = base64Input.value;
                    const ext = extInput.value.toLowerCase();

                    let mimeType = '';
                    if (['jpg', 'jpeg', 'png', 'heic'].includes(ext)) {
                        mimeType = `image/${ext === 'jpg' ? 'jpeg' : ext}`;
                    } else if (ext === 'pdf') {
                        mimeType = 'application/pdf';
                    } else {
                        mimeType = 'application/octet-stream';
                    }

                    const byteCharacters = atob(base64);
                    const byteNumbers = new Array(byteCharacters.length);
                    for (let i = 0; i < byteCharacters.length; i++) {
                        byteNumbers[i] = byteCharacters.charCodeAt(i);
                    }
                    const byteArray = new Uint8Array(byteNumbers);

                    const blob = new Blob([byteArray], {
                        type: mimeType
                    });
                    const blobUrl = URL.createObjectURL(blob);
                    window.open(blobUrl, '_blank');
                });
            }

            // Inicializa botão Visualizar se já existir arquivo
            if (currentFile) {
                createViewButton();
            }

            // Quando o usuário selecionar um arquivo novo
            if (fileInput) {
                fileInput.addEventListener('change', function() {
                    if (fileInput.files.length > 0) {
                        const fileName = fileInput.files[0].name;
                        fileInput.title = fileName;
                        removeBtn.classList.remove('d-none');

                        if (currentFile) {
                            currentFile.innerHTML = `Arquivo selecionado: <strong>${fileName}</strong>`;
                        } else {
                            currentFile = document.createElement('small');
                            currentFile.id = 'current-foreign-file';
                            currentFile.className = 'text-muted d-block mt-1';
                            currentFile.innerHTML = `Arquivo selecionado: <strong>${fileName}</strong>`;
                            fileInput.closest('.col-4').appendChild(currentFile);
                        }
                    } else {
                        removeBtn.classList.add('d-none');
                    }
                });
            }

            // Botão remover arquivo
            if (removeBtn) {
                removeBtn.addEventListener('click', function() {
                    fileInput.value = '';
                    fileInput.title = '';
                    removeBtn.classList.add('d-none');

                    if (currentFile) {
                        currentFile.innerHTML =
                            `<span class="text-muted fst-italic">Nenhum arquivo selecionado</span>`;
                    }
                });
            }
        });


        $(document).ready(function() {

            ////////// MASCARAS
            var SPMaskBehavior = function(val) {
                    return val.replace(/\D/g, '').length === 11 ? '(00) 00000-0000' : '(00) 0000-00009';
                },
                spOptions = {
                    onKeyPress: function(val, e, field, options) {
                        field.mask(SPMaskBehavior.apply({}, arguments), options);
                    }
                };

            $('#cpf-number').mask('000.000.000-00');
            $('#postal-code').mask('00000-000');
            $('#cellphone, #secondary-phone').mask(SPMaskBehavior, spOptions);

            ////////// ASSOCIADO ATIVO SWITCH
            $(document).on('change', '#active-associate, #active-associate-mobile', function(e) {
                if ($(this).prop('checked')) {
                    loading(true);
                    var data = {
                        activeStatus: 'ativo',
                        associateCode: $('#associate-code').val()
                    };
                    $.ajax({
                        type: "POST",
                        url: "https://paxtu100.escoteiros.org.br/associado/ativar",
                        headers: {
                            'X-CSRF-TOKEN': $('meta[name="csrf-token"]').attr('content')
                        },
                        data: data,
                        success: function(data) {
                            $('#footer-container').addClass('d-none');
                            loading(false);
                            $('#active-associate, #active-associate-mobile').prop('checked', true);
                            successFeedback();
                        },
                        error: function(data) {
                            $('#footer-container').addClass('d-none');
                            loading(false);
                            Swal.fire({
                                icon: 'error',
                                title: 'Erro',
                                text: data.responseJSON.error ||
                                    'Erro ao ativar associado.'
                            });
                            $('#active-associate, #active-associate-mobile').prop('checked', false);
                        }
                    });
                } else {
                    // ao sair do grupo, deve preencher formulário de saída para
                    // preencher as tabelas controle_saida e suas relações
                    Swal.fire({
                        title: 'Tem certeza?',
                        text: 'Tem certeza que deseja inativar esse associado?',
                        icon: 'warning',
                        showCancelButton: true,
                        confirmButtonColor: '#3085d6',
                        cancelButtonColor: '#d33',
                        confirmButtonText: 'Sim, inativar',
                        cancelButtonText: 'Cancelar'
                    }).then((result) => {
                        if (result.isConfirmed) {
                            loading(true);
                            var data = {
                                activeStatus: 'inativo',
                                associateCode: $('#associate-code').val()
                            };
                            $.ajax({
                                type: "POST",
                                url: "https://paxtu100.escoteiros.org.br/associado/ativar",
                                headers: {
                                    'X-CSRF-TOKEN': $('meta[name="csrf-token"]').attr(
                                        'content')
                                },
                                data: data,
                                success: function(data) {
                                    $('#footer-container').addClass('d-none');
                                    loading(false);
                                    $('#active-associate, #active-associate-mobile').prop('checked', false);
                                    successFeedback();
                                },
                                error: function(data) {
                                    $('#footer-container').addClass('d-none');
                                    loading(false);
                                    Swal.fire({
                                        icon: 'error',
                                        title: 'Erro',
                                        text: data.responseJSON.error ||
                                            'Erro ao inativar associado.'
                                    });
                                }
                            });
                        } else {
                            $('#active-associate, #active-associate-mobile').prop('checked', true);
                        }
                    });
                }
            });
            // SweetAlert2 CDN
            if (typeof Swal === 'undefined') {
                var script = document.createElement('script');
                script.src = 'https://cdn.jsdelivr.net/npm/sweetalert2@11';
                script.onload = function() {};
                document.head.appendChild(script);
            }

            ////////// PROVISÓRIO/DEFINITIVO SWITCH
            $('#definitive-button').on('click', function(e) {
                if (confirm(
                        'Transformar o registro provisório em definitivo é uma ação permanente. Após a mudança, o associado poderá ser incluído em lotes de registro definitivo. \n\nDeseja continuar?'
                    )) {
                    loading(true);

                    var data = {
                        newStatus: 'definitivo',
                        associateCode: $('#associate-code').val()
                    };

                    $.ajax({
                        type: "POST",
                        url: "https://paxtu100.escoteiros.org.br/associado/converter-registro",
                        headers: {
                            'X-CSRF-TOKEN': $('meta[name="csrf-token"]').attr('content')
                        },
                        data: data,
                        success: function(data) {
                            loading(false);
                            successFeedback();
                            $('.provisional-message-container').remove();
                            // console.log(data.message);
                        },
                        error: function(data) {
                            loading(false);
                            // console.log(data.error);
                        }
                    });
                };
            });

            ////////// RADIO DE ESTRANGEIRO MOSTRA/ESCONDE CONTAINER
            $('input[name="foreigner"]').on('change', function() {
                const selectedValue = $(this).val();

                if (selectedValue === 'S') {
                    $('#foreign-container, #div-rne').removeClass('d-none');
                    $('#birth-region-container, #birth-city-container').addClass('d-none');
                    $('#birth-country').val('').trigger('change');
                    $('#birth-country').prop('disabled', false).focus();
                }
                if (selectedValue === 'N') {
                    $('#foreign-container, #div-rne').addClass('d-none');
                    $('#birth-country').val('Brasil').trigger('change');
                    $('#birth-country').prop('disabled', true);
                    $('#birth-region-container, #birth-city-container').removeClass('d-none');
                }
            });

            ////////// BUSCAR CEP E PREENCHER INPUTS
            $(document).on('blur', '#postal-code', function(e) {
                let cep = $(this).cleanVal();

                if (cep.length === 8) {
                    loading(true);

                    $.ajax({
                        url: `https://viacep.com.br/ws/${cep}/json/`,
                        type: 'GET',
                        dataType: 'json',
                        success: function(data) {
                            loading(false);

                            if (!data.erro) {
                                $('#address').val(data.logradouro).trigger('input');
                                $('#address-district').val(data.bairro).trigger('input');
                                $('#region').val(data.uf).trigger('input');
                                $('#city').html(
                                    `<option value="${data.localidade}">${data.localidade}</option>`
                                ).trigger('input');
                            } else {
                                $('#postal-code').val('');
                                alert('CEP não encontrado.');
                            }
                        },
                        error: function() {
                            loading(false);
                            alert('Erro ao buscar o CEP.');
                        }
                    });
                }
            });

            ////////// AUTOLOAD DE CIDADES PELA UF (ENDEREÇO)
            var region = $('#region').val();
            var selectedCity = $('#city').val();
            if (region) {
                loadCities(region, selectedCity, '#city');
            }

            ////////// AUTOLOAD DE CIDADES PELA UF (NASCIMENTO)
            var birthRegion = $('#birth-region').val();
            var selectedBirthCity = $('input[name="birth-city-code"]').val() || $('#birth-city').val();
            if (birthRegion) {
                loadCities(birthRegion, selectedBirthCity, '#birth-city');
            }

            ////////// CARREGA CIDADES AO ALTERAR REGIÃO (ENDEREÇO)
            $('#region').on('change', function(e) {
                e.preventDefault();
                var region = $(this).val();
                loadCities(region, null, '#city');
            });

            ////////// CARREGA CIDADES AO ALTERAR REGIÃO (NASCIMENTO)
            $('#birth-region').on('change', function(e) {
                e.preventDefault();
                var region = $(this).val();
                // limpa código antigo da cidade de nascimento
                $('input[name="birth-city-code"]').val('');
                loadCities(region, null, '#birth-city');
            });

            // Quando cidade de nascimento é digitada manualmente, invalida o código antigo
            $('#birth-city').on('input', function() {
                $('input[name="birth-city-code"]').val('');
            });

            // Quando cidade de nascimento for selecionada via select, atualiza o código oculto
            $('#birth-city').on('change', function() {
                var val = $(this).val();
                $('input[name="birth-city-code"]').val(val);
            });

            // Se a UF de nascimento mudar, força nova resolução da cidade (compatibilidade)
            $('#birth-region').on('input', function() {
                $('input[name="birth-city-code"]').val('');
            });

            //////// MOSTRAR RODAPÉ QUANDO ALTERAR ALGUM INPUT
            // Salva os valores iniciais dos inputs
            $("input, select, textarea").each(function() {
                const $el = $(this);
                $el.data("original", $el.is(":checkbox, :radio") ? $el.prop("checked") : $el.val());
            });

            // Verifica se houve mudanças no form
            $("input, select, textarea").on("input change", function() {
                const hasChanges = $("input, select, textarea").is(function() {
                    const $el = $(this);
                    return $el.is(":checkbox, :radio") ?
                        $el.prop("checked") !== $el.data("original") :
                        $el.val() !== $el.data("original");
                });

                $('#footer-container').removeClass('d-none');
            });




            var newProfilePicture = false;
            $('#image').on('change', function() {
                $('#new-profile-pic').val('S');
            });

            // resetar erro
            $('#associate-mappa-name, #gender, #skin-color, #main-email, #cellphone, #secondary-phone, #birth-country, #postal-code, #address, #address-number, #address-district, #region, #city, #education, #foreign-document-type, #foreign-document-number, #foreign-document-file, #amateur-radio-class, #amateur-radio')
                .on('input', function() {
                    inputErrorReset(this);
                });

            $('#show-consent-terms').on('click', function(e) {
                e.preventDefault();

                if (1642378 === 0) {
                    return false;

                let data = {
                    registryNumber: 1642378

                loading(true);

                $.ajax({

                    headers: {

                    },
                    xhrFields: {
                        responseType: 'blob'
                    },
                    data: data,
                    success: function(data) {
                        var blob = new Blob([data], {
                            type: 'application/pdf'
                        });
                        var url = window.URL.createObjectURL(blob);
                        window.open(url, '_blank');

                        loading(false);

                    error: function(data) {
