                        // console.log(data.error);
                    }
                });
            });


            $('#download-consent-terms').on('click', function(e) {
                e.preventDefault();

                if (1642378 === 0) {
                    return false;
                }

                let data = {
                    registryNumber: 1642378
                }

                loading(true);

                $.ajax({
                    type: "POST",
                    url: "https://paxtu100.escoteiros.org.br/associado/baixar-termos",
                    headers: {
                        'X-CSRF-TOKEN': $('meta[name="csrf-token"]').attr('content')
                    },
                    xhrFields: {
                        responseType: 'blob'
                    },
                    data: data,
                    success: function(data) {
                        var blob = new Blob([data]);
                        var link = document.createElement('a');
                        link.href = window.URL.createObjectURL(blob);
                        link.download =
                            `termo-de-consentimento-1642378.pdf`;
                        link.click();

                        loading(false);
                    },
                    error: function(data) {
                        loading(false);
                        // console.log(data.error);
                    }
                });
            });
        });


        ////////// ENVIA OS DADOS DO FORMULÁRIO DO ASSOCIADO
        function sendAssociateDataAjax() {
            var formData = new FormData();

            formData.append('associateCode', $('#associate-code').val());

            const profilePictureElement = $('#records-profile-picture').is(':visible') ? $('#records-profile-picture') : $('#records-profile-picture-mobile');
            formData.append('profilePicture', profilePictureElement.attr('src'));
            formData.append('newProfilePicture', $('#new-profile-pic').val());

            formData.append('associateName', $('#associate-name').val());
            formData.append('cpfNumber', $('#cpf-number').val());
            formData.append('birthDate', $('#birthdate').val());
            const birthCityCode = $('input[name="birth-city-code"]').val() || $('#birth-city').val();
            const birthCityText = $('#birth-city option:selected').text() || $('#birth-city').val();

            formData.append('birthCountry', $('#birth-country').val());
            formData.append('birthRegion', $('#birth-region').val());
            formData.append('birthCityCode', birthCityCode);
            formData.append('birthCity', birthCityText);

            formData.append('shortName', $('#associate-short-name').val());
            formData.append('mappaName', $('#associate-mappa-name').val());
            formData.append('gender', $('#gender').val());
            formData.append('skinColor', $('#skin-color').val());
            formData.append('maritalStatus', $('#marital-status').val());
            formData.append('religion', $('#religion').val());

            formData.append('rgNumber', $('#rg-number').val());
            formData.append('rgDispatcher', $('#dispatcher').val());

            formData.append('isForeigner', $('input[name="foreigner"]:checked').val());

            formData.append('foreignDocumentType', $('#foreign-document-type').val());
            formData.append('foreignDocumentNumber', $('#foreign-document-number').val());

            // Adicionando o arquivo diretamente sem conversão para base64
            var foreignDocumentFile = $('#foreign-document-file')[0].files[0];
            if (foreignDocumentFile) {
                formData.append('foreignDocumentFile', foreignDocumentFile);
            }

            formData.append('foreignDocumentExtension', $('#foreign-document-file-extension').val());

            formData.append('mainEmail', $('#main-email').val());
            formData.append('cellphone', $('#cellphone').val());
            formData.append('secondaryPhone', $('#secondary-phone').val());

            formData.append('postalCode', $('#postal-code').val());
            formData.append('address', $('#address').val());
            formData.append('addressNumber', $('#address-number').val());
            formData.append('addressComplement', $('#address-complement').val());
            formData.append('addressDistrict', $('#address-district').val());
            formData.append('city', $('#city').val());

            formData.append('education', $('#education').val());
            formData.append('occupation', $('#select-occupation').val());
            formData.append('workPlace', $('#work-place').val());

            formData.append('clubLions', $('#checkbox-service-clubs-2').is(':checked'));
            formData.append('clubMasonic', $('#checkbox-service-clubs-3').is(':checked'));
            formData.append('clubRotary', $('#checkbox-service-clubs-1').is(':checked'));
            formData.append('clubOther', $('#checkbox-service-clubs-4').is(':checked'));

            // #checkbox-rotary, #checkbox-lions.....

            formData.append('amateurRadio', $('#amateur-radio').val());
            formData.append('amateurRadioClass', $('#amateur-radio-class').val());

            // console.log(formData);

            var mandatoryInputs = [
                $('#gender'),
                $('#skin-color'),
                $('#main-email'),
                $('#cellphone'),
                $('#postal-code'),
                $('#address'),
                $('#address-number'),
                $('#address-district'),
                $('#region'),
                $('#city'),
                $('#education'),
            ];

            let areValidInputs;

            areValidInputs = validateBasicInformationsInputs(mandatoryInputs);

            if (areValidInputs) {
                loading(true);

                $.ajax({
                    type: "POST",
                    url: "https://paxtu100.escoteiros.org.br/associado/informacoes-basicas/editar",
                    headers: {
                        'X-CSRF-TOKEN': $('meta[name="csrf-token"]').attr('content')
                    },
                    data: formData,
                    processData: false,
                    contentType: false,
                    success: function(data) {
                        loading(false);
                        successFeedback();
                    },
                    error: function(data) {
                        loading(false);
                        handleBirthCityValidationError(data);
                    }
                });

                $('#footer-container').addClass('d-none');
            }
        };

        ////////// HELPERS

        function handleBirthCityValidationError(data) {
            const backendMessage = data?.responseJSON?.error;

            if (backendMessage && backendMessage.toLowerCase().includes('cidade de nascimento')) {
                Swal.fire({
                    icon: 'warning',
                    title: 'Cidade de nascimento inválida',
                    text: 'A cidade de nascimento informada não pertence ao estado selecionado. Confira a UF e selecione novamente a cidade de nascimento.'
                });
                return;
            }

            Swal.fire({
                icon: 'error',
                title: 'Erro',
                text: backendMessage || 'Não foi possível salvar as informações básicas.'
            });
        }

        // Função para carregar cidades com base na UF (targetSelector default '#city')
        function loadCities(region, selectedCity = null, targetSelector = '#city') {
            var url = "https://paxtu100.escoteiros.org.br/associado/novo/cidade/:uf";
            url = url.replace(':uf', region);

            loading(true);

            $.ajax({
                url: url,
                type: "GET",
                success: function(data) {
                    var $target = $(targetSelector);
                    $target.empty();

                    $.each(data, function(index, value) {
                        var option = $('<option/>', {
                            value: value['cd_cidade'],
                            text: value['ds_cidade']
                        });

                        if (value['cd_cidade'] == selectedCity) {
                            option.prop('selected', true);
                        }

                        $target.append(option);
                    });

                    if (targetSelector === '#birth-city') {
                        $('input[name="birth-city-code"]').val($target.val() || '');
                    }

                    loading(false);
                },
                error: function() {
                    // console.log('Erro ao buscar cidades');
                    loading(false);
                }
            });
        }



        function translateBranch(branchCode) {
            branchCode = String(branchCode);

            switch (branchCode) {
                case '1':
                    advisorBranch = 'Escoteiro';
                    break;
                case '2':
                    advisorBranch = 'Lobinho';
                    break;
                case '3':
                    advisorBranch = 'Senior';
                    break;
                case '4':
                    advisorBranch = 'Pioneiro';
                    break;
                default:
                    advisorBranch = 'Não se aplica';
                    break;
            }

            return advisorBranch;
        };

        function translateCategory(categoryCode) {
            categoryCode = String(categoryCode);

            switch (categoryCode) {
                case '1':
                    advisorCategory = 'Beneficiário';
                    break;
                case '2':
                    advisorCategory = 'Benemérito/Honorífico';
                    break;
                case '3':
                    advisorCategory = 'Contribuinte';
                    break;
                case '4':
                    advisorCategory = 'Dirigente';
                    break;
                case '5':
                    advisorCategory = 'Escotista';
                    break;
                case '6':
                    advisorCategory = 'Benemérito';
                    break;
                case '7':
                    advisorCategory = 'Honorífico';
                    break;
                case '8':
                    advisorCategory = 'Pais/Responsáveis';
                    break;
                case '9':
                    advisorCategory = 'Clube da Flor de Lis';
                    break;
                case '10':
                    advisorCategory = 'Colaboradores';
                    break;
                case '11':
                    advisorCategory = 'Profissional Escoteiro';
                    break;
                default:
                    advisorCategory = 'Não se aplica';
                    break;
            }

            return advisorCategory;
        };

        function concatRegistrationNumberWithDigit(registration, digit) {
            if (!registration || !digit) {
                return '---';
            }
            return registration + '-' + digit;
        };

        function validateBasicInformationsInputs(inputs) {
            let validationError = [];

            inputs.forEach(element => {
                if (element.val() === '') {
                    inputErrorFeedback(element);
                    // console.log(element);
                    validationError.push(true);
                }
            });

            if (!isValidEmail($('#main-email').val())) {
                inputErrorFeedback($('#main-email'));
                validationError.push(true);
            }

            if ($('#cellphone').cleanVal().length < 10) {
                inputErrorFeedback($('#cellphone'));
                validationError.push(true);
            }

            if ($('#secondary-phone').cleanVal().length < 10 && $('#secondary-phone').cleanVal().length > 1) {
                inputErrorFeedback($('#secondary-phone'));
                validationError.push(true);
            }


            // validações para estrangeiro
            if ($('input[name="foreigner"]:checked').val() === 'S') {

                if ($('#foreign-document-type').val() === '') {
                    $('#collapse-foreign-info').collapse('show');
                    inputErrorFeedback($('#foreign-document-type'));
                    validationError.push(true);
                }


                if ($('#foreign-document-number').val() === '') {
                    $('#collapse-foreign-info').collapse('show');
                    inputErrorFeedback($('#foreign-document-number'));
                    validationError.push(true);

                }

                if (!($('#document-sent').val())) {
                    if ($('#foreign-document-file')[0].files.length === 0) {
                        $('#collapse-foreign-info').collapse('show');
                        inputErrorFeedback($('#foreign-document-file'));
                        validationError.push(true);
                    }
                }
            }

            // radio amador
            if ($('#amateur-radio').val() !== '' && $('#amateur-radio-class').val() === '') {
                inputErrorFeedback($('#amateur-radio-class'));
                validationError.push(true);
            }

            if ($('#amateur-radio').val() === '' && $('#amateur-radio-class').val() !== '') {
                inputErrorFeedback($('#amateur-radio'));
                validationError.push(true);
            }

            if (validationError.includes(true)) {
                $('.footer-error-message').removeClass('d-none');
                return false;
            }

            $('.footer-error-message').addClass('d-none');
            return true;
        }

        function isValidEmail(email) {
            const emailRegex = /^[^\s@]+@[^\s@]+\.[^\s@]+$/;
            return emailRegex.test(email);
        }


        ////////// IMAGE CROPPER PERFIL
        let cropper;
        const image = document.getElementById('preview');
        let cropData = null;


        function previewFile() {
            const file = document.getElementById('image').files[0];

            // 10mb
            if (file.size > 10485760) {
                alert('Tamanho da imagem excedido. (max 10mb)');
                $('#profile-image-modal').modal('hide');
                return false;
            }

            const reader = new FileReader();

            reader.addEventListener("load", function() {
                image.src = reader.result;

                if (cropper !== undefined) {
                    cropper.destroy();
                }

                cropper = new Cropper(image, {
                    aspectRatio: 1,
                    crop(event) {
                        cropData = event.detail;
                    },
                });
            }, false);

            if (file) {
                reader.readAsDataURL(file);
            }
        };

        // salvar a imagem editada
        $('#upload-button').on('click', function(event) {
            event.preventDefault();

            if (cropData === null) {
                return;
            }

            cropper.getCroppedCanvas().toBlob((blob) => {
                const reader = new FileReader();
                reader.onloadend = function() {
                    const base64data = reader.result;

                    $('#records-profile-picture, #records-profile-picture-mobile').attr('src', base64data);
                    $('#profile-image-modal').modal('hide');
                }
                reader.readAsDataURL(blob);
            });
        });

        // DELETAR ASSOCIADO
        $('#delete-associate-btn').on('click', function(e) {
            e.preventDefault();

            Swal.fire({
                title: 'Tem certeza?',
                text: 'Esta ação é permanente e não pode ser desfeita. O associado será excluído do sistema.',
                icon: 'warning',
                showCancelButton: true,
                confirmButtonColor: '#dc3545',
                cancelButtonColor: '#6c757d',
                confirmButtonText: 'Sim, excluir',
                cancelButtonText: 'Cancelar'
            }).then((result) => {
                if (result.isConfirmed) {
                    loading(true);

                    var data = {
                        cd_associado: $('#associate-code').val()
                    };

                    $.ajax({
                        type: "POST",
                        url: "https://paxtu100.escoteiros.org.br/associado/deletar",
                        headers: {
                            'X-CSRF-TOKEN': $('meta[name="csrf-token"]').attr('content')
                        },
                        data: data,
                        success: function(response) {
                            loading(false);
                            Swal.fire({
                                icon: 'success',
                                title: 'Sucesso',
                                text: 'Associado excluído com sucesso.',
                                confirmButtonText: 'OK'
                            }).then(() => {
                                window.location.href =
                                    "https://paxtu100.escoteiros.org.br/associado/lista";
                            });
                        },
                        error: function(data) {
                            loading(false);
                            Swal.fire({
                                icon: 'error',
                                title: 'Erro',
                                text: data.responseJSON?.message ||
                                    'Erro ao excluir associado.'
                            });
                        }
                    });
                }
            });
        });
    </script>
    <script>
        // globais para cpf valido
        let primaryCpfValid = false;
        let secondaryCpfValid = false;

        $(document).ready(function() {

            //verifica se o cpf é valido se já estiver carregado
            if ($('#primary-responsible-cpf-number').val() !== '') {
                primaryCpfValid = true;
            }
            if ($('#secondary-responsible-cpf-number').val() !== '') {
                secondaryCpfValid = true;
            }

            // máscaras
            var SPMaskBehavior = function(val) {
                    return val.replace(/\D/g, '').length === 11 ? '(00) 00000-0000' : '(00) 0000-00009';
                },
                spOptions = {
                    onKeyPress: function(val, e, field, options) {
                        field.mask(SPMaskBehavior.apply({}, arguments), options);
                    }
                };

            // telefone
            $('#primary-responsible-residential-phone, #primary-responsible-cellphone,\
                #secondary-responsible-residential-phone, #secondary-responsible-cellphone')
                .mask(
                    SPMaskBehavior, spOptions);

            // cpf
            $('#primary-responsible-cpf-number, #secondary-responsible-cpf-number')
                .mask(
                    '000.000.000-00');
            // cep
            $('#primary-responsible-postal-code, #secondary-responsible-postal-code').mask('00000-000');

            // busca responsável primário
            $('#primary-responsible-search-button').on('click', function() {
                let raw = $('#primary-responsible-search-document').val().trim();
                let associate = $('#associate-code').val();

                if (!raw) {
                    $('#primary-responsible-search-result').text('Informe um CPF ou RNE para buscar');
                    return;
                }

                loading(true);

                let digits = raw.replace(/\D/g, '');

                let isCpf = digits.length === 11 && (typeof verifyCPF === 'function' ? verifyCPF(digits) : /^\d{11}$/.test(digits));
                let requestData = isCpf ? {
                    associateCode: associate,
                    cpf: digits
                } : {
                    associateCode: associate,
                    rn_rne: raw
                };
                let searchUrl = isCpf ? "https://paxtu100.escoteiros.org.br/associado/responsavel/busca" : "https://paxtu100.escoteiros.org.br/associado/responsavel/busca-rne";

                $.ajax({
                    url: searchUrl,
                    headers: {
                        'X-CSRF-TOKEN': $('meta[name="csrf-token"]').attr('content')
                    },
                    data: requestData,
                    method: 'POST',
                    success: function(data) {
                        loading(false);

                        if (data.length > 0) {
                            $('#primary-responsible-search-result').text(data[0].nm_associado);
                            $('#primary-responsible-search-result-code').val(data[0]
                                .cd_associado);
                            $('#add-primary-responsible').prop('disabled', false);
                        } else {
                            $('#primary-responsible-search-result').text(
                                'Associado não encontrado');
                            $('#primary-responsible-search-result-code').val('');
                        }

                        $('#add-primary-responsible').on('click', function(e) {
                            e.preventDefault();
                            $('#primary-responsible-search-modal').modal('hide');

                            $('#primary-responsible-was-searched').val('1');
                            primaryCpfValid = true;


                            if ($('#primary-responsible-search-result-code') !== '') {
                                $("#primary-responsible-type, #primary-responsible-name, #primary-responsible-short-name,\
                                                                                                #primary-responsible-birthdate, #primary-responsible-gender,\
                                                                                                #primary-responsible-birthplace-region, #primary-responsible-birthplace,\
                                                                                                #primary-responsible-marital-status, #primary-responsible-cpf-number, #primary-responsible-rg-number,\
                                                                                                #primary-responsible-dispatcher, #primary-responsible-main-email, #primary-responsible-org-email,\
                                                                                                #primary-responsible-cellphone, #primary-responsible-residential-phone, #primary-responsible-postal-code,\
                                                                                                #primary-responsible-address, #primary-responsible-address-number, #primary-responsible-address-complement,\
                                                                                                #primary-responsible-address-district, #primary-responsible-region, #primary-responsible-city,\
                                                                                                #primary-responsible-education, #select-primary-responsible-occupation, #primary-responsible-work-place")
                                    .val('');


                                $('#primary-responsible-associate-code').val(data[0]
                                    .cd_associado).trigger('input');

                                $('#primary-responsible-type').val(data[0]
                                    .cd_tipo_responsavel).trigger('input');
                                $('#primary-responsible-name').val(data[0].nm_associado)
                                    .trigger('input').prop('disabled', true);
                                $('#primary-responsible-short-name').val(data[0]
                                    .nm_abreviado).trigger('input');
                                $('#primary-responsible-birthdate').val(data[0]
                                    .dt_nascimento).trigger('input').prop(
                                    'disabled', true);

                                $('#primary-responsible-gender').val(data[0].ds_sexo)
                                    .trigger('input');

                                if (data[0].fl_estrangeiro === 'S') {
                                    $('#primary-responsible-is-foreigner').prop(
                                        'checked', true);
                                    $('#primary-responsible-is-not-foreigner').prop(
                                        'checked', false);
                                } else {
                                    $('#primary-responsible-is-foreigner').prop(
                                        'checked', false);
                                    $('#primary-responsible-is-not-foreigner').prop(
                                        'checked', true);
                                }

                                $('#primary-responsible-birthplace-region').val(data[0]
                                    .birth_city?.cd_estado).trigger('change').prop(
                                    'disabled', true);

                                $('#primary-responsible-birthplace').append(
                                    $('<option>', {
                                        value: data[0].birth_city.cd_cidade,
                                        text: data[0].birth_city.ds_cidade
                                    })
                                );

                                citiesAutoload($('#primary-responsible-birthplace'), $(
                                        '#primary-responsible-birthplace-region')
                                    .val());
                                $('#primary-responsible-birthplace').val(data[0]
                                    .birth_city?.cd_cidade).trigger('input').prop(
                                    'disabled', true);

                                $('#primary-responsible-marital-status').val(data[0]
                                    .cd_estado_civil).trigger('input');
                                $('#primary-responsible-cpf-number').val(data[0].nr_cpf)
                                    .trigger('input').prop('disabled', true);
                                $('#primary-responsible-rg-number').val(data[0]
                                    .nr_identidade).trigger('input');
                                $('#primary-responsible-dispatcher').val(data[0]
                                    .ds_orgao_expedidor).trigger('input');

                                $('#primary-responsible-main-email').val(data[0]
                                    .ds_email).trigger('input');
                                $('#primary-responsible-org-email').val(data[0]
                                    .ds_id_escoteiro).trigger('input');

                                $('#primary-responsible-cellphone').val(data[0]
                                    .ds_fone_celular).trigger('input');
                                $('#primary-responsible-residential-phone').val(data[0]
                                    .ds_fone_residencial).trigger('input');

                                $('#primary-responsible-postal-code').val(data[0]
                                    .ds_cep).trigger('input');
                                $('#primary-responsible-address').val(data[0]
                                    .ds_endereco).trigger('input');
                                $('#primary-responsible-address-number').val(data[0]
                                    .nr_residencia).trigger('input');
                                $('#primary-responsible-address-complement').val(data[0]
                                    .ds_complemento).trigger('input');

                                $('#primary-responsible-address-district').val(data[0]
                                    .ds_bairro).trigger('input');
                                $('#primary-responsible-region').val(data[0].city
                                    ?.cd_estado).trigger('input');

                                $('#primary-responsible-city').append(
                                    $('<option>', {
                                        value: data[0].city.cd_cidade,
                                        text: data[0].city.ds_cidade
                                    })
                                );

                                $('#primary-responsible-city').val(data[0].city
                                    ?.cd_cidade).trigger('input');
                                citiesAutoload($('#primary-responsible-city'), $(
                                    '#primary-responsible-region').val());

                                $('#primary-responsible-education').val(data[0]
                                    .education?.cd_escolaridade).attr('selected',
                                    'selected').trigger('input');
                                setOccupation(data[0].occupation?.cd_profissao, data[0]
                                    .occupation?.ds_profissao);
                                $('#primary-responsible-work-place').val(data[0]
                                    .nm_local_trabalho).trigger('input');
                            }
                        });
                    },
                    error: function(data) {
                        loading(false);
                        $('#primary-responsible-search-result').text(data.responseJSON.message);
                    }
                })
            });

            function setOccupation(value, label) {

                const select = document.getElementById('select-primary-responsible-occupation');
                if (select) {
                    select.value = value;
                    // Dispara o evento change caso haja listeners
                    select.dispatchEvent(new Event('change'));
                }

                // Atualiza o input visível do componente customizado
                const input = document.getElementById('search-primary-responsible-occupation');
                if (input) {
                    input.value = label;
                }

                // Remove destaque anterior das opções
                const options = document.querySelectorAll(
                    '#options-primary-responsible-occupation .search-select-option');
                options.forEach(opt => opt.classList.remove('selected'));

                // Adiciona destaque na nova opção selecionada
                const selectedOption = document.querySelector(
                    `#options-primary-responsible-occupation .search-select-option[data-value="${value}"]`);
                if (selectedOption) {
                    selectedOption.classList.add('selected');
                }

                // Fecha o dropdown se estiver aberto
                const dropdown = document.getElementById('dropdown-primary-responsible-occupation');
                if (dropdown) {
                    dropdown.style.display = 'none';
                }
            }
            // busca responsável secundário
            $('#secondary-responsible-search-button').on('click', function() {
                let raw = $('#secondary-responsible-search-document').val().trim();
                let associate = $('#associate-code').val();

                if (!raw) {
                    $('#secondary-responsible-search-result').text('Informe um CPF ou RNE para buscar');
                    return;
                }

                let digits = raw.replace(/\D/g, '');

                loading(true);

                let isCpf = digits.length === 11 && (typeof verifyCPF === 'function' ? verifyCPF(digits) : /^\d{11}$/.test(digits));
                let requestData = isCpf ? {
                    associateCode: associate,
                    cpf: digits
                } : {
                    associateCode: associate,
                    rn_rne: raw
                };
                let searchUrl = isCpf ? "https://paxtu100.escoteiros.org.br/associado/responsavel/busca" : "https://paxtu100.escoteiros.org.br/associado/responsavel/busca-rne";

                $.ajax({
                    url: searchUrl,
                    headers: {
                        'X-CSRF-TOKEN': $('meta[name="csrf-token"]').attr('content')
                    },
                    data: requestData,
                    method: 'POST',
                    success: function(data) {
                        loading(false);

                        if (data.length > 0) {
                            $('#secondary-responsible-search-result').text(data[0]
                                .nm_associado);
                            $('#secondary-responsible-search-result-code').val(data[0]
                                .cd_associado);
                            $('#add-secondary-responsible').prop('disabled', false);
                        } else {
                            $('#secondary-responsible-search-result').text(
                                'Associado não encontrado');
                            $('#secondary-responsible-search-result-code').val('');
                        }

                        $('#add-secondary-responsible').on('click', function(e) {
                            e.preventDefault();
                            $('#secondary-responsible-search-modal').modal('hide');
                            $('#secondary-responsible-was-searched').val('1');
                            secondaryCpfValid = true;

                            if ($('#secondary-responsible-search-result-code') !== '') {

                                $("#secondary-responsible-type, #secondary-responsible-name, #secondary-responsible-short-name,\
                                                                            #secondary-responsible-birthdate, #secondary-responsible-gender,\
                                                                            #secondary-responsible-birthplace-region, #secondary-responsible-birthplace,\
                                                                            #secondary-responsible-marital-status, #secondary-responsible-cpf-number, #secondary-responsible-rg-number,\
                                                                            #secondary-responsible-dispatcher, #secondary-responsible-main-email, #secondary-responsible-org-email,\
                                                                            #secondary-responsible-cellphone, #secondary-responsible-residential-phone, #secondary-responsible-postal-code,\
                                                                            #secondary-responsible-address, #secondary-responsible-address-number, #secondary-responsible-address-complement,\
                                                                            #secondary-responsible-address-district, #secondary-responsible-region, #secondary-responsible-city,\
                                                                            #secondary-responsible-education, #select-secondary-responsible-occupation, #secondary-responsible-work-place,\
                                                                            #secondary-responsible-birth-country, #secondary-responsible-foreign-document-number")
                                    .val('');

                                $('#secondary-responsible-associate-code').val(data[0]
                                    .cd_associado).trigger('input');

                                $('#secondary-responsible-type').val(data[0]
                                    .cd_tipo_responsavel).trigger('input');
                                $('#secondary-responsible-name').val(data[0]
                                    .nm_associado).trigger('input').prop('disabled',
                                    true);

                                $('#secondary-responsible-short-name').val(data[0]
                                    .nm_abreviado).trigger('input');
                                $('#secondary-responsible-birthdate').val(data[0]
                                    .dt_nascimento).trigger('input').prop(
                                    'disabled', true);

                                $('#secondary-responsible-gender').val(data[0].ds_sexo)
                                    .trigger('input');

                                if (data[0].fl_estrangeiro === 'S') {
                                    $('#secondary-responsible-is-foreigner').prop(
                                        'checked', true).trigger('change');
                                    $('#secondary-responsible-is-not-foreigner').prop(
                                        'checked', false);
                                } else {
                                    $('#secondary-responsible-is-foreigner').prop(
                                        'checked', false);
                                    $('#secondary-responsible-is-not-foreigner').prop(
                                        'checked', true).trigger('change');
                                }

                                $('#secondary-responsible-birthplace-region').val(data[
                                        0].birth_city?.cd_estado).trigger('change')
                                    .prop('disabled', true);

                                $('#secondary-responsible-birthplace').append(
                                    $('<option>', {
                                        value: data[0].birth_city.cd_cidade,
                                        text: data[0].birth_city.ds_cidade
                                    })
                                );

                                citiesAutoload($('#secondary-responsible-birthplace'),
                                    $('#secondary-responsible-birthplace-region')
                                    .val());
                                $('#secondary-responsible-birthplace').val(data[0]
                                    .birth_city?.cd_cidade).trigger('input').prop(
                                    'disabled', true);

                                $('#secondary-responsible-marital-status').val(data[0]
                                    .cd_estado_civil).trigger('input');
                                $('#secondary-responsible-cpf-number').val(data[0]
                                    .nr_cpf).trigger('input').prop('disabled', true);
                                $('#secondary-responsible-foreign-document-number').val(data[0]
                                    .nr_rne).trigger('input');
                                $('#secondary-responsible-rg-number').val(data[0]
                                    .nr_identidade).trigger('input');
                                $('#secondary-responsible-dispatcher').val(data[0]
                                    .ds_orgao_expedidor).trigger('input');

                                $('#secondary-responsible-main-email').val(data[0]
                                    .ds_email).trigger('input');
                                $('#secondary-responsible-org-email').val(data[0]
                                    .ds_id_escoteiro).trigger('input');

                                $('#secondary-responsible-cellphone').val(data[0]
                                    .ds_fone_celular).trigger('input');
                                $('#secondary-responsible-residential-phone').val(data[
                                    0].ds_fone_residencial).trigger('input');

                                $('#secondary-responsible-postal-code').val(data[0]
                                    .ds_cep).trigger('input');
                                $('#secondary-responsible-address').val(data[0]
                                    .ds_endereco).trigger('input');
                                $('#secondary-responsible-address-number').val(data[0]
                                    .nr_residencia).trigger('input');
                                $('#secondary-responsible-address-complement').val(data[
                                    0].ds_complemento).trigger('input');

                                $('#secondary-responsible-address-district').val(data[0]
                                    .ds_bairro).trigger('input');
                                $('#secondary-responsible-region').val(data[0].city
                                    ?.cd_estado).trigger('input');

                                $('#secondary-responsible-city').append(
                                    $('<option>', {
                                        value: data[0].city.cd_cidade,
                                        text: data[0].city.ds_cidade
                                    })
                                );

                                $('#secondary-responsible-city').val(data[0].city
                                    ?.cd_cidade).trigger('input');
                                citiesAutoload($('#secondary-responsible-city'), $(
                                    '#secondary-responsible-region').val());

                                $('#secondary-responsible-education').val(data[0]
                                        .education?.cd_escolaridade)
                                    .attr('selected', 'selected').trigger('input');
                                $('#secondary-responsible-occupation').val(data[0]
                                    .occupation?.ds_profissao).trigger('input');
                                $('#select-secondary-responsible-occupation-code').val(
                                    data[0]
                                    .occupation?.cd_profissao).trigger('input');
                                $('#secondary-responsible-work-place').val(data[0]
                                    .nm_local_trabalho).trigger('input');

                            }
                        });
                    },
                    error: function(data) {
                        loading(false);
                        $('#secondary-responsible-search-result').text(data.responseJSON
                            .message);
                    }
                })
            });


            let primaryResponsibleInputs =
                "#primary-responsible-type, #primary-responsible-name, #primary-responsible-short-name,\
                                                                                                                                    #primary-responsible-birthdate, #primary-responsible-gender, input[type=radio][name='primary-responsible-foreigner'],\
                                                                                                                                    #primary-responsible-birth-country, #primary-responsible-birthplace-region, #primary-responsible-birthplace,\
                                                                                                                                    #primary-responsible-marital-status, #primary-responsible-cpf-number, #primary-responsible-foreign-document-number, #primary-responsible-rg-number,\
                                                                                                                                    #primary-responsible-dispatcher, #primary-responsible-main-email, #primary-responsible-org-email,\
                                                                                                                                    #primary-responsible-cellphone, #primary-responsible-residential-phone, #primary-responsible-postal-code,\
                                                                                                                                    #primary-responsible-address, #primary-responsible-address-number, #primary-responsible-address-complement,\
                                                                                                                                    #primary-responsible-address-district, #primary-responsible-region, #primary-responsible-city,\
                                                                                                                                    #primary-responsible-education, #select-primary-responsible-occupation, #primary-responsible-work-place";

            let secondaryResponsibleInputs =
                "#secondary-responsible-type, #secondary-responsible-name, #secondary-responsible-short-name,\
                                                        #secondary-responsible-birthdate, #secondary-responsible-gender, input[type=radio][name='secondary-responsible-foreigner'],\
                                                        #secondary-responsible-birth-country, #secondary-responsible-birthplace-region, #secondary-responsible-birthplace,\
                                                        #secondary-responsible-marital-status, #secondary-responsible-cpf-number, #secondary-responsible-foreign-document-number, #secondary-responsible-rg-number,\
                                                        #secondary-responsible-dispatcher, #secondary-responsible-main-email, #secondary-responsible-org-email,\
                                                        #secondary-responsible-cellphone, #secondary-responsible-residential-phone, #secondary-responsible-postal-code,\
                                                        #secondary-responsible-address, #secondary-responsible-address-number, #secondary-responsible-address-complement,\
                                                        #secondary-responsible-address-district, #secondary-responsible-region, #secondary-responsible-city,\
                                                        #secondary-responsible-education, #select-secondary-responsible-occupation, #secondary-responsible-work-place";


            // monitora mudanças nos formulários primário e secundário
            $(primaryResponsibleInputs).on("input change", function() {
                checkChanges(primaryResponsibleInputs, "#modified-primary");
            });

            $(secondaryResponsibleInputs).on("input change", function() {
                checkChanges(secondaryResponsibleInputs, "#modified-secondary");
            });

            // preenche endereço do responsável primário pelo cep
            $(document).on('blur', '#primary-responsible-postal-code', function(e) {
                let cep = $(this).cleanVal();

                if (cep.length === 8) {
                    loading(true);

                    $.ajax({
                        url: `https://viacep.com.br/ws/${cep}/json/`,
                        type: 'GET',
                        dataType: 'json',
                        success: function(data) {
                            loading(false);
                            if (!data.erro) {
                                $('#primary-responsible-address').val(data.logradouro);
                                $('#primary-responsible-address-number').val('').focus();
                                $('#primary-responsible-address-addon').val('');
                                $('#primary-responsible-region').val(data.uf);
                                $('#primary-responsible-city').html(
                                    `<option value="${data.localidade}">${data.localidade}</option>`
                                );
                                $('#primary-responsible-address-district').val(data.bairro);
                            } else {
                                alert('CEP não encontrado.');
                            }
                        },
                        error: function() {
                            loading(false);
                            alert('Erro ao buscar o CEP.');
                        }
                    });
                }
            });

            // preencher endereço do responsável secundário pelo cep
            $(document).on('blur', '#secondary-responsible-postal-code', function(e) {
                let cep = $(this).cleanVal();

                if (cep.length === 8) {
                    loading(true);

                    $.ajax({
                        url: `https://viacep.com.br/ws/${cep}/json/`,
                        type: 'GET',
                        dataType: 'json',
                        success: function(data) {
                            loading(false);
                            if (!data.erro) {
                                $('#secondary-responsible-address').val(data.logradouro);
                                $('#secondary-responsible-address-number').val('');
                                $('#secondary-responsible-address-addon').val('');
                                $('#secondary-responsible-region').val(data.uf);
                                $('#secondary-responsible-city').html(
                                    `<option value="${data.localidade}">${data.localidade}</option>`
                                );
                                $('#secondary-responsible-address-district').val(data.bairro);
                            } else {
                                alert('CEP não encontrado.');
                            }
                        },
                        error: function() {
                            loading(false);
                            alert('Erro ao buscar o CEP.');
                        }
                    });
                }
            });

            // carrega cidades ao alterar região
            $('#primary-responsible-region').on('change', function() {
                citiesAutoload($('#primary-responsible-city'), $('#primary-responsible-region').val());
            });

            $('#primary-responsible-birthplace-region').on('change', function() {
                citiesAutoload($('#primary-responsible-birthplace'), $(
                    '#primary-responsible-birthplace-region').val());
            });

            $('#secondary-responsible-region').on('change', function() {
                citiesAutoload($('#secondary-responsible-city'), $('#secondary-responsible-region').val());
            });

            $('#secondary-responsible-birthplace-region').on('change', function() {
                citiesAutoload($('#secondary-responsible-birthplace'), $(
                    '#secondary-responsible-birthplace-region').val());
            });

            // carrega cidades ao carregar pagina
            citiesAutoload($('#primary-responsible-city'), $('#primary-responsible-region').val());
            citiesAutoload($('#primary-responsible-birthplace'), $('#primary-responsible-birthplace-region').val());

            // só buscar se tiver algo preenchido no secundario
            if ($('#secondary-responsible-region').val() !== '') {
                citiesAutoload($('#secondary-responsible-city'), $('#secondary-responsible-region').val());
            }

            if ($('#secondary-responsible-birthplace-region').val() !== '') {
                citiesAutoload($('#secondary-responsible-birthplace'), $('#secondary-responsible-birthplace-region')
                    .val());
            }







            // radio button de estrangeiro responsável primário
            $('input[name="primary-responsible-foreigner"]').on('change', function() {
                const selectedValue = $(this).val();
                if (selectedValue === 'S') {
                    // $('#foreign-container, #div-rne').removeClass('d-none');
                    $('#primary-responsible-birth-region-container, #primary-responsible-birth-city-container')
                        .addClass('d-none');
                    $('#primary-responsible-birth-country').val('').trigger('change');
                    $('#primary-responsible-birth-country').prop('disabled', false).focus();
                    $('#primary-responsible-foreign-document-number-container')
                        .removeClass('d-none');
                    $('#primary-responsible-cpf-number').closest('div').find('label span.text-danger')
                        .remove();
                }
                if (selectedValue === 'N') {
                    $('#primary-responsible-cpf-number')
                        .closest('div')
                        .find('label')
                        .each(function() {
                            if (!$(this).find('span.text-danger').length) {
                                $(this).append(' <span class="text-danger">*</span>');
                            }
                        });
                    // $('#foreign-container, #div-rne').addClass('d-none');
                    $('#primary-responsible-birth-region-container, #primary-responsible-birth-city-container')
                        .removeClass('d-none');
                    $('#primary-responsible-birth-country').val('Brasil').trigger('change');
                    $('#primary-responsible-birth-country').prop('disabled', true);
                    $('#primary-responsible-foreign-document-number-container')
                        .addClass('d-none');

                }
            });

            // radio button de estrangeiro responsável secundário
            $('input[name="secondary-responsible-foreigner"]').on('change', function() {
                const selectedValue = $(this).val();

                if (selectedValue === 'S') {
                    $('#secondary-responsible-cpf-number').closest('div').find('label span.text-danger')
                        .remove();
                    // $('#foreign-container, #div-rne').removeClass('d-none');
                    $('#secondary-responsible-birth-region-container, #secondary-responsible-birth-city-container')
                        .addClass('d-none');
                    $('#secondary-responsible-birth-country').val('').trigger('change');
                    $('#secondary-responsible-birth-country').prop('disabled', false).focus();
                    $('#secondary-responsible-foreign-document-number-container')
                        .removeClass('d-none');
                }
                if (selectedValue === 'N') {
                    $('#secondary-responsible-cpf-number')
                        .closest('div')
                        .find('label')
                        .each(function() {
                            if (!$(this).find('span.text-danger').length) {
                                $(this).append(' <span class="text-danger">*</span>');
                            }
                        });
                    // $('#foreign-container, #div-rne').addClass('d-none');
                    $('#secondary-responsible-birth-region-container, #secondary-responsible-birth-city-container')
                        .removeClass('d-none');
                    $('#secondary-responsible-birth-country').val('Brasil').trigger('change');
                    $('#secondary-responsible-birth-country').prop('disabled', true);
                    $('#secondary-responsible-foreign-document-number-container')
                        .addClass('d-none');

                }
            });

            // habilitar tooltip em botão desabilitado
            $('[data-toggle="tooltip"]').tooltip();

            // remover responsável primário
            $('#remove-primary-responsible').on('click', function(e) {
                e.preventDefault();

                if (confirm(
                        "Você poderá recuperar os dados deste responsável fazendo a busca pelo CPF. \n\nDeseja remover mesmo assim?"
                    )) {

                    let url = "https://paxtu100.escoteiros.org.br/associado/responsavel/remover";

                    let associateCode = $('#associate-code').val();
                    let responsibleCode = $('#primary-responsible-associate-code').val();
                    let secondaryResponsibleCode = $('#secondary-responsible-associate-code').val();

                    loading(true);

                    $.ajax({
                        type: "POST",
                        url: url,
                        headers: {
                            'X-CSRF-TOKEN': $('meta[name="csrf-token"]').attr('content')
                        },
                        data: {
                            'associateCode': associateCode,
                            'responsibleCode': responsibleCode,
                            'secondaryResponsibleCode': secondaryResponsibleCode
                        },
                        success: function(data) {
                            // limpa os campos do form ao remover
                            $(`#primary-responsible-associate-code, #primary-responsible-type, #primary-responsible-name, #primary-responsible-short-name, \
                                #primary-responsible-gender, #primary-responsible-birthdate, \
                                #primary-responsible-birthplace, #primary-responsible-birth-country, \
                                #primary-responsible-birthplace-region, #primary-responsible-marital-status, #primary-responsible-rg-number, \
                                #primary-responsible-dispatcher, #primary-responsible-cpf-number, \
                                #primary-responsible-main-email, #primary-responsible-org-email, #primary-responsible-cellphone, \
                                #primary-responsible-residential-phone, #primary-responsible-postal-code, #primary-responsible-address, \
                                #primary-responsible-address-number, #primary-responsible-address-complement, \
                                #primary-responsible-address-district, #primary-responsible-region, #primary-responsible-city, \
                                #primary-responsible-education, #select-primary-responsible-occupation, #primary-responsible-work-place`)
                                .val('');

                            $("input[name='primary-responsible-foreigner']:checked").prop(
                                'checked', false);

                            loading(false);
                            successFeedback();
                            $('#responsible-footer-container').addClass('d-none');
                        },
                        error: function(data) {
                            loading(false);
                            alert(data.responseJSON.error);
                        },
                    });


                }
            });

            // remover responsável primário
            $('#remove-secondary-responsible').on('click', function(e) {
                e.preventDefault();

                if (confirm(
                        "Você poderá recuperar os dados deste responsável fazendo a busca pelo CPF. \n\nDeseja remover mesmo assim?"
                    )) {
                    let url = "https://paxtu100.escoteiros.org.br/associado/responsavel/remover";
                    let associateCode = $('#associate-code').val();
                    let responsibleCode = $('#secondary-responsible-associate-code').val();

                    loading(true);

                    $.ajax({
                        type: "POST",

                            'X-CSRF-TOKEN': $('meta[name="csrf-token"]').attr('content')
                        },
                        data: {
                            associateCode: associateCode,
                            responsibleCode: responsibleCode,
                        },
                        success: function(data) {
                            // limpa os campos do form ao remover
                            $('#secondary-responsible-associate-code, #secondary-responsible-type, #secondary-responsible-name, #secondary-responsible-short-name,\
                                                                                #secondary-responsible-gender, #secondary-responsible-birthdate, \
                                                                                #secondary-responsible-birthplace, #secondary-responsible-birth-country,\
                                                                                #secondary-responsible-birthplace-region, #secondary-responsible-marital-status, #secondary-responsible-rg-number,\
                                                                                #secondary-responsible-foreign-document-number,\
                                                                                #secondary-responsible-dispatcher, #secondary-responsible-cpf-number,\
                                                                                #secondary-responsible-main-email, #secondary-responsible-org-email, #secondary-responsible-cellphone,\
                                                                                #secondary-responsible-residential-phone, #secondary-responsible-postal-code, #secondary-responsible-address,\
                                                                                #secondary-responsible-address-number, #secondary-responsible-address-complement,\
                                                                                #secondary-responsible-address-district, #secondary-responsible-region, #secondary-responsible-city,\
                                                                                #secondary-responsible-education, #select-secondary-responsible-occupation, #secondary-responsible-work-place')
                                .val('');

                            $("input[name='secondary-responsible-foreigner']:checked").prop(
                                'checked', false);

                            loading(false);
                            successFeedback();
                            $('#responsible-footer-container').addClass('d-none');
                        },
                        error: function(data) {
                            loading(false);
                            alert(data.responseJSON.error);
                        }
                    });
                }
            });

            // resetar mensagens de erro
            $(primaryResponsibleInputs).on('input', function() {
                inputErrorReset($(this));
            });

            $(secondaryResponsibleInputs).on('input', function() {
                inputErrorReset($(this));
            });

            function addErrorMessage(selector, message) {
                $('.error-message-cpf').remove();
                $('<span class="error-message-cpf text-danger small-text">' + message + '</span>').insertAfter($(
                    selector));
            }
            // Validação do CPF primário
            $(document).on('input', '#primary-responsible-cpf-number', function() {
                const cpf = $(this).cleanVal(); // Remove formatação do CPF
                primaryCpfValid = false; // Resetar

                // Só valida se o CPF tiver 11 caracteres
                if (cpf.length === 11) {
                    // Se foi buscado, não valida
                    if ($('#primary-responsible-was-searched').val() == '1') {
                        primaryCpfValid = true;
                        return;
                    }

                    // Validação básica
                    if (!verifyCPF(cpf)) {
                        addErrorMessage('#primary-responsible-cpf-number', 'CPF inválido');
                        return;
                    }

                    // Verifica existência APENAS para CPFs manuais
                    loading(true);
                    cpfExists(cpf, function(exists) {
                        loading(false);
                        if (exists) {
                            addErrorMessage('#primary-responsible-cpf-number',
                                'CPF já existe. Use a busca.');
                        } else {
                            primaryCpfValid = true;
                        }
                    });
                } else {
                    // Remove mensagem de erro se o CPF ainda não tiver 11 caracteres
                    $('.error-message-cpf').remove();
                }
            });

            // Validação do CPF secundário
            $(document).on('input', '#secondary-responsible-cpf-number', function() {
                const cpf = $(this).cleanVal(); // Remove formatação do CPF
                secondaryCpfValid = false; // Resetar

                // Só valida se o CPF tiver 11 caracteres
                if (cpf.length === 11) {
                    // Se foi buscado, não valida
                    if ($('#secondary-responsible-was-searched').val() == '1') {
                        secondaryCpfValid = true;
                        return;
                    }

                    // Validação básica
                    if (!verifyCPF(cpf)) {
                        addErrorMessage('#secondary-responsible-cpf-number', 'CPF inválido');
                        return;
                    }

                    // Verifica existência APENAS para CPFs manuais
                    loading(true);
                    cpfExists(cpf, function(exists) {
                        loading(false);
                        if (exists) {
                            addErrorMessage('#secondary-responsible-cpf-number',
                                'CPF já existe. Use a busca.');
                        } else {
                            secondaryCpfValid = true;
                        }
                    });
                } else {
                    // Remove mensagem de erro se o CPF ainda não tiver 11 caracteres
                    $('.error-message-cpf').remove();
                }
            });
            $('#primary-responsible-convert-to-associate').on('click', function(e) {
                e.preventDefault();
                let associateCode = $('#primary-responsible-associate-code').val();

                $.ajax({
                    url: "https://paxtu100.escoteiros.org.br/associado/converter-responsavel-fl",
                    type: 'POST',
                    dataType: 'json',
                    headers: {
                        'X-CSRF-TOKEN': $('meta[name="csrf-token"]').attr('content')
                    },
                    data: {
                        associateCode
                    },
                    success: function(data) {

                        let form = $('<form>', {
                            action: "https://paxtu100.escoteiros.org.br/associado/perfil",
                            method: 'POST'
                        });

                        form.append($('<input>', {
                            type: 'hidden',
                            name: 'associate_code',
                            value: associateCode
                        }));

                        form.append($('<input>', {
                            type: 'hidden',
                            name: '_token',
                            value: 'GgZY52Ro808WTPmqAgo5uU46eOYMFPdCByBx9Feg'
                        }));

                        $('body').append(form);

                        form.submit();
                    }
                });

            });


            $('#secondary-responsible-convert-to-associate').on('click', function(e) {
                e.preventDefault();
                let associateCode = $('#secondary-responsible-associate-code').val();
                $.ajax({
                    url: "https://paxtu100.escoteiros.org.br/associado/converter-responsavel-fl",
                    type: 'POST',
                    dataType: 'json',
                    headers: {
                        'X-CSRF-TOKEN': $('meta[name="csrf-token"]').attr('content')

                        associateCode
                    },
