                        let form = $('<form>', {
                            action: "https://paxtu100.escoteiros.org.br/associado/perfil",
                            method: 'POST'
                        });

                        form.append($('<input>', {
                            type: 'hidden',
                            name: 'associate_code',
                            value: associateCode
                        }));

                        form.append($('<input>', {
                            type: 'hidden',
                            name: '_token',
                            value: 'GgZY52Ro808WTPmqAgo5uU46eOYMFPdCByBx9Feg'
                        }));

                        $('body').append(form);

                        form.submit();
                    }
                });

            });


            // mesmo endereço primário e secundário
            $(document).on('click', '#primary-same-address', function(e) {
                e.preventDefault();

                let kidAddressCep = $('#postal-code').val();
                let kidAddress = $('#address').val();
                let kidAddressNumber = $('#address-number').val();
                let kidAddressAddon = $('#address-complement').val();
                let kidAddressCity = $('#city').val();
                let kidAddressDistrictCode = $('#address-region').val();
                let kidAddressNeighborhood = $('#address-district').val();

                $('#primary-responsible-postal-code').val(kidAddressCep).trigger('blur');

                setTimeout(() => {
                        $('#primary-responsible-address-number').val(kidAddressNumber);
                        $('#primary-responsible-address-complement').val(kidAddressAddon);
                    },
                    300
                ); // Pequeno delay para garantir que o preenchimento do endereço pelo cep terminou antes

            });

            $(document).on('click', '#secondary-same-address', function(e) {
                e.preventDefault();

                let kidAddressCep = $('#postal-code').val();
                let kidAddress = $('#address').val();
                let kidAddressNumber = $('#address-number').val();
                let kidAddressAddon = $('#address-complement').val();
                let kidAddressCity = $('#city').val();
                let kidAddressDistrictCode = $('#address-region').val();
                let kidAddressNeighborhood = $('#address-district').val();

                $('#secondary-responsible-postal-code').val(kidAddressCep).trigger('blur');

                setTimeout(() => {
                        $('#secondary-responsible-address-number').val(kidAddressNumber);
                        $('#secondary-responsible-address-complement').val(kidAddressAddon);
                    },
                    300
                ); // Pequeno delay para garantir que o preenchimento do endereço pelo cep terminou antes

            });
        });


        function saveResponsibleData() {

            let url = "https://paxtu100.escoteiros.org.br/associado/responsavel/editar";
            var data = {
                associateCode: $('#associate-code').val()
            };

            let isValid = true;

            if ($('#modified-primary').val() !== '1' && $('#modified-secondary').val() !== '1') {
                return;
            }

            if ($('#modified-primary').val() === '1') {
                if ($('input[name="primary-responsible-foreigner"]:checked').val() === "N") {
                    var primaryResponsibleMandatoryInputs = [
                        $('#primary-responsible-type'),
                        $('#primary-responsible-name'),
                        //$('#primary-responsible-short-name'),
                        $('#primary-responsible-birthdate'),
                        $('#primary-responsible-gender'),
                        // $('input[name="primary-responsible-foreigner"]'),
                        //$('#primary-responsible-occupation'),
                        $('#primary-responsible-birthplace-region'),
                        $('#primary-responsible-birthplace'),
                        $('#primary-responsible-marital-status'),
                        $('#primary-responsible-cpf-number'),
                        $('#primary-responsible-main-email'),
                        $('#primary-responsible-cellphone'),
                        $('#primary-responsible-postal-code'),
                        $('#primary-responsible-address'),
                        $('#primary-responsible-address-number'),
                        $('#primary-responsible-address-district'),
                        $('#primary-responsible-region'),
                        $('#primary-responsible-city'),
                        $('#primary-responsible-education'),
                        //$('#select-primary-responsible-occupation')
                    ];
                } else {
                    var primaryResponsibleMandatoryInputs = [
                        $('#primary-responsible-type'),
                        $('#primary-responsible-name'),
                        $('#primary-responsible-birthdate'),
                        $('#primary-responsible-gender'),
                        $('#primary-responsible-marital-status'),
                        $('#primary-responsible-birth-country'),
                        $('#primary-responsible-main-email'),
                        $('#primary-responsible-cellphone'),
                        $('#primary-responsible-foreign-document-number'),
                        $('#primary-responsible-postal-code'),
                        $('#primary-responsible-address'),
                        $('#primary-responsible-address-number'),
                        $('#primary-responsible-address-district'),
                        $('#primary-responsible-region'),
                        $('#primary-responsible-city'),
                        $('#primary-responsible-education'),
                        $('#select-primary-responsible-occupation')
                    ];
                }


                let primaryNamesCount = $('#primary-responsible-name').val().trim().split(' ');

                if ($('#primary-responsible-name').val() === '' || primaryNamesCount.length === 1) {
                    inputErrorFeedback($('#primary-responsible-name'));
                    isValid = false;
                }


                if (!validateResponsibleInputs(primaryResponsibleMandatoryInputs)) {
                    isValid = false;
                }


                // mescla em data
                Object.assign(data, {
                    modifiedPrimary: $('#modified-primary').val(),
                    primaryResponsibleAssociateCode: $('#primary-responsible-associate-code').val(),

                    primaryResponsibleType: $('#primary-responsible-type').val(),
                    primaryResponsibleName: $('#primary-responsible-name').val(),
                    primaryResponsibleShortName: $('#primary-responsible-short-name').val(),
                    primaryResponsibleBirthDate: $('#primary-responsible-birthdate').val(),
                    primaryResponsibleGender: $('#primary-responsible-gender').val(),

                    primaryResponsibleIsForeigner: $("input[name='primary-responsible-foreigner']:checked").val(),
                    primaryResponsibleBirthplaceRegion: $('#primary-responsible-birthplace-region').val(),
                    primaryResponsibleBirthplace: $('#primary-responsible-birthplace').val(),

                    primaryResponsibleBirthcountry: $('#primary-responsible-birth-country').val(),

                    primaryResponsibleMaritalStatus: $('#primary-responsible-marital-status').val(),
                    primaryResponsibleCpfNumber: $('#primary-responsible-cpf-number').cleanVal(),
                    primaryResponsibleForeignDocumentNumber: $('#primary-responsible-foreign-document-number')
                        .val(),
                    primaryResponsibleRgNumber: $('#primary-responsible-rg-number').val(),
                    primaryResponsibleDispatcher: $('#primary-responsible-dispatcher').val(),

                    primaryResponsibleMainEmail: $('#primary-responsible-main-email').val(),
                    primaryResponsibleOrgEmail: $('#primary-responsible-org-email').val(),
                    primaryResponsibleCellphone: $('#primary-responsible-cellphone').cleanVal(),
                    primaryResponsibleResidentialPhone: $('#primary-responsible-residential-phone').cleanVal(),

                    primaryResponsiblePostalCode: $('#primary-responsible-postal-code').cleanVal(),
                    primaryResponsibleAddress: $('#primary-responsible-address').val(),
                    primaryResponsibleAddressNumber: $('#primary-responsible-address-number').val(),
                    primaryResponsibleAddressComplement: $('#primary-responsible-address-complement').val(),

                    primaryResponsibleAddressDistrict: $('#primary-responsible-address-district').val(),
                    primaryResponsibleCity: $('#primary-responsible-city').val(),
                    primaryResponsibleEducation: $('#primary-responsible-education').val(),
                    primaryResponsibleOccupationCode: $('#select-primary-responsible-occupation').val(),
                    primaryResponsibleWorkPlace: $('#primary-responsible-work-place').val()
                });

            }


            if ($('#modified-secondary').val() === '1') {
                let valor = $("input[type=radio][name='secondary-responsible-foreigner']:checked").val();
                if (valor != 'S') {
                    var secondaryResponsibleMandatoryInputs = [
                        $('#secondary-responsible-type'),
                        $('#secondary-responsible-name'),
                        //$('#secondary-responsible-short-name'),
                        $('#secondary-responsible-birthdate'),
                        $('#secondary-responsible-gender'),
                        // $('input[name="secondary-responsible-foreigner"]'),
                        $('#secondary-responsible-birthplace-region'),
                        $('#secondary-responsible-birthplace'),
                        $('#secondary-responsible-marital-status'),
                        $('#secondary-responsible-cpf-number'),
                        $('#secondary-responsible-main-email'),
                        $('#secondary-responsible-cellphone'),
                        $('#secondary-responsible-postal-code'),
                        $('#secondary-responsible-address'),
                        $('#secondary-responsible-address-number'),
                        $('#secondary-responsible-address-district'),
                        $('#secondary-responsible-region'),
                        $('#secondary-responsible-city'),
                        $('#secondary-responsible-education')
                        //$('#select-secondary-responsible-occupation')
                    ];
                } else {
                    var secondaryResponsibleMandatoryInputs = [
                        $('#secondary-responsible-type'),
                        $('#secondary-responsible-name'),
                        //$('#secondary-responsible-short-name'),
                        $('#secondary-responsible-birthdate'),
                        $('#secondary-responsible-gender'),
                        // $('input[name="secondary-responsible-foreigner"]'),
                        $('#secondary-responsible-marital-status'),
                        $('#secondary-responsible-birth-country'),
                        $('#secondary-responsible-main-email'),
                        $('#secondary-responsible-cellphone'),
                        $('#secondary-responsible-foreign-document-number'),
                        $('#secondary-responsible-postal-code'),
                        $('#secondary-responsible-address'),
                        $('#secondary-responsible-address-number'),
                        $('#secondary-responsible-address-district'),
                        $('#secondary-responsible-region'),
                        $('#secondary-responsible-city'),
                        $('#secondary-responsible-education'),
                        $('#select-secondary-responsible-occupation')
                    ];
                }




                let secondaryNamesCount = $('#secondary-responsible-name').val().trim().split(' ');

                if ($('#secondary-responsible-name').val() === '' || secondaryNamesCount.length === 1) {
                    inputErrorFeedback($('#secondary-responsible-name'));
                    isValid = false;
                }

                if (!validateResponsibleInputs(secondaryResponsibleMandatoryInputs)) {
                    isValid = false;
                }


                // mescla em data
                Object.assign(data, {
                    modifiedSecondary: $('#modified-secondary').val(),
                    secondaryResponsibleAssociateCode: $('#secondary-responsible-associate-code').val(),

                    secondaryResponsibleType: $('#secondary-responsible-type').val(),
                    secondaryResponsibleName: $('#secondary-responsible-name').val(),
                    secondaryResponsibleShortName: $('#secondary-responsible-short-name').val(),
                    secondaryResponsibleBirthDate: $('#secondary-responsible-birthdate').val(),
                    secondaryResponsibleGender: $('#secondary-responsible-gender').val(),

                    secondaryResponsibleIsForeigner: $("input[name='secondary-responsible-foreigner']:checked")
                        .val(),
                    secondaryResponsibleBirthplaceRegion: $('#secondary-responsible-birthplace-region').val(),
                    secondaryResponsibleBirthplace: $('#secondary-responsible-birthplace').val(),
                    secondaryResponsibleBirthcountry: $('#secondary-responsible-birth-country').val(),

                    secondaryResponsibleMaritalStatus: $('#secondary-responsible-marital-status').val(),
                    secondaryResponsibleCpfNumber: $('#secondary-responsible-cpf-number').cleanVal(),
                    secondaryResponsibleForeignDocumentNumber: $('#secondary-responsible-foreign-document-number')
                        .val(),
                    secondaryResponsibleRgNumber: $('#secondary-responsible-rg-number').val(),
                    secondaryResponsibleDispatcher: $('#secondary-responsible-dispatcher').val(),

                    secondaryResponsibleMainEmail: $('#secondary-responsible-main-email').val(),
                    secondaryResponsibleOrgEmail: $('#secondary-responsible-org-email').val(),
                    secondaryResponsibleCellphone: $('#secondary-responsible-cellphone').cleanVal(),
                    secondaryResponsibleResidentialPhone: $('#secondary-responsible-residential-phone').cleanVal(),

                    secondaryResponsiblePostalCode: $('#secondary-responsible-postal-code').cleanVal(),
                    secondaryResponsibleAddress: $('#secondary-responsible-address').val(),
                    secondaryResponsibleAddressNumber: $('#secondary-responsible-address-number').val(),
                    secondaryResponsibleAddressComplement: $('#secondary-responsible-address-complement').val(),

                    secondaryResponsibleAddressDistrict: $('#secondary-responsible-address-district').val(),
                    secondaryResponsibleCity: $('#secondary-responsible-city').val(),

                    secondaryResponsibleEducation: $('#secondary-responsible-education').val(),
                    secondaryResponsibleOccupationCode: $('#select-secondary-responsible-occupation').val(),
                    secondaryResponsibleWorkPlace: $('#secondary-responsible-work-place').val()
                });
            }

            if (isValid) {
                loading(true);

                $.ajax({
                    type: "POST",
                    url: url,
                    headers: {
                        'X-CSRF-TOKEN': $('meta[name="csrf-token"]').attr('content')
                    },
                    data: data,
                    success: function(data) {
                        loading(false);
                        successFeedback();
                        $('#responsible-footer-container').addClass('d-none');

                    },
                    error: function(data) {
                        loading(false);
                        alert(data.responseJSON.error);
                    },
                });
            }

        }

        // busca as cidades dinamicamente
        // agora aceita: citiesAutoload(selectedCity, selectRegion, desiredCityValue, callback)
        function citiesAutoload(selectedCity, selectRegion, desiredCityValue, callback) {
            var url = "https://paxtu100.escoteiros.org.br/associado/novo/cidade/:uf";
            url = url.replace(':uf', selectRegion);

            loading(true);

            $.ajax({
                url: url,
                type: "GET",
                success: function(data) {
                    var selectedCityValue = (typeof desiredCityValue !== 'undefined' && desiredCityValue !== null) ? desiredCityValue.toString() : selectedCity.val();

                    selectedCity.empty();
                    selectedCity.append('<option value="">Selecione a cidade</option>');

                    var found = false;
                    $.each(data, function(index, value) {
                        var option = $('<option/>', {
                            value: value['cd_cidade'],
                            text: value['ds_cidade']
                        });

                        if (value['cd_cidade'].toString() === selectedCityValue) {
                            option.prop('selected', true);
                            found = true;
                        }

                        selectedCity.append(option);
                    });

                    // se foi passada uma cidade desejada e não foi encontrada na lista, adiciona-a como fallback
                    if ((typeof desiredCityValue !== 'undefined' && desiredCityValue !== null) && !found) {
                        selectedCity.append($('<option/>', {
                            value: desiredCityValue,
                            text: desiredCityValue
                        }).prop('selected', true));
                    }

                    // garantir que o value esteja aplicado e disparar evento
                    if ((typeof desiredCityValue !== 'undefined' && desiredCityValue !== null)) {
                        selectedCity.val(selectedCityValue).trigger('input');
                    }

                    loading(false);

                    if (typeof callback === 'function') {
                        callback();
                    }
                },
                error: function(data) {
                    // console.log('Erro ao buscar cidades');
                    loading(false);
                    if (typeof callback === 'function') {
                        callback();
                    }
                }
            });
        }

        // verifica se/qual formulário foi alterado
        function checkChanges(selector, hiddenInput) {
            let hasChanges = false;

            $(selector).each(function() {
                if ($(this).is(":radio") && $(this).prop("checked") !== $(this).data("original")) {
                    hasChanges = true;
                    return false;
                } else if ($(this).val() !== $(this).data("original")) {
                    hasChanges = true;
                    return false;
                }
            });

            // Atualiza o input hidden baseado nas mudanças
            $(hiddenInput).val(hasChanges ? "1" : "0");

            // Mostra/esconde o rodapé com o botão de salvar
            if ($("#modified-primary").val() === "1" || $("#modified-secondary").val() === "1") {
                $('#responsible-footer-container').removeClass('d-none');
            } else {
                $('#responsible-footer-container').addClass('d-none');
            }
        }

        // busca profissões
        function searchOccupations(query, searchResultsDiv) {
            $.ajax({
                url: "https://paxtu100.escoteiros.org.br/associado/informacoes-basicas/profissao",
                method: 'POST',
                headers: {
                    'X-CSRF-TOKEN': $('meta[name="csrf-token"]').attr('content')
                },
                data: {
                    'query': query,
                },
                success: function(data) {

                    let html = '';
                    for (let i = 0; i < data.length; i++) {
                        html += '<a class="dropdown-item" href="#" data-id="' +
                            data[i].cd_profissao + '">' +
                            data[i].ds_profissao + '</a>';
                    }
                    // console.log(html);

                    searchResultsDiv.html(html);
                }
            });
        };



        function validateResponsibleInputs(inputs) {
            let isValid = true;
            // Validação normal dos campos obrigatórios
            inputs.forEach(input => {
                if ($(input).val() === '') {
                    inputErrorFeedback(input);
                    isValid = false;
                }
            });

            // Validação CPF primário - SÓ SE ESTIVER SENDO MODIFICADO
            if ($('#modified-primary').val() === '1' && $('#primary-responsible-was-searched').val() != '1' && !
                primaryCpfValid && $('input[name="primary-responsible-foreigner"]:checked').val() === "N") {
                inputErrorFeedback('#primary-responsible-cpf-number');
                isValid = false;
            }

            // Validação CPF secundário - SÓ SE ESTIVER SENDO MODIFICADO
            if ($('#modified-secondary').val() === '1' &&
                $('#secondary-responsible-was-searched').val() != '1' &&
                !secondaryCpfValid &&
                $('input[name="secondary-responsible-foreigner"]:checked').val() === "N") {
                inputErrorFeedback('#secondary-responsible-cpf-number');
                isValid = false;
            }


            return isValid;
        }

        // valida cpf
        function verifyCPF(cpf) {
            if (cpf.length !== 11) {
                return false;
            }

            // verificando se são números repetidos 000.000.000.00
            const regex = /^(\d)\1*$/;
            if (regex.test(cpf)) {
                return false;
            }

            for (let t = 9; t < 11; t++) {
                let sum = 0;
                for (let c = 0; c < t; c++) {
                    sum += parseInt(cpf[c]) * ((t + 1) - c);
                }

                let remainder = ((10 * sum) % 11) % 10;

                if (parseInt(cpf[t]) !== remainder) {
                    return false;
                }
            }

            return true;
        }

        // verifica se cpf ja existe no BD
        function cpfExists(cpf, callback) {
            loading(true);

            $.ajax({
                url: "https://paxtu100.escoteiros.org.br/associado/novo/busca-cpf-pais",
                headers: {
                    'X-CSRF-TOKEN': $('meta[name="csrf-token"]').attr('content')
                },
                type: "POST",
                data: {
                    cpf: cpf,
                    associateCode: $('#associate-code').val()
                },
                success: function(data) {
                    loading(false);
                    callback(data.cpfExists);
                },
                error: function(error) {
                    loading(false);
                    callback(false);
                }
            });
        }

        function inputErrorFeedback(inputField) {
            // borda vermelha
            $(inputField).css({
                'border': '#dc3545 solid 1px'
            });

            //sombra vermelha
            $(inputField).on('focus', function() {
                $(this).css({
                    'box-shadow': '0 0 0 .25rem rgba(220, 53, 69, 0.25)',
                    'border': '1px solid #dc3545'
                });
            });

            // remove a sombra clicando fora
            $(inputField).on('blur', function() {
                $(this).css({
                    'box-shadow': 'none',
                    'border': '1px solid #dc3545'
                });
            });
        }

        function inputErrorReset(inputField) {
            $(inputField).css({
                'border': '1px solid #dee2e6', // Define a borda para o estilo cinza padrão
                'box-shadow': 'none' // Remove qualquer sombra de caixa
            });

            // Define borda azul ao focar no campo
            $(inputField).on('focus', function() {
                $(this).css({
                    'border': '1px solid #66afe9',
                    /* borda azul */
                    'box-shadow': '0 0 0 0.3rem rgba(194, 219, 254, 0.8)'
                });
            });

            // Define borda cinza ao desfocar o campo
            $(inputField).on('blur', function() {
                $(this).css({
                    'border': '1px solid #dee2e6', // Borda cinza
                    'box-shadow': 'none' // Remove sombra de caixa
                });
            });
        }
    </script>
        <script>
            document.addEventListener('DOMContentLoaded', function() {
                // Quando um radio com value="yes" for marcado, foca o primeiro input/textarea/select disponível dentro da mesma coluna
                document.querySelectorAll('input[type="radio"][value="yes"]').forEach(function(radio) {
                    radio.addEventListener('change', function() {
                        var self = this;
                        // adia o foco para permitir que outros handlers (jQuery) habilitem os campos primeiro
                        setTimeout(function() {
                            if (!self.checked) return;
                            var container = self.closest('.col-lg-4, .col-lg-3, .col-lg-6, .col, .row') || self.parentElement;
                            var focusable = container && container.querySelector('input:not([type=radio]):not([type=checkbox]):not([disabled]), textarea:not([disabled]), select:not([disabled])');
                            if (focusable) {
                                focusable.focus();
                                return;
                            }

                            // fallback: procura próximo elemento focusable no DOM (preferindo elementos não-radio)
                            var next = self.parentElement && self.parentElement.nextElementSibling ? self.parentElement.nextElementSibling : self.nextElementSibling;
                            if (next) {
                                var f = next.querySelector && next.querySelector('input:not([type=radio]):not([disabled]), textarea:not([disabled]), select:not([disabled])');
                                if (f) f.focus();
                            }
                        }, 0);
                    });
                });

                // Quando um checkbox for marcado, foca o input relacionado (id-description ou heurísticas)
                document.querySelectorAll('input[type="checkbox"]').forEach(function(cb) {
                    cb.addEventListener('change', function() {
                        var self = this;
                        // adia para permitir que handlers jQuery habilitem inputs relacionados primeiro
                        setTimeout(function() {
                            if (!self.checked) return;

                            // 1) padrão: id + '-description'
                            var desc = document.getElementById(self.id + '-description');
                            if (desc && !desc.disabled) {
                                desc.focus();
                                return;
                            }

                            // 2) mappings específicos conhecidos
                            if (self.id.indexOf('other-equipment') !== -1) {
                                var oe = document.getElementById('other-equipment-info');
                                if (oe) {
                                    oe.focus();
                                    return;
                                }
                            }
                            if (self.id.indexOf('other-condition') !== -1) {
                                var oc = document.getElementById('chronical-health-problem-other');
                                if (oc) {
                                    oc.focus();
                                    return;
                                }
                            }

                            // 3) se for checkbox de alergia, tenta id + '-description' (já tratado), senão busca na coluna
                            var container = self.closest('.col-lg-4, .col-lg-3, .col-lg-6, .col');
                            var focusable = container && container.querySelector('input:not([type=checkbox]):not([type=radio]):not([disabled]), textarea:not([disabled]), select:not([disabled])');
                            if (focusable) {
                                focusable.focus();
                                return;
                            }

                            // 4) último fallback: prox. elemento focusable no DOM
                            var sibling = self.parentElement && self.parentElement.nextElementSibling ? self.parentElement.nextElementSibling : self.nextElementSibling;
                            if (sibling) {
                                var f2 = sibling.querySelector && sibling.querySelector('input:not([disabled]), textarea:not([disabled]), select:not([disabled])');
                                if (f2) f2.focus();
                            }
                        }, 0);
                    });
                });
            });
        </script>
        <script>
        $(document).ready(function() {


            // máscaras

            var SPMaskBehavior = function(val) {
                    return val.replace(/\D/g, '').length === 11 ? '(00) 00000-0000' : '(00) 0000-00009';
                },
                spOptions = {
                    onKeyPress: function(val, e, field, options) {
                        field.mask(SPMaskBehavior.apply({}, arguments), options);
                    }
                };

            $('#contact-phone-number, #doctor-phone-number').mask(SPMaskBehavior, spOptions);

            $('#associate-height').mask('#.00m');
            $('#associate-weight').mask('#00.0kg', {
                reverse: true
            });

            // mostrar/ocultar o campo de equipmento
            $(document).on("change", "input[name='equipment']", function() {
                if ($("#yes-equipment").is(":checked")) {
                    $("#equipments").css({
                        "pointer-events": "",
                        "opacity": "1"
                    });
                    setTimeout(function() {
                        $("#equipments-container").focus();
                    }, 0);
                } else {
                    $("#equipments input[type='checkbox']").prop("checked", false);
                    $('#selected-equipment-info').text('Selecione');
                    $("#equipments").css({
                        "pointer-events": "none",
                        "background-color": "#f9f9f9",
                        "opacity": "0.6"
                    });
                    $("#other-equipment-info").prop("disabled", true).val('');
                    inputErrorResetMedical($('#equipments-container'));
                    inputErrorResetMedical($('#other-equipment-info'));
                }
            });

            if ($('#checkbox-other-equipment').is(':checked')) {
                $("#other-equipment-info").prop("disabled", false);
            }

            $('#checkbox-other-equipment').on('change', function() {
                if ($(this).is(':checked')) {
                    $('#equipment-dropdown').hide();
                    $("#other-equipment-info").prop("disabled", false).focus();
                } else {
                    $("#other-equipment-info").prop("disabled", true).val('');

                    });

                        "pointer-events": "none",

                    });

                    $("#chronical-health-problem-other").val('').prop('disabled', true);
                    inputErrorResetMedical($('#chronical-health-problem-container'));
                    inputErrorResetMedical($("#chronical-health-problem-other"));

                }
            });

            $("#checkbox-other-condition").on("change", function() {
                if ($(this).is(':checked')) {
                    $('#medical-conditions-dropdown').hide();
                    $("#chronical-health-problem-other").prop("disabled", false).focus();
                } else {
                    $("#chronical-health-problem-other").prop("disabled", true).val('');
                    inputErrorResetMedical($("#chronical-health-problem-other"));
                }
            });



            // Função para habilitar/desabilitar os inputs de descrição da alergia

                let descriptionInput = container.find('.allergy-description');

                    descriptionInput.prop('disabled', false).focus();
                } else {
                    descriptionInput.prop('disabled', true).val('');
                }
            });

            $('.medical-record-allergy').each(function() {
                let container = $(this).closest('div[class^="col"]');

                if ($(this).is(':checked')) {
                    descriptionInput.prop('disabled', false);
                } else {
                    descriptionInput.prop('disabled', true);
                }
            });

            // mostra/esconde descrição ao mudar radio transtorno
            $(document).on("change", "input[name='mental-disorder']", function() {
                if ($("#yes-mental-disorder").is(":checked")) {
                    $("#mental-disorder-description").prop('disabled', false).focus();
                } else {
                    $("#mental-disorder-description").prop('disabled', true).val('');
                    inputErrorResetMedical($("#mental-disorder-description"));

                        </td>

                    $('#health-insurance-info-container, #health-insurance-number-container').show();
                } else {
                    $('#health-insurance-info-container, #health-insurance-number-container, #other-health-insurance-container')
                        .hide();
                    $('#health-insurance-info, #health-insurance-number, #other-health-insurance').val('');
                    inputErrorResetMedical($('#health-insurance-info'));
                    inputErrorResetMedical($('#health-insurance-number'));
                }
            });



            // outro plano de saúde
            if ($('#health-insurance-info').val() === '51') {
                $('#other-health-insurance-container').show();
            } else {
                $('#other-health-insurance-container').hide();
                $('#other-health-insurance').val('');
            }

            // Evento de mudança no select plano de saúde outro
            $('#health-insurance-info').on('change', function() {
                if ($(this).val() === '51') {
                    $('#other-health-insurance-container').show();
                } else {
                    $('#other-health-insurance-container').hide();
                    $('#other-health-insurance').val('');
                }
            });

            // troca contato de emergencia
            $('input[name="emergency-contact"]').on('change', function() {
                if ($('#legal-guardian-emergency-contact').is(':checked')) {
                    $('#contact-name').val('');
                    $('#contact-phone-number').val('');
                } else {
                    $('#contact-name').val('');
                    $('#contact-phone-number').val('');
                }
            });




            ////// MOSTRAR RODAPÉ QUANDO ALTERAR ALGUM INPUT
            // Salva os valores iniciais dos inputs
            $("input, select, textarea").each(function() {
                const $el = $(this);
                $el.data("original", $el.is(":checkbox, :radio") ? $el.prop("checked") : $el.val());
            });

            // Verifica se houve mudanças no form
            $("input, select, textarea").on("input change", function() {
                const hasChanges = $("input, select, textarea").is(function() {
                    const $el = $(this);
                    return $el.is(":checkbox, :radio") ?
                        $el.prop("checked") !== $el.data("original") :
                        $el.val() !== $el.data("original");
                });

                $('#medical-records-footer-container').removeClass('d-none');
            });

            // Exibe o rodapé ao adicionar uma nova linha de medicamento
            $('#add-row, .btn-delete-medicine').click(function() {
                $('#medical-records-footer-container').removeClass('d-none');
            });

            // Verifica alterações nos inputs e selects dentro da tabela de medicamentos
            $(document).on("input change", "#medicine-rows-container input, #medicine-rows-container select",
                function() {
                    $('#medical-records-footer-container').removeClass('d-none');
                });



            // resetar erros
            $(document).on('input change', '.medical-record-input', function() {
                inputErrorResetMedical(this);
            });

            $('.checkbox-medical-condition').each(function() {
                $(this).on('change', function() {
                    inputErrorResetMedical($('#chronical-health-problem-container'));
                });
            });

            $(document).on('input change', '.medical-record-input', function() {
                inputErrorResetMedical(this);
            });






        });


        // salvar dsados alterados
        function sendAssociateMedicalRecords() {

            var medicalData = new FormData();

            // dados biometricos
            medicalData.append('associateCode', $('#associate-code').val());
            medicalData.append('associateHeight', $('#associate-height').val());
            medicalData.append('associateWeight', $('#associate-weight').val());
            medicalData.append('associateBloodtype', $('#associate-bloodtype').val());
            medicalData.append('associateRhFactor', $('#associate-rh-factor').val());

            // equipamentos de auxilio
            medicalData.append('aidingEquipment', $('input[name="equipment"]:checked').val() === 'yes' ? 'S' : 'N');
            medicalData.append('checkboxGlasses', $('#checkbox-glasses').is(':checked') ? 'S' : 'N');
            medicalData.append('checkboxContactLenses', $('#checkbox-contact-lens').is(':checked') ? 'S' : 'N');
            medicalData.append('checkboxBraces', $('#checkbox-braces').is(':checked') ? 'S' : 'N');
            medicalData.append('checkboxProbes', $('#checkbox-probe').is(':checked') ? 'S' : 'N');
            medicalData.append('checkboxPacemaker', $('#checkbox-pacemaker').is(':checked') ? 'S' : 'N');
            medicalData.append('checkboxAuditionEquipment', $('#checkbox-hearing-aid').is(':checked') ? 'S' : 'N');
            medicalData.append('checkboxInsulinPump', $('#checkbox-insulin-pump').is(':checked') ? 'S' : 'N');
            medicalData.append('checkboxOtherEquipment', $('#checkbox-other-equipment').is(':checked') ? 'S' : 'N');
            medicalData.append('otherEquipmentDescription', $('#other-equipment-info').val());


            medicalData.append('medicalMonitoring', $('input[name="medical-monitoring"]:checked').val() === 'yes' ? 'S' :
                'N');
            medicalData.append('medicalMonitoringDescription', $('#medical-monitoring-info').val());
            medicalData.append('cronicalDisease', $('input[name="chronical-health-problem"]:checked').val() === 'yes' ?
                'S' : 'N');
            medicalData.append('cronicalDiseaseDescription', $('#chronical-health-problem-other').val());

            // doenças cronicas
            medicalData.append('checkboxAsthma', $('#checkbox-asthma').is(':checked') ? 'S' : 'N');
            medicalData.append('checkboxBronchitis', $('#checkbox-bronchitis').is(':checked') ? 'S' : 'N');
            medicalData.append('checkboxSinusitis', $('#checkbox-sinusitis').is(':checked') ? 'S' : 'N');
            medicalData.append('checkboxHypertension', $('#checkbox-hypertension').is(':checked') ? 1 : 0);
            medicalData.append('checkboxDiabetes', $('#checkbox-diabetes').is(':checked') ? 'S' : 'N');
            medicalData.append('checkboxEpilepsy', $('#checkbox-epilepsy').is(':checked') ? 'S' : 'N');
            medicalData.append('checkboxSkinDiseases', $('#checkbox-dermatological').is(':checked') ? 'S' : 'N');
            medicalData.append('checkboxHeartDiseases', $('#checkbox-cardiac').is(':checked') ? 'S' : 'N');
            medicalData.append('checkboxRheumatologicalDiseases', $('#checkbox-rheumatological').is(':checked') ? 'S' :
                'N');
            medicalData.append('checkboxHematologicalDiseases', $('#checkbox-hematological').is(':checked') ? 'S' : 'N');
            medicalData.append('checkboxkidneyDiseases', $('#checkbox-kidney').is(':checked') ? 'S' : 'N');
            medicalData.append('checkboxOtherDiseases', $('#checkbox-other-condition').is(':checked') ? 'S' : 'N');

            // alergias
            medicalData.append('bugBiteAllergy', $('#bug-bite-allergy').is(':checked') ? 'S' : 'N');
            medicalData.append('bugBiteAllergyDescription', $('#bug-bite-allergy-description').val());
            medicalData.append('medicinesAllergy', $('#medicine-allergy').is(':checked') ? 'S' : 'N');
            medicalData.append('medicinesAllergyDescription', $('#medicine-allergy-description').val());
            medicalData.append('plantsAllergy', $('#plant-allergy').is(':checked') ? 'S' : 'N');
            medicalData.append('plantsAllergyDescription', $('#plant-allergy-description').val());
            medicalData.append('foodsAllergy', $('#food-allergy').is(':checked') ? 'S' : 'N');
            medicalData.append('foodsAllergyDescription', $('#food-allergy-description').val());
            medicalData.append('miteAllergy', $('#mite-allergy').is(':checked') ? 'S' : 'N');
            medicalData.append('miteAllergyDescription', $('#mite-allergy-description').val());
            medicalData.append('fungusAllergy', $('#fungus-allergy').is(':checked') ? 'S' : 'N');
            medicalData.append('fungusAllergyDescription', $('#fungus-allergy-description').val());
            medicalData.append('otherAllergy', $('#other-allergy').is(':checked') ? 'S' : 'N');
            medicalData.append('otherAllergyDescription', $('#other-allergy-description').val());

            // transtornos
            medicalData.append('mentalDisorder', $('input[name="mental-disorder"]:checked').val() === 'yes' ? 'S' : 'N');
            medicalData.append('mentalDisorderDescription', $('#mental-disorder-description').val());

            medicalData.append('mentalDisorderMedication', $('input[name="mental-disorder-medication"]:checked').val() ===
                'yes' ? 'S' : 'N');
            medicalData.append('mentalDisorderMedicationDescription', $('#mental-disorder-medication-description').val());

            medicalData.append('mentalDisorderProfessionalTreatment', $('input[name="mental-disorder-treatment"]:checked')
                .val() === 'yes' ? 'S' : 'N');
            medicalData.append('mentalDisorderPsychologist', $('#checkbox-psychologist').is(':checked') ? 'S' : 'N');
            medicalData.append('mentalDisorderMedicalTreatment', $('#checkbox-doctor').is(':checked') ? 'S' : 'N');
            medicalData.append('mentalDisorderOtherTreatment', $('#checkbox-other-professional').is(':checked') ? 'S' :
                'N');
            medicalData.append('medicalDisorderOtherTreatmentDescription', $(
                '#mental-disorder-professional-other-description').val());

            // deficiencias
            medicalData.append('physicalDeficiency', $('#physical-condition').is(':checked') ? 'S' : 'N');
            medicalData.append('physicalDeficiencyDescription', $('#physical-condition-description').val());
            medicalData.append('visualDeficiency', $('#visual-condition').is(':checked') ? 'S' : 'N');
            medicalData.append('visualDeficiencyDescription', $('#visual-condition-description').val());
            medicalData.append('hearingDeficiency', $('#hearing-condition').is(':checked') ? 'S' : 'N');
            medicalData.append('hearingDeficiencyDescription', $('#hearing-condition-description').val());
            medicalData.append('intelectualDeficiency', $('#intellectual-condition').is(':checked') ? 'S' : 'N');
            medicalData.append('intelectualDeficiencyDescription', $('#intellectual-condition-description').val());
            medicalData.append('autism', $('#autism-condition').is(':checked') ? 'S' : 'N');
            medicalData.append('autismDescription', $('#autism-condition-description').val());

            // comportamentos
            medicalData.append('selfHarmingBehavior', $('#self-aggression-crisis').is(':checked') ? 'S' : 'N');
            medicalData.append('selfHarmingBehaviorDescription', $('#self-aggression-crisis-description').val());
            medicalData.append('othersHarmingBehavior', $('#aggression-crisis').is(':checked') ? 'S' : 'N');
            medicalData.append('othersHarmingBehaviorDescription', $('#aggression-crisis-description').val());
            medicalData.append('psychomotorAgitationBehavior', $('#psychomotor-agitation').is(':checked') ? 'S' : 'N');
            medicalData.append('psychomotorAgitationBehaviorDescription', $('#psychomotor-agitation-description').val());
            medicalData.append('verbalDisobedienceBehavior', $('#instructions-difficulty').is(':checked') ? 'S' : 'N');
            medicalData.append('verbalDisobedienceBehaviorDescription', $('#instructions-difficulty-description').val());
            medicalData.append('escapeTendencyBehavior', $('#runaway-tendencies').is(':checked') ? 'S' : 'N');
            medicalData.append('escapeTendencyBehaviorDescription', $('#runaway-tendencies-description').val());
            medicalData.append('selfDestructingBehavior', $('#self-destructive').is(':checked') ? 'S' : 'N');
            medicalData.append('selfDestructingBehaviorDescription', $('#self-destructive-description').val());
            medicalData.append('panicAnxietyBehavior', $('#anxiety-crisis').is(':checked') ? 'S' : 'N');
            medicalData.append('panicAnxietyBehaviorDescription', $('#anxiety-crisis-description').val());
            medicalData.append('hardCommunicationBehavior', $('#communication-difficulty').is(':checked') ? 'S' : 'N');
            medicalData.append('hardCommunicationBehaviorDescription', $('#communication-difficulty-description').val());
            medicalData.append('feedingDifficultyBehavior', $('#eating-difficulties').is(':checked') ? 'S' : 'N');
            medicalData.append('feedingDifficultyBehaviorDescription', $('#eating-difficulties-description').val());
            medicalData.append('sleepingDifficultyBehavior', $('#sleep-difficulty').is(':checked') ? 'S' : 'N');
            medicalData.append('sleepingDifficultyBehaviorDescription', $('#sleep-difficulty-description').val());


            // medicamentos
            var medicines = [];

            $('#medicine-rows-container tr').each(function() {
                var medicineName = $(this).find('input[id^="medicine-description"]').val();
                var medicineContinuous = $(this).find('select[id^="medicine-continuous"]').val();
                var medicineInfo = $(this).find('input[id^="medicine-info"]').val();

                medicines.push({
                    name: medicineName,
                    continuous: medicineContinuous,
                    info: medicineInfo
                });
            });


            medicalData.append('medicines', JSON.stringify(medicines));

            // informações gerais
            medicalData.append('physicalImpediment', $('input[name="physical-impediment"]:checked').val() === 'yes' ? 'S' :
                'N');
            medicalData.append('physicalImpedimentDescription', $('#physical-impediment-description').val());
            medicalData.append('foodRestriction', $('input[name="food-restriction"]:checked').val() === 'yes' ? 'S' : 'N');
            medicalData.append('foodRestrictionDescription', $('#food-restriction-description').val());
            medicalData.append('canSwim', $('input[name="swim"]:checked').val() === 'yes' ? 'S' : 'N');
            medicalData.append('isSleepwalker', $('input[name="sleepwalk"]:checked').val() === 'yes' ? 'S' : 'N');

            // plano de saude
            medicalData.append('healthInsurance', $('input[name="health-insurance"]:checked').val() === 'yes' ? 1 : 0);
            medicalData.append('health_insurance_description', $('#health-insurance-info').val());
            medicalData.append('healthInsuranceNumber', $('#health-insurance-number').val());
            medicalData.append('healthInsuranceOther', $('#other-health-insurance').val());
            medicalData.append('doctorName', $('#favorite-doctor').val());
            medicalData.append('doctorPhone', $('#doctor-phone-number').val());


            // emergências
            medicalData.append('acceptDoctor', $('input[name="medical-decisions"]:checked').val() === 'yes' ? 'S' : 'N');
            medicalData.append('waitForParents', $('input[name="medical-decisions"]:checked').val() === 'no' ? 'S' : 'N');
            medicalData.append('callParents', $('input[name="emergency-contact"]:checked').val() === 'legal-guardian' ?
                'S' : 'N');
            medicalData.append('callOther', $('input[name="emergency-contact"]:checked').val() === 'other' ? 'S' : 'N');
            medicalData.append('emergencyCallPhone', $('#contact-phone-number').val());
            medicalData.append('emergencyCallName', $('#contact-name').val());

            // observacoes
            medicalData.append('otherObservations', $('#observations').val());
            console.log(medicalData);
            let validMedicalInputs = validateMedicalInputs();

            if (validMedicalInputs) {
                loading(true);

                $.ajax({
                    type: "POST",
                    headers: {
                        'X-CSRF-TOKEN': $('meta[name="csrf-token"]').attr('content')
                    },
                    url: "https://paxtu100.escoteiros.org.br/associado/ficha-medica/editar",
                    data: medicalData,
                    contentType: medicalData instanceof FormData ? false : 'application/x-www-form-urlencoded; charset=UTF-8',
                    processData: !(medicalData instanceof FormData),
                    success: function(data) {
                        loading(false);
                        successFeedback();
                        if (data.updatedAt) {
                            $('#medical-records-updated-at').text(data.updatedAt);
                        }
                        $('#medical-records-footer-container').addClass('d-none');
                    },
                    error: function(data) {
                        loading(false);
                    }
                });
            } else {
                return false;
            }
        }

        function validateMedicalInputs() {
            let validationError = [];

            if ($('#associate-height').val() === '') {
                validationError.push(true);
                inputErrorFeedback($('#associate-height'));
            }

            if ($('#associate-weight').val() === '') {
                validationError.push(true);
                inputErrorFeedback($('#associate-weight'));
            }

            if ($('#associate-bloodtype').val() === '') {
                validationError.push(true);
                inputErrorFeedback($('#associate-bloodtype'));
            }

            if ($('#associate-rh-factor').val() === '') {
                validationError.push(true);
                inputErrorFeedback($('#associate-rh-factor'));
            }

            if ($('#yes-equipment').is(':checked') && $('#selected-equipment-info').text() === 'Selecione') {
                validationError.push(true);
                inputErrorFeedback($('#equipments-container'));
            }

            if ($('#checkbox-other-equipment').is(':checked') && $('#other-equipment-info').val() === '') {
                validationError.push(true);
                inputErrorFeedback($('#other-equipment-info'));
            }

            if ($('#yes-medical-monitoring').is(':checked') && $('#medical-monitoring-info').val() === '') {
                validationError.push(true);
                inputErrorFeedback($('#medical-monitoring-info'));
            }

            if ($('#yes-chronical-health-problem').is(':checked') && $('#selected-medical-conditions-info').text() ===
                'Selecione') {
                validationError.push(true);
                inputErrorFeedback($('#chronical-health-problem-container'));
            }

            if ($('#checkbox-other-condition').is(':checked') && $('#chronical-health-problem-other').val() === '') {
                validationError.push(true);
                inputErrorFeedback($('#chronical-health-problem-other'));
            }

            $('.medical-record-allergy').each(function() {
                if ($(this).is(':checked')) {
                    let allergyDescription = $(this).closest('.form-check').next('.allergy-description');

                    if (allergyDescription.val().trim() === '') {
                        validationError.push(true);
                        inputErrorFeedback(allergyDescription);
                    }
                }
            });

            if ($('#yes-mental-disorder').is(':checked') && $('#mental-disorder-description').val() === '') {
                validationError.push(true);
                inputErrorFeedback($('#mental-disorder-description'));
            }

            if ($('#yes-mental-disorder-medication').is(':checked') && $('#mental-disorder-medication-description')
                .val() === '') {
                validationError.push(true);
                inputErrorFeedback($('#mental-disorder-medication-description'));
            }

            if ($('#yes-mental-disorder-treatment').is(':checked') && $('#mental-disorder-professional-other-description')
                .val() === '') {
                validationError.push(true);
                inputErrorFeedback($('#mental-disorder-professional-other-description'));
            }

            if ($('#checkbox-other-professional').is(':checked') && $('#mental-disorder-professional-other-description')
                .val() === '') {
                validationError.push(true);
                inputErrorFeedback($('#mental-disorder-professional-other-description'));
            }

            $('.medical-record-condition').each(function() {
                if ($(this).is(':checked')) {
                    let descriptionInput = $(this).closest('.form-check').next('.condition-description');

                    if (descriptionInput.val() === '') {
                        validationError.push(true);
                        inputErrorFeedback(descriptionInput);
                    }
                }
            });

            $('.medical-record-behavior').each(function() {
                if ($(this).is(':checked')) {
                    let descriptionInput = $(this).closest('.form-check').next('.medical-record-input');

                    if (descriptionInput.val() === '') {
                        validationError.push(true);
                        inputErrorFeedback(descriptionInput);
                    }
                }
            });

            $('#medicine-rows-container').each(function() {
                let description = $(this).find('input[id^="medicine-description"]');

                if (description.val() === '') {
                    validationError.push(true);
                    inputErrorFeedback(description);
                    description.css('border', 'none !important');
                    console.log(description);
                }
            });

            if ($('#yes-physical-impediment').is(':checked') && $('#physical-impediment-description').val() === '') {
                validationError.push(true);
                inputErrorFeedback($('#physical-impediment-description'));
            }

            if ($('#yes-food-restriction').is(':checked') && $('#food-restriction-description').val() === '') {
                validationError.push(true);
                inputErrorFeedback($('#food-restriction-description'));
            }

            if ($('#yes-health-insurance').is(':checked') && $('#health-insurance-info').val() === '') {
                validationError.push(true);
                inputErrorFeedback($('#health-insurance-info'));
            }

            if ($('#yes-health-insurance').is(':checked') && $('#health-insurance-number').val() === '') {
                validationError.push(true);
                inputErrorFeedback($('#health-insurance-number'));
            }

            if ($('#health-insurance-info').val() === '51' && $('#other-health-insurance').val() === '') {
                validationError.push(true);
                inputErrorFeedback($('#other-health-insurance'));
            }

            if ($('#contact-phone-number').val() === '') {
                validationError.push(true);
                inputErrorFeedback($('#contact-phone-number'));
            }

            if ($('#contact-name').val() === '') {
                validationError.push(true);
                inputErrorFeedback($('#contact-name'));
            }


            if (validationError.includes(true)) {
                $('.footer-error-message').removeClass('d-none');
                return false;
            }

            $('.footer-error-message').addClass('d-none');
            return true;

        }

        function inputErrorFeedback(inputField) {
            // borda vermelha
            $(inputField).css({
                'border': '#dc3545 solid 1px'
            });

            //sombra vermelha
            $(inputField).on('focus', function() {
                $(this).css({
                    'box-shadow': '0 0 0 .25rem rgba(220, 53, 69, 0.25)',
                    'border': '1px solid #dc3545'
                });
            });

            // remove a sombra clicando fora
            $(inputField).on('blur', function() {
                $(this).css({
                    'box-shadow': 'none',
                    'border': '1px solid #dc3545'
                });
            });
        }

        function inputErrorResetMedical(inputField) {

            $(inputField).css({
                'border': '1px solid #dee2e6',
                'box-shadow': 'none'
            });

            // Define borda azul ao focar no campo
            $(inputField).on('focus', function() {
                $(this).css({
                    'border': '1px solid #66afe9',
                    'box-shadow': '0 0 0 0.3rem rgba(194, 219, 254, 0.8)'
                });
            });

            // Define borda cinza ao desfocar o campo
            $(inputField).on('blur', function() {
                $(this).css({
                    'border': '1px solid #dee2e6',
                    'box-shadow': 'none'
                });
            });

            // se for descricao de medicamento, arrumar borda
            if ($(inputField).attr('id')?.startsWith('medicine-description-')) {
                $(inputField).css({
                    'border': 'none',
                    'box-shadow': 'none'
                }).off('focus blur');
            }
        }

        $('button[name="print-medical-records"]').on('click', function(e) {
            e.preventDefault();

            let associateCode = $('#associate-code').val();
            let url = "https://paxtu100.escoteiros.org.br/associado/ficha-medica/imprimir";
            let associateName = "Alessandra Da Silva Monteiro";
            associateName = associateName.replace(/\s+/g, '').toLowerCase();

            loading(true);

            $.ajax({
                type: "POST",
                headers: {
                    'X-CSRF-TOKEN': $('meta[name="csrf-token"]').attr('content')
                },
                url: url,
                data: {
                    associateCode: associateCode
                },
                xhrFields: {
                    responseType: 'blob'
                },
                success: function(data) {
                    var blob = new Blob([data]);
                    var link = document.createElement('a');
                    link.href = window.URL.createObjectURL(blob);
                    link.download = `ficha-medica-${associateName}.pdf`;
                    link.click();
                    loading(false);
                },
                error: function(data) {
                    // console.log(data.responseJSON.error);
                    loading(false);
                }
            });

        });
    </script>
    <script>
        $(document).ready(function() {

            // Filtrar documentos por progressão pessoal
            function applyProgressionFilter(selectedCategory) {
                if (!selectedCategory) {
                    return;
                }

                $('.progression-document').each(function() {
                    const documentCategory = $(this).data('progression');

                    if (documentCategory === selectedCategory) {
                        $(this).removeClass('d-none');
                    } else {
                        $(this).addClass('d-none');
                    }
                });
            }

            $(document).on('change', '#progression-category', function() {
                applyProgressionFilter($(this).val());
            });

            applyProgressionFilter($('#progression-category').val());

            function ensureDeleteButton(documentId) {
                const $fileInput = $(`#file-${documentId}`);
                const documentName = $fileInput.data('document-name') || '';
                const isExempt = String($fileInput.data('exempt')) === 'true';
                const $actions = $(`.document-actions[data-document-id="${documentId}"]`).first();
                const year = $('#document-year').val();

                if (!$actions.length) {
                    return;
                }

                let $deleteButton = $(`#delete-document-${documentId}`);
                if (!$deleteButton.length) {
                    const yearAttribute = isExempt ? `data-year="${year}"` : '';
                    $deleteButton = $(
                        `<button class="delete-document" style="background-color: #f7f7f7; border-bottom: 1px solid #000000a8; border-top: 1px solid #000000a8;" id="delete-document-${documentId}" data-document-id="${documentId}" data-document-name="${documentName}" data-exempt="${isExempt}" ${yearAttribute} title="Excluir documento"><i class="bi bi-x" style="background-color: #E3E3E3; border-radius: 50%; padding: 3px; display: inline-flex; align-items: center; justify-content: center;"></i></button>`
                    );
                    $(`#file-name-${documentId}`).closest('.input-group').find('[id^="button-attach-document-"]')
                        .before($deleteButton);
                }

                $deleteButton.removeClass('d-none').attr('data-exempt', isExempt);

                if (isExempt) {
                    $deleteButton.attr('data-year', year);
                }
            }

            // Excluir documento
            $(document).on('click', '.delete-document', function() {
                let documentId = $(this).data('document-id');
                let documentName = $(this).data('document-name');
                let isExempt = $(this).data('exempt');
                let year = $(this).data('year') || $('#document-year').val();
                let associateCode = $('#associate-code').val();

                // Confirmar exclusão
                Swal.fire({
                    title: "Deseja realmente excluir este documento?",
                    text: "esta ação não poderá ser desfeita",
                    icon: "warning",
                    showCancelButton: true,
                    confirmButtonColor: "#3085d6",
                    cancelButtonColor: "#d33",
                    confirmButtonText: "Sim, excluir!",
                    cancelButtonText: "Cancelar"
                }).then((result) => {
                    if (result.isConfirmed) {
                        loading(true);

                        let url = isExempt ?
                            "https://paxtu100.escoteiros.org.br/associado/documentos-isencao/deletar" :
                            "https://paxtu100.escoteiros.org.br/associado/documento/deletar";

                        $.ajax({
                            url: url,
                            type: 'POST',
                            data: {
                                associateCode: associateCode,
                                documentCode: documentId,
                                year: year
                            },
                            headers: {
                                'X-CSRF-TOKEN': $('meta[name="csrf-token"]').attr('content')
                            },
                            success: function(data) {
                                loading(false);

                                // Resetar o estado do input
                                $(`#file-name-${documentId}`).val('');
                                setInputState(`#file-name-${documentId}`, 'default');

                                // Ocultar botões de visualização e exclusão
                                $(`#show-document-${documentId}`).addClass('d-none');
                                $(`#delete-document-${documentId}`).addClass('d-none');

                                // Resetar status badge para documentos de isenção
                                if (isExempt) {
                                    $(`#status-badge-${documentId}`)
                                        .removeClass(
                                            'badge-under-analysis badge-approved badge-denied'
                                        )
                                        .addClass('d-none')
                                        .text('');
                                }

                                // Limpar o input file
                                $(`#file-${documentId}`).val('');

                                successFeedback('Documento excluído com sucesso!');
                            },
                            error: function(xhr) {
                                loading(false);
                                alert(xhr.responseJSON?.error ||
                                    'Erro ao excluir documento');
                            }
                        });
                    }
                });
            });


            // simula um clique no input file ao clicar no botão anexar
            $(document).on('click', '[id^="button-attach-document-"]', function() {
                let documentId = $(this).attr('id').replace('button-attach-document-', '');
                $(`#file-${documentId}`).click();
            });

            // anexar aquivo
            $(document).on('change', '[id^="file-"]', function() {
                let documentCode = $(this).attr('id').replace('file-', '');
                var associateCode = $('#associate-code').val();

                // se for documento de isenção pegar ano
                var documentYear = $('#document-year').val();

                var files = $(this)[0].files;
                var maxFileSizeBytes = 100 * 1024 * 1024; // 100MB

                for (var i = 0; i < files.length; i++) {
                    if (files[i].size > maxFileSizeBytes) {
                        Swal.fire({
                            title: "Arquivo muito grande",
                            text: "O tamanho máximo permitido por arquivo é 100MB.",
                            icon: "warning",
                            confirmButtonText: "OK",
                        });

                        $(this).val('');
                        $(`#file-name-${documentCode}`).val('');
                        setInputState(`#file-name-${documentCode}`, 'default');
                        return;
                    }
                }

                let fileName = files.length > 0 ? files[0].name : "";
                $(`#file-name-${documentCode}`).val(fileName);

                // AJAX para salvar o documento
                var formData = new FormData();

                for (var i = 0; i < files.length; i++) {
                    formData.append('documents[]', files[i]);
                }

                formData.append('associate', associateCode);
                formData.append('documentCode', documentCode);
                formData.append('documentYear', documentYear);

                let url = "https://paxtu100.escoteiros.org.br/associado/documentos/novo";

                loading(true);

                // validação antes de enviar
                $.ajax({
                    url: url,
                    headers: {
                        'X-CSRF-TOKEN': $('meta[name="csrf-token"]').attr('content')
                    },
                    type: 'POST',
                    data: formData,
                    processData: false,
                    contentType: false,
                    success: function(data) {
                        loading(false);

                        setInputState(`#file-name-${documentCode}`, 'success');
                        ensureDeleteButton(documentCode);
                        $(`#status-badge-${documentCode}`).removeClass('d-none').addClass(
                            'badge-under-analysis').text('Em análise');


                        successFeedback();
                    },
                    error: function(data) {
                        loading(false);
                        alert(data.responseJSON.error);

                    }
                });
            });

            // visualizar documento (s3 e blob)
            $(document).on('click', '[id^="show-document-"]', function(e) {
                e.preventDefault();
                let documentCode = $(this).attr('id').replace('show-document-', '');
                let associateCode = $('#associate-code').val();
                let year = $('#document-year').val();
                let exempt = $(this).data('exempt');

                let url;

                if (exempt) {
                    url = "https://paxtu100.escoteiros.org.br/associado/documentos-isencao";
                } else {
                    url = "https://paxtu100.escoteiros.org.br/associado/documentos";
                }

                loading(true);

                $.ajax({
                    url: url,
                    type: 'POST',
                    data: {
                        associateCode: associateCode,
                        year: year,
                        documentCode: documentCode
                    },
                    headers: {
                        'X-CSRF-TOKEN': $('meta[name="csrf-token"]').attr('content')
                    },
                    success: function(data, status, xhr) {
                        loading(false);

                        if (!data.files || data.files.length === 0) {
                            alert('Documento não encontrado');
                            return;
                        }

                        console.log(data.files);

                        data.files.forEach(file => {
                            let link = document.createElement('a');
                            link.target = '_blank';

                            if (file.url) {
                                // Se for um link do S3, abre diretamente
                                link.href = file.url;
                            } else {
                                // Se for um arquivo base64, gera um link temporário para 1
                                link.href = `data:${file.content_type};base64,${file.content}`;
                            }

                            // Adiciona o atributo para abrir em uma nova aba
                            link.target = "_blank";

                            document.body.appendChild(link);
                            link.click();
                            document.body.removeChild(link);
                        });
                    },
                    error: function(xhr) {
                        loading(false);

                        if (xhr.status === 404) {
                            alert('Documento não encontrado.');
                        } else {
                            alert(xhr.responseJSON?.error || 'Erro ao buscar documento');
                        }
                    },
                });
            });

            // buscar documentos de isenção do ano selecionado
            $(document).on('change', '#document-year', function(e) {
                e.preventDefault();

                let associateCode = $('#associate-code').val();
                let year = $('#document-year').val();

                let url =
                    "https://paxtu100.escoteiros.org.br/associado/documentos-isencao/:associateCode/:year";
                url = url.replace(':associateCode', associateCode);
                url = url.replace(':year', year);

                loading(true)

                $.ajax({
                    url: url,
                    type: 'GET',
                    success: function(data, status, xhr) {
                        loading(false);

                        if (data.exemptedRequest) {
                            $('#show-document-6').removeClass('d-none');

                            if (data.exemptedRequest[0].cd_aprovacao === 1) {
                                $('#status-badge-6').removeClass('d-none').addClass(
                                    'badge-under-analisys').text('Em análise');
                            }
                            if (data.exemptedRequest[0].cd_aprovacao === 2) {
                                $('#status-badge-6').removeClass('d-none').addClass(
                                    'badge-approved').text('Aprovado');
                            }
                            if (data.exemptedRequest[0].cd_aprovacao === 3) {
                                $('#status-badge-6').removeClass('d-none').addClass(
                                    'badge-denied').text('Reprovado');
                            }

                            setInputState($('#file-name-6'), 'success');


                        } else {
                            $('#show-document-6').addClass('d-none');
                            $('#status-badge-6').addClass('d-none').text('');
                            setInputState($('#file-name-6'), 'default');

                            // remover badges de status
                            // setInputState default
                        }

                        if (data.paymentCheckCopy) {
                            $('#show-document-7').removeClass('d-none');

                            if (data.paymentCheckCopy[0].cd_aprovacao === 1) {
                                $('#status-badge-7').removeClass('d-none').addClass(
                                    'badge-under-analisys').text('Em análise');
                            }
                            if (data.paymentCheckCopy[0].cd_aprovacao === 2) {
                                $('#status-badge-7').removeClass('d-none').addClass(
                                    'badge-approved').text('Aprovado');
                            }
                            if (data.paymentCheckCopy[0].cd_aprovacao === 3) {
                                $('#status-badge-7').removeClass('d-none').addClass(
                                    'badge-denied').text('Reprovado');
                            }
                            // inserir badges de status

                            setInputState($('#file-name-7'), 'success');

                        } else {
                            $('#show-document-7').addClass('d-none');
                            $('#status-badge-7').addClass('d-none').text('');
                            setInputState($('#file-name-7'), 'default');

                            // remover badges de status
                            // setInputState default

                        }

                        if (data.identificationDocument) {
                            $('#show-document-8').removeClass('d-none');

                            if (data.identificationDocument[0].cd_aprovacao === 1) {
                                $('#status-badge-8').removeClass('d-none').addClass(
                                    'badge-under-analisys').text('Em análise');
                            }
                            if (data.identificationDocument[0].cd_aprovacao === 2) {
                                $('#status-badge-8').removeClass('d-none').addClass(
                                    'badge-approved').text('Aprovado');
                            }
                            if (data.identificationDocument[0].cd_aprovacao === 3) {
                                $('#status-badge-8').removeClass('d-none').addClass(
                                    'badge-denied').text('Reprovado');
                            }
                            // inserir badges de status
                            setInputState($('#file-name-8'), 'success');

                        } else {
                            $('#show-document-8').addClass('d-none');
                            $('#status-badge-8').addClass('d-none').text('');
                            setInputState($('#file-name-8'), 'default');
                            // remover badges de status

                        }
                    },
                    error: function() {
                        loading(false);
                        alert(data.responseJSON.error);
                    },
                });
            });

            // visualizar documentos de sanção
            $(document).on('click', '[id^="show-sanction-document-"]', function(e) {
                let sanctionDocumentCode = $(this).attr('id').replace('show-sanction-document-', '');
                let associateCode = $('#associate-code').val();
