                let url = "https://paxtu100.escoteiros.org.br/associado/documentos/sancoes";

                loading(true);

                $.ajax({
                    url: url,
                    type: 'POST',
                    data: {
                        associateCode: associateCode,
                        sanctionDocumentCode: sanctionDocumentCode
                    },
                    headers: {
                        'X-CSRF-TOKEN': $('meta[name="csrf-token"]').attr('content')
                    },
                    success: function(data, status, xhr) {
                        loading(false);

                        if (!data.files || data.files.length === 0) {
                            alert('Documento não encontrado');
                            return;
                        }

                        data.files.forEach(file => {
                            let link = document.createElement('a');

                            if (file.url) {
                                // Se for um link do S3, abre diretamente
                                link.href = file.url;
                            } else {
                                // Se for um arquivo base64, gera um link temporário para download
                                link.href =
                                    `data:${file.content_type};base64,${file.content}`;
                            }

                            document.body.appendChild(link);
                            link.target = "_blank";
                            link.click();
                            document.body.removeChild(link);
                        });
                    },
                    error: function(xhr) {
                        loading(false);

                        if (xhr.status === 404) {
                            alert('Documento não encontrado.');
                        } else {
                            alert(xhr.responseJSON?.error || 'Erro ao buscar documento');
                        }
                    },
                });

            });

        });


        function setInputState(element, status) {
            if (status === 'error') {
                $(element).css({
                    'border-color': 'var(--error-dark)',
                    'color': 'var(--error-dark)',
                    'border-right': 'none',
                });

                $(element).closest('.col-4').find('.help-text')
                    .text('Formato do arquivo não permitido')
                    .css('color', 'var(--error-dark)');
            }

            if (status === 'success') {
                $(element).css({
                    'border-color': 'var(--neutral-black)',
                    'color': 'var(--neutral-black)',
                    'border-right': 'none',
                });
            }

            if (status === 'default') {
                $(element).css({
                    'border': '1px solid !important',
                    'border-color': '#e2e5e9',
                    'color': 'var(--neutral-black)',
                    'border-right': 'none',
                });

                $(element).val('');

                $(element).closest('.col-4').find('.help-text')
                    .text('São permitidos arquivos em .PDF, .JPEG, PNG e .HEIC')
                    .css('color', 'var(--neutral-dark)');
            }



        }
    </script>
    <script>
        $(document).ready(function() {
            let roles = ["primary", "secondary", "tertiary"];
            let fields = ["category", "branch", "function", "level"];

            function verifyFunctions() {
                let comb = {};

                roles.forEach(role => {
                    let values = fields.map(f => $(`#${role}-role-${f}`).val());
                    let string = values.join("|");

                    if (values.every(v => v === "0")) {
                        return;
                    }

                    if (string.includes("null") || string.includes("undefined")) {
                        return;
                    }

                    if (comb[string]) {
                        Swal.fire({
                            icon: "error",
                            title: "Oops...",
                            text: `As funções não podem ser duplicadas!`,
                        });

                        fields.forEach(f => $(`#${role}-role-${f}`).val("0"));
                    } else {
                        comb[string] = role;
                    }
                });
            }

            $("select").on("change", verifyFunctions);

            // verificar se houve alterações
            $('#primary-role-category, #primary-role-branch, #primary-role-function, #primary-role-level, #primary-role-area').on(
                'change',
                function() {
                    $('#functions-footer-container').removeClass('d-none');
                    $('#primary-function-is-modified').val('1');
                });

            $('#secondary-role-category, #secondary-role-branch, #secondary-role_function, #secondary-role-level, input[name="secondary-function-outside-group"]')
                .on('change', function() {
                    $('#functions-footer-container').removeClass('d-none');
                    $('#secondary-function-is-modified').val('1');
                });

            $('#tertiary-role-category, #tertiary-role-branch, #tertiary-role-function, #tertiary-role-level, input[name="tertiary-function-outside-group"]')
                .on('change', function() {
                    $('#functions-footer-container').removeClass('d-none');
                    $('#tertiary-function-is-modified').val('1');
                });

            $('input[name="secondary-function-outside-group"]').change(function() {

                if ($('#secondary-function-outside-group-yes').is(':checked')) {
                    $('#secondary-role-another-region, #secondary-role-another-group').prop('disabled',
                        false);
                } else {
                    inputErrorReset($('#secondary-role-another-region'));
                    inputErrorReset($('#secondary-role-another-group'));
                    $('#secondary-role-another-region, #secondary-role-another-group').val('').prop(
                        'disabled', true);

                }
            });

            $('input[name="tertiary-function-outside-group"]').change(function() {
                if ($('#tertiary-function-outside-group-yes').is(':checked')) {
                    $('#tertiary-role-another-region, #tertiary-role-another-group').prop('disabled',
                        false);
                } else {
                    inputErrorReset($('#tertiary-role-another-region'));
                    inputErrorReset($('#tertiary-role-another-group'));
                    $('#tertiary-role-another-region, #tertiary-role-another-group').val('').prop(
                        'disabled', true);
                }
            });

            // remover função secundária
            $('#remove-secondary-function').on('click', function() {
                Swal.fire({
                    title: "Atenção",
                    text: "Deseja remover a segunda função deste associado?",
                    icon: "warning",
                    showCancelButton: true,
                    confirmButtonColor: "#3085d6",
                    cancelButtonColor: "#d33",
                    confirmButtonText: "Sim",
                    cancelButtonText: "Cancelar"
                }).then((result) => {
                    if (result.isConfirmed) {
                        loading(true);

                        data = {
                            associateCode: $('#associate-code').val(),
                            removeSecondary: true,
                        }

                        $.ajax({
                            type: "POST",
                            url: "https://paxtu100.escoteiros.org.br/associado/funcoes-uel/remover",
                            headers: {
                                'X-CSRF-TOKEN': $('meta[name="csrf-token"]').attr('content')
                            },
                            data: data,
                            success: function(data) {
                                $('#secondary-role-category, #secondary-role-branch, #secondary-role-function, #secondary-role-level')
                                    .val(0);
                                $('#secondary-role-another-region, #secondary-role-another-group')
                                    .val('');
                                $('input[name="secondary-function-outside-group"]').prop('checked',
                                    false);


                                loading(false);
                                successFeedback();
                                // console.log(data.message);
                            },
                            error: function(data) {
                                loading(false);
                                // console.log(data.error);
                            }
                        });
                    }
                });
            });

            // remover função terciária
            $('#remove-tertiary-function').on('click', function() {
                Swal.fire({
                    title: "Atenção",
                    text: "Deseja remover a terceira função deste associado?",
                    icon: "warning",
                    showCancelButton: true,
                    confirmButtonColor: "#3085d6",
                    cancelButtonColor: "#d33",
                    confirmButtonText: "Sim",
                    cancelButtonText: "Cancelar"
                }).then((result) => {
                    if (result.isConfirmed) {
                        loading(true);

                        data = {
                            associateCode: $('#associate-code').val(),
                            removeTertiary: true,
                        }

                        $.ajax({
                            type: "POST",
                            url: "https://paxtu100.escoteiros.org.br/associado/funcoes-uel/remover",
                            headers: {
                                'X-CSRF-TOKEN': $('meta[name="csrf-token"]').attr('content')
                            },
                            data: data,
                            success: function(data) {
                                $('#tertiary-role-category, #tertiary-role-branch, #tertiary-role-function, #tertiary-role-level')
                                    .val(0);
                                $('#tertiary-role-another-region, #tertiary-role-another-group')
                                    .val('');
                                $('input[name="tertiary-function-outside-group"]').prop('checked',
                                    false);

                                loading(false);
                                successFeedback();
                                // console.log(data.message);
                            },
                            error: function(data) {
                                loading(false);
                                // console.log(data.error);
                            }
                        });
                    }
                });
            });

            // resetar feedbackd de erro
            $('#secondary-role-another-region, #secondary-role-another-group, #tertiary-role-another-region, #tertiary-role-another-group, #secondary-role-category, #secondary-role-function, #tertiary-role-category, #tertiary-role-function')
                .on(
                    'input',
                    function() {
                        inputErrorReset($(this));
                    });
        });

        function inputErrorReset(inputField) {
            $(inputField).css({
                'border': '1px solid #dee2e6', // Define a borda para o estilo cinza padrão
                'box-shadow': 'none' // Remove qualquer sombra de caixa
            });

            // Define borda azul ao focar no campo
            $(inputField).on('focus', function() {
                $(this).css({
                    'border': '1px solid #66afe9',
                    /* borda azul */
                    'box-shadow': '0 0 0 0.3rem rgba(194, 219, 254, 0.8)'
                });
            });

            // Define borda cinza ao desfocar o campo
            $(inputField).on('blur', function() {
                $(this).css({
                    'border': '1px solid #dee2e6', // Borda cinza
                    'box-shadow': 'none' // Remove sombra de caixa
                });
            });
        }

        function sendFunctions() {

            var data = {
                associateCode: $('#associate-code').val(),
            }

            if (document.getElementById('primary-role-area-container').style.display !== 'none') {
                data.primaryRoleArea = $('#primary-role-area').val();
            }

            var isValid = [];

            if ($('#primary-function-is-modified').val() === '1') {
                Object.assign(data, {
                    primaryRoleCategory: $('#primary-role-category').val(),
                    primaryRoleBranch: $('#primary-role-branch').val(),
                    primaryRoleFunction: $('#primary-role-function').val(),
                    primaryRoleLevel: $('#primary-role-level').val(),
                    primaryRoleArea: $('#primary-role-area').val(),
                });
                isValid.push(validateFunctions('primary'));
            }

            if ($('#secondary-function-is-modified').val() === '1') {
                Object.assign(data, {
                    secondaryRoleCategory: $('#secondary-role-category').val(),
                    secondaryRoleBranch: $('#secondary-role-branch').val(),
                    secondaryRoleFunction: $('#secondary-role-function').val(),
                    secondaryRoleLevel: $('#secondary-role-level').val(),
                    secondaryRoleAnotherRegion: $('#secondary-role-another-region').val(),
                    secondaryRoleAnotherGroup: $('#secondary-role-another-group').val(),
                });

                isValid.push(validateFunctions('secondary'));
            }

            if ($('#tertiary-function-is-modified').val() === '1') {
                Object.assign(data, {
                    tertiaryRoleCategory: $('#tertiary-role-category').val(),
                    tertiaryRoleBranch: $('#tertiary-role-branch').val(),
                    tertiaryRoleFunction: $('#tertiary-role-function').val(),
                    tertiaryRoleLevel: $('#tertiary-role-level').val(),
                    tertiaryRoleAnotherRegion: $('#tertiary-role-another-region').val(),
                    tertiaryRoleAnotherGroup: $('#tertiary-role-another-group').val(),
                });

                isValid.push(validateFunctions('tertiary'));
            }

            // console.log(data);

            if (isValid.includes(false)) {
                $('#functions-footer-container').addClass('d-none');
                return false;
            }

            loading(true);

            $.ajax({
                type: "POST",
                url: "https://paxtu100.escoteiros.org.br/associado/funcoes-uel/editar",
                headers: {
                    'X-CSRF-TOKEN': $('meta[name="csrf-token"]').attr('content')
                },
                data: data,
                success: function(data) {
                    $('#functions-footer-container').addClass('d-none');
                    loading(false);
                    successFeedback();
                },
                error: function(data) {
                    $('#functions-footer-container').addClass('d-none');
                    loading(false);
                    Swal.fire({
                        icon: "error",
                        title: "Oops...",
                        text: data.responseJSON.error || "Ocorreu um erro ao salvar as funções.",

                    });
                    // console.log(data.responseJSON.error);
                }
            });
        };

        function validateFunctions(role) {

            let validationError = [];

            if ($('input[name="secondary-function-outside-group"]:checked').val() === 'S') {

                if ($('#secondary-role-category').val() === '0') {
                    inputErrorFeedback($('#secondary-role-category'));
                    validationError.push(true);
                }

                if ($('#secondary-role-function').val() === '0') {
                    inputErrorFeedback($('#secondary-role-function'));
                    validationError.push(true);
                }

                if ($('#secondary-role-another-region').val() === '') {
                    inputErrorFeedback($('#secondary-role-another-region'));
                    validationError.push(true);
                }

                if ($('#secondary-role-another-group').val() === '') {
                    inputErrorFeedback($('#secondary-role-another-group'));
                    validationError.push(true);
                }
            }

            if ($('input[name="tertiary-function-outside-group"]:checked').val() === 'S') {

                if ($('#tertiary-role-category').val() === '0') {
                    inputErrorFeedback($('#tertiary-role-category'));
                    validationError.push(true);
                }

                if ($('#tertiary-role-function').val() === '0') {
                    inputErrorFeedback($('#tertiary-role-function'));
                    validationError.push(true);
                }

                if ($('#tertiary-role-another-region').val() === '') {
                    inputErrorFeedback($('#tertiary-role-another-region'));
                    validationError.push(true);
                }

                if ($('#tertiary-role-another-group').val() === '') {
                    inputErrorFeedback($('#tertiary-role-another-group'));
                    validationError.push(true);
                }
            }

            if (validationError.includes(true)) {
                return false;
            }

            return true;
        }

        document.addEventListener('DOMContentLoaded', function() {

            const categoryField = document.getElementById('primary-role-category');
            const functionField = document.getElementById('primary-role-function');
            const domainContainer = document.getElementById('primary-role-area-container');

            function toggleDomainField() {

                const category = categoryField.value;
                const funcao = functionField.value;

                if (category == 4 && funcao == 5) {
                    domainContainer.style.display = 'block';
                } else {
                    domainContainer.style.display = 'none';
                }

                const areaSelect = document.getElementById('primary-role-area');
                if (areaSelect && areaSelect.value !== null) {
                    areaSelect.value = String(areaSelect.value);
                }
            }

            categoryField.addEventListener('change', toggleDomainField);
            functionField.addEventListener('change', toggleDomainField);

            toggleDomainField();
        });
    </script>
    <script>
        if (typeof window.errorFeedback !== 'function') {
            window.errorFeedback = function(message = 'Erro ao processar a solicitacao.') {
                if (window.Swal && typeof window.Swal.fire === 'function') {
                    window.Swal.fire({
                        icon: 'error',
                        title: 'Ops!',
                        text: message,
                        confirmButtonColor: '#d33'
                    });
                    return;
                }

                if (window.toastr && typeof window.toastr.error === 'function') {
                    window.toastr.error(message);
                    return;
                }

                console.error(message);
                alert(message);
            };
        }

        function safeErrorFeedback(message) {
            if (typeof errorFeedback === 'function') {
                errorFeedback(message);
                return;
            }

            console.error(message);
            alert(message);
        }

        let retroactiveProgressionSyncExecuted = false;

        function runRetroactiveProgressionSync() {
            if (retroactiveProgressionSyncExecuted) {
                return;
            }

            const associateCode = $('#associate-code').val();
            if (!associateCode) {
                return;
            }

            retroactiveProgressionSyncExecuted = true;

            $.ajax({
                url: "https://paxtu100.escoteiros.org.br/associado/associado/progressoes/sincronizar-retroativo",
                type: 'POST',
                headers: {
                    'X-CSRF-TOKEN': $('meta[name="csrf-token"]').attr('content')
                },
                data: {
                    associate_code: associateCode
                },
                success: function(response) {
                    if (response && response.success && response.updated) {
                        window.location.reload();
                    }
                },
                error: function() {
                    retroactiveProgressionSyncExecuted = false;
                }
            });
        }

        $(document).ready(function() {
            $(document).on('shown.bs.tab', '#progression-certifications-tab', function() {
                runRetroactiveProgressionSync();
            });

            $(document).on('shown.bs.collapse', '#collapseProgressao', function() {
                runRetroactiveProgressionSync();
            });

            if ($('#progression').hasClass('show') && $('#progression').hasClass('active')) {
                runRetroactiveProgressionSync();
            }

            const associateBranch = "2";
            let currentSelectedBranch = associateBranch; // Armazena o ramo atualmente selecionado
            $(`.chip-container.progression[data-branch="${associateBranch}"]`).addClass('chip-active');
            updateCompetencesButton(associateBranch);
            applyProgressionFilterByBranch(associateBranch);

            // =======================
            // FILTROS DE ESPECIALIDADES
            // =======================
            $(document).on('click', '.chip-container.specialty', function() {
                $(this).toggleClass('chip-active');
                let checkbox = $(this).find('.form-check-input');
                let icon = $(this).find('.chip-icon i');

                checkbox.prop('checked', !checkbox.prop('checked'));

                if ($(this).hasClass('chip-active')) {
                    icon.removeClass('bi-plus-circle').addClass('bi-x-circle');
                } else {
                    icon.removeClass('bi-x-circle').addClass('bi-plus-circle');
                }

                applySpecialtyFilters();
            });

            function applySpecialtyFilters() {
                const activeFilters = $('.chip-container.specialty.chip-active')
                    .map(function() {
                        return $(this).find('label').text().trim();
                    }).get();

                const showAll = activeFilters.includes('Todas');

                if (showAll || activeFilters.length === 0) {
                    $('.specialty-card').closest('[data-level]').show();
                    return;
                }

                const selectedLevels = activeFilters
                    .map(label => {
                        const match = label.match(/\d+/);
                        return match ? match[0] : null;
                    })
                    .filter(level => level !== null);

                $('.specialty-card').each(function() {
                    const level = $(this).closest('[data-level]').data('level')?.toString();
                    if (selectedLevels.includes(level)) {
                        $(this).closest('[data-level]').show();
                    } else {
                        $(this).closest('[data-level]').hide();
                    }
                });
            }

            // Aplica o filtro ao carregar a página
            applySpecialtyFilters();


            // =======================
            // FILTROS DE CONQUISTAS
            // =======================
            $(document).on('click', '.chip-container.achievements', function() {
                const clicked = $(this);
                const value = clicked.data('value');
                const icon = clicked.find('.chip-icon i');

                clicked.toggleClass('chip-active');

                if (clicked.hasClass('chip-active')) {
                    icon.removeClass('bi-plus-circle').addClass('bi-x-circle');
                } else {
                    icon.removeClass('bi-x-circle').addClass('bi-plus-circle');
                }

                if (value === 'all') {
                    $('.chip-container.achievements').not(clicked).removeClass('chip-active');
                    $('.chip-container.achievements').not(clicked).find('.chip-icon i').removeClass(
                            'bi-x-circle')
                        .addClass('bi-plus-circle');
                    $('.achievement-card').each(function() {
                        $(this).closest('.p-2').show();
                    });
                } else {
                    $('.chip-container.achievements[data-value="all"]').removeClass('chip-active');
                    $('.chip-container.achievements[data-value="all"]').find('.chip-icon i').removeClass(
                        'bi-x-circle').addClass('bi-plus-circle');

                    const selected = $('.chip-container.achievements.chip-active').map(function() {
                        return $(this).data('value').toString();
                    }).get();

                    if (selected.length === 0) {
                        $('.achievement-card').each(function() {
                            $(this).closest('.p-2').show();
                        });
                    } else {
                        $('.achievement-card').each(function() {
                            const cardBranch = $(this).data('branch')?.toString();
                            const container = $(this).closest('.p-2');

                            if (selected.includes(cardBranch)) {
                                container.show();
                            } else {
                                container.hide();
                            }
                        });
                    }
                }
            });

            function normalizeLanguageToAchievement(language) {
                return `IDIOMA_${language
                    .trim()
                    .normalize('NFD')
                    .replace(/[\u0300-\u036f]/g, '')
                    .replace(/[^a-zA-Z0-9]+/g, '_')
                    .replace(/^_+|_+$/g, '')
                    .toUpperCase()}`;
            }

            function mapBranch(branchCode) {
                const map = {
                    0: 'Todos',
                    1: 'Escoteiro',
                    2: 'Lobinho',
                    3: 'Senior',
                    4: 'Pioneiro',
                    5: 'Escotista'
                };

                const parsed = Number(branchCode);
                return map[parsed] || '-';
            }

            function mapModality(modalityCode) {
                const map = {
                    1: 'Terrestre',
                    2: 'Mar',
                    3: 'Ar'
                };

                const parsed = Number(modalityCode);
                return map[parsed] || '-';
            }

            function mountAchievementListModal() {
                const associateCode = $('#associate-code').val();

                $('#achievement-item-container').html(`
                    <div class="py-4 text-center text-muted">
                        <div class="spinner-border spinner-border-sm me-2" role="status" aria-hidden="true"></div>
                        Carregando conquistas...
                    </div>
                `);

                const achievementModal = new bootstrap.Modal(document.getElementById('achievements-modal'));
                achievementModal.show();

                const listAchievementsUrl =
                    "https://paxtu100.escoteiros.org.br/associado/associado/progressoes/conquistas/lista/__ASSOCIATE__"
                    .replace('__ASSOCIATE__', associateCode);

                $.ajax({
                    url: listAchievementsUrl,
                    type: 'GET',
                    success: function(response) {
                        const rawAchievementsList = response?.achievementsList || [];
                        const rawAssociateAchievements = response?.associateAchievements || [];

                        const achievementsList = Array.isArray(rawAchievementsList) ?
                            rawAchievementsList : Object.values(rawAchievementsList);

                        const associateAchievements = Array.isArray(rawAssociateAchievements) ?
                            rawAssociateAchievements : Object.values(rawAssociateAchievements);

                        const existingAchievements = new Set(associateAchievements.map(item => item
                            .nm_conquista));

                        if (!achievementsList.length) {
                            $('#achievement-item-container').html(
                                '<div class="py-3 text-center text-muted">Nenhuma conquista encontrada.</div>'
                            );
                            return;
                        }

                        const rows = achievementsList.map((achievement) => {
                            const alreadyAdded = existingAchievements.has(achievement
                                .nm_conquista);

                            return `
                                <div class="row mb-1 pt-1 align-items-center achievement-row" data-achievement-name="${achievement.nm_conquista}" data-existing="${alreadyAdded ? '1' : '0'}">
                                    <hr class="my-1">
                                    <div class="col-4">${achievement.ds_conquista}</div>
                                    <div class="col-2">${mapBranch(achievement.cd_ramo)}</div>
                                    <div class="col-2">${mapModality(achievement.cd_modalidade)}</div>
                                    <div class="col-2">
                                        <input type="date" class="form-control achievement-date" ${alreadyAdded ? 'disabled' : ''}>
                                    </div>
                                    <div class="col-1 text-center">
                                        <button class="btn btn-sm ${alreadyAdded ? 'btn-success' : 'btn-paxtu'} save-achievement-item" ${alreadyAdded ? 'disabled' : ''}>
                                            <i class="bi ${alreadyAdded ? 'bi-check-lg' : 'bi-floppy2-fill'}"></i>
                                        </button>
                                    </div>
                                    <div class="col-1 text-center">
                                        <button class="btn btn-sm btn-outline-secondary clear-achievement-date-input" ${alreadyAdded ? 'disabled' : ''}>
                                            <i class="bi bi-trash"></i>
                                        </button>
                                    </div>
                                </div>
                            `;
                        }).join('');

                        $('#achievement-item-container').html(rows);
                    },
                    error: function() {
                        $('#achievement-item-container').html(
                            '<div class="py-3 text-center text-danger">Erro ao carregar conquistas.</div>'
                        );
                    }
                });
            }

            $(document).on('click', '#new-achievement', function() {
                mountAchievementListModal();
            });

            $(document).on('click', '.save-achievement-item', function(e) {
                e.preventDefault();

                const button = $(this);
                const row = button.closest('.achievement-row');

                if (row.data('existing') === 1 || row.data('existing') === '1') {
                    return;
                }

                const achievementDate = row.find('.achievement-date').val();

                if (!achievementDate) {
                    safeErrorFeedback('Informe uma data para salvar a conquista.');
                    return;
                }

                loading(true);

                $.ajax({
                    url: "https://paxtu100.escoteiros.org.br/associado/associado/progressoes/conquistas/nova",
                    type: 'POST',
                    headers: {
                        'X-CSRF-TOKEN': $('meta[name="csrf-token"]').attr('content')
                    },
                    data: {
                        associateCode: $('#associate-code').val(),
                        scouterCode: $('#scouter-code').val(),
                        achievementName: row.data('achievement-name'),
                        achievementDate: achievementDate
                    },
                    success: function() {
                        loading(false);

                        row.attr('data-existing', '1');
                        row.data('existing', 1);

                        row.find('.achievement-date').prop('disabled', true);
                        row.find('.clear-achievement-date-input').prop('disabled', true);

                        button.removeClass('btn-paxtu').addClass('btn-success').prop('disabled',
                                true)
                            .html('<i class="bi bi-check-lg"></i>');

                        successFeedback('Conquista salva com sucesso!');
                    },
                    error: function() {
                        loading(false);
                        safeErrorFeedback('Erro ao salvar conquista.');
                    }
                });
            });

            $(document).on('click', '.clear-achievement-date-input', function(e) {
                e.preventDefault();
                $(this).closest('.achievement-row').find('.achievement-date').val('');
            });

            const languageAchievementMap = {
                alemao: 'IDIOMA_ALEMÃO',
                arabe: 'IDIOMA_ARABE',
                coreano: 'IDIOMA_COREANO',
                creole: 'IDIOMA_CRÉOLE',
                dinamarques: 'IDIOMA_DINAMARQUÊS',
                espanhol: 'IDIOMA_ESPANHOL',
                esperanto: 'IDIOMA_ESPERANTO',
                frances: 'IDIOMA_FRANCES',
                grego: 'IDIOMA_GREGO',
                guarani: 'IDIOMA_GUARANI',
                hebraico: 'IDIOMA_HEBRAICO',
                hindi: 'IDIOMA_HINDI',
                holandes: 'IDIOMA_HOLANDÊS',
                indonesio: 'IDIOMA_INDONÉSIO',
                ingles: 'IDIOMA_INGLES',
                ioruba: 'IDIOMA_IORUBÁ',
                italiano: 'IDIOMA_ITALIANO',
                japones: 'IDIOMA_JAPONÊS',
                mandarim: 'IDIOMA_MANDARIM',
                polones: 'IDIOMA_POLONÊS',
                russo: 'IDIOMA_RUSSO',
                suaili: 'IDIOMA_SUAÍLI',
                tailandes: 'IDIOMA_TAILANDÊS',
                turco: 'IDIOMA_TURCO',
                ucraniano: 'IDIOMA_UCRANIANO'
            };

            $(document).on('click', '#new-language-achievement', function() {
                $('#languages').val('');
                $('#achievement-language-date').val('');
                $('#other-language-description').val('');
                $('#other-language-description-container').hide();

                const languageModal = new bootstrap.Modal(document.getElementById(
                    'achievements-language-modal'));
                languageModal.show();
            });

            $(document).on('change', '#languages', function() {
                if ($(this).val() === 'outro') {
                    $('#other-language-description-container').show();
                    return;
                }

                $('#other-language-description-container').hide();
                $('#other-language-description').val('');
            });

            $(document).on('click', '#save-achievement-language', function() {
                const language = $('#languages').val();
                const languageDate = $('#achievement-language-date').val();
                const customLanguage = $('#other-language-description').val().trim();

                if (!language) {
                    safeErrorFeedback('Selecione um idioma.');
                    return;
                }

                if (!languageDate) {
                    safeErrorFeedback('Informe a data da conquista do idioma.');
                    return;
                }

                if (language === 'outro' && !customLanguage) {
                    safeErrorFeedback('Informe a descrição do idioma.');
                    return;
                }

                const achievementName = language === 'outro' ? normalizeLanguageToAchievement(
                        customLanguage) :
                    languageAchievementMap[language];

                if (!achievementName) {
                    safeErrorFeedback('Idioma invalido.');
                    return;
                }

                loading(true);

                $.ajax({
                    url: "https://paxtu100.escoteiros.org.br/associado/associado/progressoes/conquistas/nova",
                    type: 'POST',
                    headers: {
                        'X-CSRF-TOKEN': $('meta[name="csrf-token"]').attr('content')
                    },
                    data: {
                        associateCode: $('#associate-code').val(),
                        scouterCode: $('#scouter-code').val(),
                        achievementName: achievementName,
                        achievementDate: languageDate
                    },
                    success: function() {
                        loading(false);
                        successFeedback('Conquista de idioma salva com sucesso!');

                        const languageModalEl = document.getElementById(
                            'achievements-language-modal');
                        const languageModal = bootstrap.Modal.getInstance(languageModalEl);

                        if (languageModal) {
                            languageModal.hide();
                        }

                        window.location.reload();
                    },
                    error: function() {
                        loading(false);
                        safeErrorFeedback('Erro ao salvar conquista de idioma.');
                    }
                });
            });


            // =======================
            // FILTROS DE PROGRESSÃO
            // =======================
            $(document).on('click', '.chip-container.progression', function() {
                const clicked = $(this);
                const value = clicked.data('branch')?.toString();

                clicked.toggleClass('chip-active');

                if (value === 'all') {
                    $('.chip-container.progression').not(clicked).removeClass('chip-active');
                    $('.progression-card').each(function() {
                        $(this).closest('.p-2').show();
                    });
                    currentSelectedBranch = 'all';
                } else {
                    $('.chip-container.progression[data-branch="all"]').removeClass('chip-active');

                    const selected = $('.chip-container.progression.chip-active').map(function() {
                        return $(this).data('branch')?.toString();
                    }).get();

                    if (selected.length === 0) {
                        applyProgressionFilterByBranch(associateBranch);
                        $(`.chip-container.progression[data-branch="${associateBranch}"]`).addClass(
                            'chip-active');
                        currentSelectedBranch = associateBranch;
                    } else if (selected.length === 1) {
                        currentSelectedBranch = selected[0];
                        applyProgressionFilterByBranches(selected);
                    } else {
                        currentSelectedBranch = 'multiple';
                        applyProgressionFilterByBranches(selected);
                    }
                }

                updateCompetencesButton(currentSelectedBranch);

                //updateProgressionProgress();
            });

            // Evento de clique no botão de competências
            $(document).on('click', '#competences-button', function() {
                const associateCode = $('#associate-code').val();

                // Determinar qual ramo usar para a requisição
                let branchForRequest = currentSelectedBranch;

                // Se múltiplos ramos estão selecionados ou "all", usar o ramo do associado como fallback
                if (currentSelectedBranch === 'multiple' || currentSelectedBranch === 'all') {
                    branchForRequest = associateBranch;
                }

                // Fazer a requisição AJAX


                loading(true);

                $.ajax({
                    url: "https://paxtu100.escoteiros.org.br/associado/associado/progressoes/competences/show",
                    type: 'GET',
                    data: {
                        associate_code: associateCode,
                        branch: branchForRequest
                    },
                    success: function(response) {
                        loading(false);
                        // Aqui você pode abrir um modal ou atualizar uma seção com as competências
                        showCompetencesModal(response, branchForRequest);
                    },
                    error: function(xhr, status, error) {
                        loading(false);
                        console.error('Erro ao carregar competências:', error);
                        safeErrorFeedback('Erro ao carregar competências');
                    }
                });

            });

            // Função para aplicar filtro baseado em múltiplos ramos
            function applyProgressionFilterByBranches(branches) {
                $('.progression-card').each(function() {
                    const cardBranch = $(this).data('branch')?.toString();
                    const container = $(this).closest('.p-2');

                    if (branches.includes(cardBranch)) {
                        container.show();
                    } else {
                        container.hide();
                    }
                });
            }

            // Função para aplicar filtro baseado em um único ramo
            function applyProgressionFilterByBranch(branch) {
                $('.progression-card').each(function() {
                    const cardBranch = $(this).data('branch')?.toString();
                    const container = $(this).closest('.p-2');

                    if (cardBranch === branch) {
                        container.show();
                    } else {
                        container.hide();
                    }
                });
            }

            // Função para atualizar a barra de progresso
            function updateProgressionProgress() {
                const visibleCards = $('.progression-card').filter(function() {
                    return $(this).closest('.p-2').is(':visible');
                });

                const total = visibleCards.length;
                const completed = visibleCards.filter(function() {
                    return !$(this).hasClass('opacity-50');
                }).length;

                const percent = total > 0 ? Math.round((completed / total) * 100) : 0;

                // Atualiza badge
                $('#progression-count').text(completed + '/' + total + ' (' + percent + '%)');

                // Atualiza barra
                const progressBar = $('#progression-bar');
                progressBar.css('width', percent + '%');
                progressBar.attr('aria-valuenow', percent);
                progressBar.text(percent + '%');
            }

            // Função para atualizar o texto do botão de competências
            function updateCompetencesButton(branch) {
                const button = $('#competences-button');
                const branchNames = {
                    '1': 'Escoteiro',
                    '2': 'Lobinho',
                    '3': 'Sênior',
                    '4': 'Pioneiro',
                    '5': 'Escotista',
                    'all': 'Todos os Ramos',
                    'multiple': 'Ramos Selecionados'
                };

                const branchName = branchNames[branch] || 'Competências';
                button.html(`Competências - ${branchName} <i class="bi bi-list-check"></i>`);
            }

            // Função para mostrar modal de competências (exemplo)
            function showCompetencesModal(competencesData, branch) {
                const branchNames = {
                    '1': 'Escoteiro',
                    '2': 'Lobinho',
                    '3': 'Sênior',
                    '4': 'Pioneiro',
                    '5': 'Escotista'
                };

                const associateBranch = "2";

                // Agrupar competências por caminho
                const competencesByPath = {};
                competencesData.forEach(competence => {
                    if (!competencesByPath[competence.caminho]) {
                        competencesByPath[competence.caminho] = [];
                    }
                    competencesByPath[competence.caminho].push(competence);
                });

                const modalHtml = `
                    <div class="modal fade" id="competencesModal" tabindex="-1" aria-labelledby="competencesModalLabel" aria-hidden="true">
                        <div class="modal-dialog modal-xl">
                            <div class="modal-content">
                                <div class="modal-header" style="background-color: var(--paxtu-menu)">
                                    <h5 class="modal-title" id="competencesModalLabel">
                                        Competências - ${branchNames[branch] || 'Ramo Selecionado'}
                                        ${associateBranch === branch ? '<span class="badge bg-success ms-2">Editável</span>' : ''}
                                    </h5>
                                    <button type="button" class="btn-close" data-bs-dismiss="modal" aria-label="Close"></button>
                                </div>
                                <div class="modal-body">
                                    <div class="alert alert-info">
                                        <i class="bi bi-info-circle"></i>
                                        ${associateBranch === branch
                                            ? 'Você pode editar as datas das atividades pois está no mesmo ramo da competência.'
                                            : 'As datas não podem ser editadas pois você não está no mesmo ramo desta competência.'}
                                    </div>

                                    <!-- Accordion para Caminhos -->
                                    <div class="accordion" id="pathsAccordion">
                                        ${Object.entries(competencesByPath).map(([caminho, competences], index) => `
                                                                                                    <div class="accordion-item">
                                                                                                        <h2 class="accordion-header" id="headingPath${index}">
                                                                                                            <button class="accordion-button ${index === 0 ? '' : 'collapsed'}"
                                                                                                                    type="button"
                                                                                                                    data-bs-toggle="collapse"
                                                                                                                    data-bs-target="#collapsePath${index}"
                                                                                                                    aria-expanded="${index === 0 ? 'true' : 'false'}"
                                                                                                                    aria-controls="collapsePath${index}">
                                                                                                                <h3>${caminho}</h3>
                                                                                                                <span class="badge bg-paxtu ms-2">${competences.length} competência(s)</span>
                                                                                                            </button>
                                                                                                        </h2>
                                                                                                        <div id="collapsePath${index}"
                                                                                                             class="accordion-collapse collapse ${index === 0 ? 'show' : ''}"
                                                                                                             aria-labelledby="headingPath${index}"
                                                                                                             data-bs-parent="#pathsAccordion">
                                                                                                            <div class="accordion-body p-0">
                                                                                                                <!-- Accordion para Competências dentro do Caminho -->
                                                                                                                <div class="accordion" id="competencesAccordion${index}">
                                                                                                                    ${competences.map((competence, compIndex) => `
                                                                <div class="accordion-item">
                                                                    <h2 class="accordion-header" id="headingCompetence${index}_${compIndex}">
                                                                        <button class="accordion-button collapsed"
                                                                                type="button"
                                                                                data-bs-toggle="collapse"
                                                                                data-bs-target="#collapseCompetence${index}_${compIndex}"
                                                                                aria-expanded="false"
                                                                                aria-controls="collapseCompetence${index}_${compIndex}">
                                                                            <div class="d-flex justify-content-between align-items-center w-100">
                                                                                <div>
                                                                                    <span class="fw-bold">${competence.nome}</span>
                                                                                </div>
                                                                                <div class="text-muted small">
                                                                                    ${competence.data_conclusao ? formatDate(competence.data_conclusao) : '<span style="color:red">Sem data</span>'}
                                                                                </div>
                                                                            </div>
                                                                        </button>
                                                                    </h2>
                                                                    <div id="collapseCompetence${index}_${compIndex}"
                                                                         class="accordion-collapse collapse"
                                                                         aria-labelledby="headingCompetence${index}_${compIndex}"
                                                                         data-bs-parent="#competencesAccordion${index}">
                                                                        <div class="accordion-body">
                                                                            <div class="table-responsive">
                                                                                <table class="table table-sm table-hover">
                                                                                    <thead>
                                                                                        <tr>
                                                                                            <th style="width: 70%">Descrição da Atividade</th>
                                                                                            <th style="width: 15%">Status</th>
                                                                                            <th style="width: 15%">Data Conclusão</th>
                                                                                        </tr>
                                                                                    </thead>
                                                                                    <tbody id="activities-body-${competence.id}">
                                                                                        <tr>
                                                                                            <td colspan="4" class="text-center">
                                                                                                <div class="spinner-border spinner-border-sm" role="status">
                                                                                                    <span class="visually-hidden">Carregando...</span>
                                                                                                </div>
                                                                                                Carregando atividades...
                                                                                            </td>
                                                                                        </tr>
                                                                                    </tbody>
                                                                                </table>
                                                                            </div>
                                                                        </div>
                                                                    </div>
                                                                </div>
                                                            `).join('')}
                                                                                                                </div>
                                                                                                            </div>
                                                                                                        </div>
                                                                                                    </div>
                                                                                                `).join('')}
                                    </div>
                                </div>
                                <div class="modal-footer">
                                    <button type="button" class="btn btn-secondary" data-bs-dismiss="modal">Fechar</button>
                                </div>
                            </div>
                        </div>
                    </div>
                `;

                // Remove modal existente se houver
                $('#competencesModal').remove();

                // Adiciona o novo modal
                $('body').append(modalHtml);

                // Mostra o modal
                const modal = new bootstrap.Modal(document.getElementById('competencesModal'));
                modal.show();

                // Adiciona event listeners para carregar atividades quando uma competência for expandida
                setupCompetenceEventListeners();
            }


            // Configura os event listeners para as competências
            function setupCompetenceEventListeners() {
                // Quando uma competência é expandida, carrega as atividades
                $(document).on('show.bs.collapse', function(e) {
                    const target = $(e.target);

                    // Verifica se é um collapse de competência (contém activities-body-)
                    if (target.attr('id') && target.attr('id').includes('collapseCompetence')) {
                        const activitiesBody = target.find('tbody[id^="activities-body-"]');
                        if (activitiesBody.length > 0) {
                            const competenceId = activitiesBody.attr('id').replace('activities-body-', '');
                            loadCompetenceActivities(competenceId);
                        }
                    }
                });
            }

            // Função para carregar as atividades de uma competência
            function loadCompetenceActivities(competenceId) {
                const associateCode = $('#associate-code').val();
                const currentBranch = "2"; // Ramo atual do associado
                const activitiesBody = $(`#activities-body-${competenceId}`);

                // Mostra loading
                activitiesBody.html(`
                    <tr>
                        <td colspan="4" class="text-center">
                            <div class="spinner-border spinner-border-sm" role="status">
                                <span class="visually-hidden">Carregando...</span>
                            </div>
                            Carregando atividades...
                        </td>
                    </tr>
                `);

                $.ajax({
                    url: "https://paxtu100.escoteiros.org.br/associado/associado/progressoes/competences/activities",
                    type: 'GET',
                    data: {
                        associate_code: associateCode,
                        competence_id: competenceId
                    },
                    success: function(response) {
                        if (response.activities && response.activities.length > 0) {
                            const isEditable = String(currentBranch) === String(response
                                .branch); // Verifica se é editável
                            console.log(isEditable);
                            const activitiesHtml = response.activities.map(activity => {
                                const isCompleted = activity.concluida;
                                const inputDateValue = toInputDateValue(activity
                                    .data_conclusao);
                                const formattedDate = activity.data_conclusao ? formatDate(
                                    activity.data_conclusao) : '-';

                                // Se for editável, mostra input de data, senão mostra texto
                                const dateCell = isEditable ?
                                    `
                                        <div class="d-flex align-items-center">
                                            <input type="date"
                                                   class="form-control form-control-sm activity-date-input"
                                                   value="${inputDateValue}"
                                                   data-activity-id="${activity.id}"
                                                   data-competence-id="${competenceId}"
                                                   style="max-width: 150px;">
                                            ${inputDateValue ? `
                                                                            <button class="btn btn-sm btn-outline-danger ms-2 clear-activity-date"
                                                                                    data-activity-id="${activity.id}"
                                                                                    title="Limpar data">
                                                                                <i class="bi bi-x-circle"></i>
                                                                            </button>
                                                                        ` : ''}
                                        </div>
                                    ` :
                                    `
                                        <span class="${isCompleted ? 'text-success fw-bold' : 'text-muted'}">
                                            ${formattedDate}
                                        </span>
                                    `;

                                return `
                                    <tr class="${isCompleted ? 'table-success' : ''}">
                                        <td>${activity.descricao}</td>
                                        <td>
                                            <span class="badge ${isCompleted ? 'bg-success' : 'bg-secondary'}">
                                                ${isCompleted ? 'Concluída' : 'Pendente'}
                                            </span>
                                        </td>
                                        <td>
                                            ${dateCell}
                                        </td>
                                    </tr>
                                `;
                            }).join('');

                            activitiesBody.html(activitiesHtml);

                            // Adiciona botão de salvar se for editável
                            if (isEditable) {
                                /*activitiesBody.after(`
                                <tr>
                                    <td colspan="4" class="text-end bg-light">
                                        <button class="btn btn-sm btn-paxtu save-all-activities"
                                                data-competence-id="${competenceId}">
                                            <i class="bi bi-floppy-fill"></i> Salvar Todas as Alterações
                                        </button>
                                    </td>
                                </tr>
                            `);*/
                            }
                        } else {
                            activitiesBody.html(`
                                <tr>
                                    <td colspan="4" class="text-center text-muted">
                                        Nenhuma atividade encontrada para esta competência.
                                    </td>
                                </tr>
                            `);
                        }
                    },
                    error: function(xhr, status, error) {
                        console.error('Erro ao carregar atividades:', error);
                        activitiesBody.html(`
                            <tr>
                                <td colspan="4" class="text-center text-danger">
                                    <i class="bi bi-exclamation-triangle"></i>
                                    Erro ao carregar atividades.
                                </td>
                            </tr>
                        `);
                    }
                });
            }

            window.loadCompetenceActivities = loadCompetenceActivities;

            // Função para formatar data (se já não existir)
            function formatDate(dateString) {
                if (!dateString) return '-';
                const date = new Date(dateString);
                return date.toLocaleDateString('pt-BR');
            }

            // Normaliza datas vindas do backend para o formato aceito pelo input type="date".
            function toInputDateValue(dateString) {
                if (!dateString) {
                    return '';
                }

                const value = String(dateString).trim();

                // Ja esta em YYYY-MM-DD ou YYYY-MM-DD HH:MM:SS.
                const isoMatch = value.match(/^(\d{4})-(\d{2})-(\d{2})/);
                if (isoMatch) {
                    return `${isoMatch[1]}-${isoMatch[2]}-${isoMatch[3]}`;
                }

                // Fallback para DD/MM/YYYY.
                const brMatch = value.match(/^(\d{2})\/(\d{2})\/(\d{4})/);
                if (brMatch) {
                    return `${brMatch[3]}-${brMatch[2]}-${brMatch[1]}`;
                }

                return '';
            }


            $(document).on('click', '.new-specialty', function() {
                let specialtyCode = $(this).data('specialty');
                let associateCode = $('#associate-code').val();

                $.ajax({
                    url: "https://paxtu100.escoteiros.org.br/associado/associado/progressoes/especialidades/" +
                        specialtyCode + '/' + associateCode,
                    method: 'GET',
                    success: function(response) {
                        const specialty = response; // esse é o objeto retornado no console.log
                        const modalId = `specialtyModal-${specialty.cd_especialidade}`;

                        let modalHtml = `
                            <div class="modal fade" id="${modalId}" tabindex="-1"
                                aria-labelledby="specialtyModalLabel-${specialty.cd_especialidade}" aria-hidden="true">
                                <div class="modal-dialog modal-xl">
                                    <div class="modal-content">
                                        <div class="modal-header" style="background-color: var(--paxtu-menu)">
                                            <h1 class="modal-title fs-5" id="specialtyModalLabel-${specialty.cd_especialidade}">
                                                ${specialty.ds_especialidade}
                                            </h1>
                                            <button type="button" class="d-flex align-items-center justify-content-center" data-bs-dismiss="modal" aria-label="Close" style="background: #f8f8f8; border-radius: 50%; height: 24px; width: 24px; margin: 0 0 auto 0;">
    <img src="/img/icons/close.svg" alt="Fechar modal">
</button>                                        </div>

                                        <div class="modal-body scrollable-big">
                                            <div class="row mb-1">
                                                <div class="col-2 fw-bold">Item</div>
                                                <div class="col-6 fw-bold">Descrição do Item</div>
                                                <div class="col-2 fw-bold">Data</div>
                                                <div class="col-1 fw-bold text-center">Salvar</div>
                                                <div class="col-1 fw-bold text-center">Limpar</div>
                                            </div>
                        `;

                        Object.values(specialty.itens).forEach(item => {
                            const dt_item = item.dt_item ? new Date(item.dt_item)
                                .toISOString().split('T')[0] : '';
                            modalHtml += `
                                <div class="row mb-1 pt-1 align-items-center">
                                    <input type="hidden" name="specialty-level" value="${specialty.nr_nivel ?? ''}">
                                    <hr class="my-1">
                                    <div class="col-2">${item.cd_item}</div>
                                    <div class="col-6">${item.ds_item}</div>
                                    <div class="col-2">
                                        <input type="date" class="form-control" value="${dt_item}">
                                    </div>
                                    <div class="col-1 text-center">
                                        <button class="btn btn-sm save-item-specialty-date" style="color: var(--paxtu-dark)">
                                            <i class="bi bi-floppy2-fill"></i>
                                        </button>
                                    </div>
                                    <div class="col-1 text-center">
                                        <button class="btn btn-sm clear-date-input" style="color: var(--paxtu-orange)">
                                            <i class="bi bi-trash"></i>
                                        </button>
                                    </div>
                                </div>
                            `;
                        });

                        modalHtml += `
                                        </div>
                                        <div class="modal-footer">
                                            <button type="button" class="btn btn-close-modal" data-bs-dismiss="modal">Fechar</button>
                                        </div>
                                    </div>
                                </div>
                            </div>
                        `;

                        // Remove se já existir esse modal (evita duplicar)
                        $(`#${modalId}`).remove();

                        // Adiciona o modal ao body
                        $('body').append(modalHtml);

                        // Exibe o modal
                        const modal = new bootstrap.Modal(document.getElementById(modalId));
                        modal.show();

                    },
                    error: function(xhr, status, error) {
                        console.error('Erro:', error);
                    }
                });
            });

        });

        // Event listener para salvar data de atividade individual (quando input perde foco)
        $(document).on('change', '.activity-date-input', function() {
            const activityId = $(this).data('activity-id');
            const newDate = $(this).val();
            const associateCode = $('#associate-code').val();

            saveActivityDate(activityId, newDate, associateCode);
        });

        // Event listener para salvar todas as alterações
        $(document).on('click', '.save-all-activities', function() {
            const competenceId = $(this).data('competence-id');
            const activitiesContainer = $(`#activities-body-${competenceId}`);
            const associateCode = $('#associate-code').val();

            const activitiesToSave = [];
            let hasChanges = false;

            // Coleta todas as atividades com datas alteradas
            activitiesContainer.find('.activity-date-input').each(function() {
                const activityId = $(this).data('activity-id');
                const newDate = $(this).val();
                const originalDate = $(this).data('original-date') || '';

                if (newDate !== originalDate) {
                    activitiesToSave.push({
                        activity_id: activityId,
                        date: newDate
                    });
                    hasChanges = true;
                }
            });

            if (!hasChanges) {
                infoFeedback('Nenhuma alteração para salvar.');
                return;
            }

            loading(true);

            $.ajax({
                url: "https://paxtu100.escoteiros.org.br/associado/associado/progressoes/competences/save-all",
                type: 'POST',
                headers: {
                    'X-CSRF-TOKEN': $('meta[name="csrf-token"]').attr('content')
                },
                data: {
                    associate_code: associateCode,
                    activities: activitiesToSave
                },
                success: function(response) {
                    loading(false);

                    if (!response.success) {
                        safeErrorFeedback(response.message || 'Erro ao salvar alterações');
                        return;
                    }

                    successFeedback('Todas as alterações salvas com sucesso!');

                    // Atualiza as datas originais
                    activitiesContainer.find('.activity-date-input').each(function() {
                        const currentDate = $(this).val();
                        $(this).data('original-date', currentDate);
                    });

                    // Recarrega as atividades para atualizar os status
                    if (typeof window.loadCompetenceActivities === 'function') {
                        window.loadCompetenceActivities(competenceId);
                    }
                },
                error: function(xhr, status, error) {
                    loading(false);
                    safeErrorFeedback('Erro ao salvar alterações');
                }
            });
        });

        // Função para salvar data individual da atividade
        function saveActivityDate(activityId, date, associateCode) {
            loading(true);

            $.ajax({
                url: "https://paxtu100.escoteiros.org.br/associado/associado/progressoes/competences/save-date",
                type: 'POST',
                headers: {
                    'X-CSRF-TOKEN': $('meta[name="csrf-token"]').attr('content')
                },
                data: {
                    associate_code: associateCode,
                    activity_id: activityId,
                    date: date
                },
                success: function(response) {
                    loading(false);

                    if (!response.success) {
                        safeErrorFeedback(response.message || 'Erro ao salvar data');
                        return;
                    }

                    successFeedback('Data salva com sucesso!');

                    // Atualiza a data original no input
                    $(`.activity-date-input[data-activity-id="${activityId}"]`)
                        .data('original-date', date);

                    // Recarrega as atividades para atualizar os status
                    const competenceId = $(`.activity-date-input[data-activity-id="${activityId}"]`)
                        .first()
                        .data('competence-id');

                    if (competenceId && typeof window.loadCompetenceActivities === 'function') {
                        window.loadCompetenceActivities(competenceId);
                    }
                },
                error: function(xhr, status, error) {
                    loading(false);
                    safeErrorFeedback('Erro ao salvar data');
                }
            });
        }

        // Event listener para limpar data de atividade
        $(document).on('click', '.clear-activity-date', function() {
            const activityId = $(this).data('activity-id');
            const associateCode = $('#associate-code').val();

            if (confirm('Deseja realmente limpar a data de conclusão desta atividade?')) {
                // Limpa o input visualmente
                $(`.activity-date-input[data-activity-id="${activityId}"]`).val('');

                // Salva a alteração
                saveActivityDate(activityId, '', associateCode);
            }
        });

        // salvar a data do item das especialidades
        $(document).on('click', '.save-item-specialty-date', function(e) {
            e.preventDefault();

            // pegar a data do input, código do item, código do associado, cd da especialidade
            let associateCode = $('#associate-code').val();
            let scouterCode = $('#scouter-code').val();
            let itemDate = $(this).closest('.row').find('input[type="date"]').val();
            let modalId = $(this).closest('.modal').attr('id');
            let specialtyCode = modalId.split('-')[1];
            let itemCode = $(this).closest('.row').find('.col-2').first().text();

            let items = $(this).closest('.modal').find('.modal-body .row.mb-1.pt-1.align-items-center');
            let itemsCount = items.length;
            let completedItems = 0;

            let beforeUpdateSpecialtyLevel = $(this).closest('.modal').find(
                'input[name="specialty-level"]').val();

            // contar a quantidade de itens totais e quantos foram concluídos pelo associado
            items.each(function() {
                let dataValue = $(this).find('input[type="date"]').val();
                if (dataValue) {
                    completedItems++;
                }
            });

            // calcular nível com base nos itens completados / itens totais
            let progressionItemsRatio = completedItems / itemsCount;
            let specialtyLevel;

            if (progressionItemsRatio == 1) {
                specialtyLevel = 3;
            } else if (progressionItemsRatio >= 0.66) {
                specialtyLevel = 2;
            } else if (progressionItemsRatio >= 0.33) {
                specialtyLevel = 1;
            } else {
                specialtyLevel = null;
            }

            let levelDate = null;

            // tirar o horario do datetime
            if (beforeUpdateSpecialtyLevel != specialtyLevel && specialtyLevel != null) {
                levelDate = new Date().toISOString().split('T')[0];
            }


            let url = "https://paxtu100.escoteiros.org.br/associado/associado/progressoes/especialidade/salvar";

            loading(true);

            $.ajax({
                url: url,
                type: 'POST',
                headers: {
                    'X-CSRF-TOKEN': $('meta[name="csrf-token"]').attr('content')
                },
                data: {
