                    associateCode: associateCode,
                    scouterCode: scouterCode,
                    itemDate: itemDate,
                    itemCode: itemCode,
                    specialtyCode: specialtyCode,
                    specialtyLevel: specialtyLevel,
                    levelDate: levelDate
                },
                success: function(data) {
                    loading(false);
                    successFeedback();

                    if (!specialtyLevel) {
                        return;
                    }

                    // atualizar dados de um card ja existente
                    let cardSelector =
                        `a[data-bs-target="#specialtyModal-${specialtyCode}"]`;

                    if ($(cardSelector).length) {
                        $(cardSelector).find('.specialty-level').text(
                            `Nível: ${specialtyLevel}`);

                        if (levelDate) {
                            let date = new Date(levelDate).toISOString();

                            // formatar data
                            let [year, month, day] = date.split('T')[0].split('-');
                            let formattedLevelDate = `${day}/${month}/${year}`;

                            $(cardSelector).find('.specialty-date').text(
                                formattedLevelDate);
                        }
                    } else {
                        // formatar data
                        let formattedLevelDate = levelDate ? formatDate(levelDate) : '-';
                        // console.log(formattedLevelDate);

                        let newCard = `
                        <div class="col-12 col-md-3 col-lg-3 p-2" data-level="${specialtyLevel ?? '0'}" data-specialty-id="${specialtyCode}">
                            <div class="card-body d-flex align-items-center specialty-card px-2 py-3">
                                <img src="" style="transform: scale(0.6); width: 60px; height: auto;"
                                    class="me-3 ms-1 text-center">
                                <div class="d-block m-auto text-center">
                                    <p class="h6 mb-2 fw-bold">${specialtyDescription ?? ''}</p>
                                    <p class="h6"><span class="mini-circle level-${specialtyLevel ?? '0'} me-2"></span>Nível: ${specialtyLevel ?? '0'}</p>
                                    <p class="h6">${(formattedLevelDate === null ? '-' : formattedLevelDate)}}</p>
                                </div>
                            </div>
                        </div>
                            `;

                        $('#specialties-row').append(newCard);

                    }
                },
                error: function(data) {
                    // console.log(data.error);
                    loading(false);
                }
            });
        });

        //editar especialidades
        $(document).on('click', '.specialty-card', function() {
            //trazer datas das especialidades
            let specialtyCode = $(this).data('specialty-id');
            let associateCode = $('#associate-code').val();

            $.ajax({
                url: "https://paxtu100.escoteiros.org.br/associado/associado/progressoes/especialidades/" +
                    specialtyCode + '/' + associateCode,
                method: 'GET',
                success: function(response) {
                    console.log(response);
                    const specialty = response; // esse é o objeto retornado no console.log
                    const modalId = `specialtyModal-${specialty.cd_especialidade}`;

                    let modalHtml = `
                            <div class="modal fade" id="${modalId}" tabindex="-1"
                                aria-labelledby="specialtyModalLabel-${specialty.cd_especialidade}" aria-hidden="true">
                                <div class="modal-dialog modal-xl">
                                    <div class="modal-content">
                                        <div class="modal-header" style="background-color: var(--paxtu-menu)">
                                            <h1 class="modal-title fs-5" id="specialtyModalLabel-${specialty.cd_especialidade}">
                                                ${specialty.ds_especialidade}
                                            </h1>
                                            <button type="button" class="d-flex align-items-center justify-content-center" data-bs-dismiss="modal" aria-label="Close" style="background: #f8f8f8; border-radius: 50%; height: 24px; width: 24px; margin: 0 0 auto 0;">
    <img src="/img/icons/close.svg" alt="Fechar modal">
</button>                                        </div>

                                        <div class="modal-body scrollable-big">
                                            <div class="row mb-1">
                                                <div class="col-2 fw-bold">Item</div>
                                                <div class="col-6 fw-bold">Descrição do Item</div>
                                                <div class="col-2 fw-bold">Data</div>
                                                <div class="col-1 fw-bold text-center">Salvar</div>
                                                <div class="col-1 fw-bold text-center">Limpar</div>
                                            </div>
                        `;

                    Object.values(specialty.itens).forEach(item => {
                        const dt_item = item.dt_item ? new Date(item.dt_item)
                            .toISOString().split('T')[0] : '';
                        modalHtml += `
                                <div class="row mb-1 pt-1 align-items-center">
                                    <input type="hidden" name="specialty-level" value="${specialty.nr_nivel ?? ''}">
                                    <hr class="my-1">
                                    <div class="col-2">${item.cd_item}</div>
                                    <div class="col-6">${item.ds_item}</div>
                                    <div class="col-2">
                                        <input type="date" class="form-control" value="${dt_item}">
                                    </div>
                                    <div class="col-1 text-center">
                                        <button class="btn btn-sm save-item-specialty-date" style="color: var(--paxtu-dark)">
                                            <i class="bi bi-floppy2-fill"></i>
                                        </button>
                                    </div>
                                    <div class="col-1 text-center">
                                        <button class="btn btn-sm clear-date-input" style="color: var(--paxtu-orange)">
                                            <i class="bi bi-trash"></i>
                                        </button>
                                    </div>
                                </div>
                            `;
                    });

                    modalHtml += `
                                        </div>
                                        <div class="modal-footer">
                                            <button type="button" class="btn btn-close-modal" data-bs-dismiss="modal">Fechar</button>
                                        </div>
                                    </div>
                                </div>
                            </div>
                        `;

                    // Remove se já existir esse modal (evita duplicar)
                    $(`#${modalId}`).remove();

                    // Adiciona o modal ao body
                    $('body').append(modalHtml);

                    // Exibe o modal
                    const modal = new bootstrap.Modal(document.getElementById(modalId));
                    modal.show();



                },
                error: function(xhr, status, error) {
                    console.error('Erro:', error);
                }
            });
        });
    </script>

&quot;,&quot;cd_tipo_responsavel&quot;:null,&quot;fl_estrangeiro&quot;:&quot;N&quot;,&quot;fl_direitos_imagem&quot;:1,&quot;ds_area_atuacao&quot;:&quot;INFORM\u00c1TICA             var advisorName = "Massimo Caroselli";
            var advisorRegistrationNumber = "1287201";
            var advisorRegistrationDigit = "6";
            var advisorBranch = "2";
            var advisorCategory = "5";

            if (advisor.length > 0) {
                $('#advisor_name').text(advisorName);
                $('#advisor_registration_number').text(concatRegistrationNumberWithDigit(advisorRegistrationNumber,
                    advisorRegistrationDigit));
                $('#advisor_branch').text(translateBranch(advisorBranch));
                $('#advisor_category').text(translateCategory(advisorCategory));
                $('#advisor_remove').html(`
                <a href="#" style="background: none; border: none; padding: 0; cursor: pointer;" id="personal_advisor_remove_button"
                    name="personal_advisor_remove_button" class="justify-content-center d-flex" disabled>
                    <img src="/img/icons/cancel.svg">
                </a>
            `);
            }

            $('#edit_personal_advisor').on('click', function(e) {
                e.preventDefault();

                $('#personal_advisor_search, #personal_advisor,\#personal_advisor_remove_button, #personal_advisor_search_button').prop('disabled', false);

                $(this).hide();
            });

            // busca de assessor pessoal de formação
            $('#personal_advisor_search_button').on('click', function(e) {
                e.preventDefault();
                loading(true);

                let personalAdvisorRegister = $('#personal_advisor_search').val();
                let associateCode = $('#associate_code').val();
                let url = "https://paxtu100.escoteiros.org.br/associado/assessor/busca";

                $.ajax({
                    url: url,
                    type: "POST",
                    headers: {
                        'X-CSRF-TOKEN': $('meta[name="csrf-token"]').attr('content')
                    },
                    data: {
                        'personalAdvisorRegister': personalAdvisorRegister,
                        'associateCode': associateCode,
                    },
                    success: function(data) {
                        // console.log(data);
                        $('#personal_advisor').val(data.nm_associado);
                        $('#personal_advisor').focus();
                        $('#personal_advisor_insert_button').prop('disabled', false);
                        loading(false);
                    },
                    error: function(data) {
                        Swal.fire({
                            icon: "error",
                            title: "Oops...",
                            text: data.responseJSON.error,
                        });
                        loading(false);
                    },
                });
            });

            $('#personal_advisor_insert_button').on('click', function(e) {
                e.preventDefault();

                Swal.fire({
                    title: "Caso já exista um assessor, ele será substituído",
                    icon: "warning",
                    showCancelButton: true,
                    confirmButtonColor: "#3085d6",
                    cancelButtonColor: "#d33",
                    confirmButtonText: "Ok!",
                    cancelButtonText: "Cancelar"
                }).then((result) => {
                    if (result.isConfirmed) {
                        loading(true);

                        let personalAdvisorRegister = $('#personal_advisor_search').val();
                        let associateCode = $('#associate_code').val();
                        let url = "https://paxtu100.escoteiros.org.br/associado/assessor/inserir";

                        $.ajax({
                            url: url,
                            type: "POST",
                            headers: {
                                'X-CSRF-TOKEN': $('meta[name="csrf-token"]').attr('content')
                            },
                            data: {
                                'personalAdvisorRegister': personalAdvisorRegister,
                                'associateCode': associateCode,
                            },
                            success: function(data) {
                                // console.log(data.advisor);

                                $('#personal_advisor').val('');
                                $('#personal_advisor_search').val('');

                                $('#advisor_name').text(data.advisor.nm_associado);
                                $('#advisor_registration_number').text(
                                    concatRegistrationNumberWithDigit(data.advisor.nr_registro,
                                        data.advisor.nr_digito));
                                $('#advisor_branch').text(translateBranch(data.advisor.cd_ramo));
                                $('#advisor_category').text(translateCategory(data.advisor
                                    .cd_categoria));
                                $('#advisor_remove').html(`<a href="#" style="background: none; border: none; padding: 0; cursor: pointer;" id="personal_advisor_remove_button"
                                    name="personal_advisor_remove_button" class="justify-content-center d-flex"><img src="/img/icons/cancel.svg">
                                </a>`);

                                $('#edit_personal_advisor').show();

                                loading(false);
                                successFeedback();
                            },
                            error: function(data) {
                                Swal.fire({
                                    icon: "error",
                                    title: "Oops...",
                                    text: data.responseJSON.error,
                                });
                                loading(false);
                            }
                        });
                    }
                });
            });

            $('#edit_national_training_button').on('click', function(e) {
                e.preventDefault();

                if (!canEditNationalStrategicTraining) {
                    return;
                }

                $('#collapseThree input[type="date"]').prop('disabled', false);
                $('#save_national_training_button').removeClass('d-none');
                $(this).addClass('d-none');
            });

            $('#save_national_training_button').on('click', function(e) {
                e.preventDefault();

                if (!canEditNationalStrategicTraining) {
                    return;
                }

                loading(true);

                $.ajax({
                    url: "https://paxtu100.escoteiros.org.br/associado/capacitacoes-estrategicas-nacionais/salvar",
                    type: "POST",
                    headers: {
                        'X-CSRF-TOKEN': $('meta[name="csrf-token"]').attr('content')
                    },
                    data: {
                        associateCode: $('#associate_code').val(),
                        dt_formador_cf1_curso: $('#CNGA_ONE_course_conclusion').val(),
                        dt_formador_cf2_curso: $('#CNGA_TWO_course_conclusion').val(),
                        dt_formador_cngpe1_curso: $('#CNGPE_ONE_course_conclusion').val(),
                        dt_formador_cngpe2_curso: $('#CNGPE_TWO_course_conclusion').val(),
                        dt_formador_cngi1_curso: $('#CNGI_ONE_course_conclusion').val(),
                        dt_formador_cngi2_curso: $('#CNGI_TWO_course_conclusion').val(),
                    },
                    success: function() {
                        $('#collapseThree input[type="date"]').prop('disabled', true);
                        $('#save_national_training_button').addClass('d-none');
                        $('#edit_national_training_button').removeClass('d-none');
                        loading(false);
                        successFeedback();
                    },
                    error: function(data) {
                        const errorMessage = data.responseJSON?.error ||
                            'Não foi possível salvar as capacitações estratégicas nacionais.';

                        Swal.fire({
                            icon: "error",
                            title: "Oops...",
                            text: errorMessage,
                        });

                        loading(false);
                    }
                });
            });
        });

        $(document).on('click', '#personal_advisor_remove_button', function(e) {
            e.preventDefault();

            Swal.fire({
                title: "Deseja mesmo remover o assessor pessoal de formação?",
                icon: "warning",
                showCancelButton: true,
                confirmButtonColor: "#3085d6",
                cancelButtonColor: "#d33",
                confirmButtonText: "Sim, remover!",
                cancelButtonText: "Cancelar"
            }).then((result) => {
                if (result.isConfirmed) {
                    loading(true);

                    let associateCode = $('#associate_code').val();
                    let url = "https://paxtu100.escoteiros.org.br/associado/assessor/remover";

                    $.ajax({
                        url: url,
                        type: "POST",
                        headers: {
                            'X-CSRF-TOKEN': $('meta[name="csrf-token"]').attr('content')
                        },
                        data: {
                            'associateCode': associateCode,
                        },
                        success: function(data) {
                            // console.log(data.responseJSON);
                            $('#personal_advisor_search_button').prop('disabled', false);

                            $('#advisor_name').empty();
                            $('#advisor_registration_number').empty();
                            $('#advisor_branch').empty();
                            $('#advisor_category').empty();
                            $('#advisor_remove').empty();

                            loading(false);
                            successFeedback();
                        },
                        error: function(data) {
                            Swal.fire('Atenção', data.responseJSON.error, 'error');
                            loading(false);
                        }
                    });
                }
            });
        });
    </script>
    <script>
        const associateCode = 1284292;
        document.addEventListener('DOMContentLoaded', function() {
            // Listener do botão salvar
            document.getElementById('history-save-button').addEventListener('click', function() {
                const dataPromessaLobinho = document.getElementById('modal-date-lobinho')?.value || '';
                const dataPromessaEscoteira = document.getElementById('modal-date-escoteira')?.value || '';

                if (!dataPromessaLobinho && !dataPromessaEscoteira) {
                    Swal.fire({
                        icon: 'warning',
                        title: 'Atenção',
                        text: 'Preencha ao menos uma data de promessa.'
                    });
                    return;
                }

                loading(true);

                $.ajax({
                    type: 'POST',
                    url: "https://paxtu100.escoteiros.org.br/associado/associado/datas-promessa-ingresso",
                    headers: {
                        'X-CSRF-TOKEN': $('meta[name="csrf-token"]').attr('content')
                    },
                    data: {
                        associate_code: associateCode,
                        data_promessa_lobinho: dataPromessaLobinho,
                        data_promessa_escoteira: dataPromessaEscoteira,
                    },
                    success: function(response) {
                        loading(false);
                        bootstrap.Modal.getInstance(document.getElementById('promessaModal')).hide();
                        Swal.fire({
                            icon: 'success',
                            title: 'Sucesso',
                            text: response.message || 'Datas salvas com sucesso.'
                        });
                    },
                    error: function(xhr) {
                        loading(false);
                        Swal.fire({
                            icon: 'error',
                            title: 'Erro',
                            text: xhr?.responseJSON?.message || xhr?.responseJSON?.error || 'Não foi possível salvar as datas.'
                        });
                    }
                });
            });

            // Filtro por descrição
            $('#history-activity-search').on('input', function() {
                var searchValue = $(this).val().toLowerCase();
                $('.activity-item').each(function() {
                    var desc = $(this).find('.activity-description').text().toLowerCase();
                    $(this).toggle(desc.includes(searchValue));
                });
            });

            // Filtro por data
            $('#history-activity-filter').on('click', function(e) {
                e.preventDefault();
                $('#filter-modal').modal('show');
            });

            $('#filter-by-date').on('click', function(e) {
                e.preventDefault();
                $('#filter-modal').modal('hide');

                let startDate = $('#start-date').val();
                let endDate = $('#end-date').val();

                $('.activity-item').each(function() {
                    let rowStart = formatDate($(this).find('.start-date').text().trim());
                    let rowEnd = formatDate($(this).find('.end-date').text().trim());
                    $(this).toggle(isDateInRange(rowStart, startDate, endDate) && isDateInRange(rowEnd, startDate, endDate));
                });

                $('#clear-dates').removeClass('d-none');
            });

            $('#clear-dates').on('click', function() {
                $('#start-date').val('');
                $('#end-date').val('');
                $('#filter-by-date').trigger('click');
                $(this).addClass('d-none');
            });

            // Certificado print
            $(document).on('click', '.print-certificate', async function(e) {
                e.preventDefault();

                let jsonString = $(this).data('json');
                if (typeof jsonString === 'string') {
                    jsonString = jsonString.trim().replace(/^"|"$/g, '').replace(/\\"/g, '"').replace(/\\u0022/g, '"');
                }

                let jsonObject;
                try {
                    jsonObject = JSON.parse(jsonString);
                } catch (err) {
                    console.error('JSON inválido:', err);
                    return;
                }

                let isPortrait = jsonObject.backgroundImage && jsonObject.backgroundImage.height > jsonObject.backgroundImage.width;
                let $canvasElem = $('<canvas>').attr({
                    width: isPortrait ? 794 : 1123,
                    height: isPortrait ? 1123 : 794
                }).css({
                    display: 'none'
                });
                $('body').append($canvasElem);

                let canvas = new fabric.Canvas($canvasElem[0]);
                $(canvas.wrapperEl).css({
                    display: 'none',
                    position: 'absolute'
                });
                await canvas.loadFromJSON(jsonObject);
                canvas.renderAll();

                canvas.getObjects().forEach(obj => {
                    if (['text', 'i-text', 'textbox'].includes(obj.type)) {
                        const replacements = {
                            'NOME DO PARTICIPANTE': $(this).data('associate-name')?.toUpperCase(),
                            'DATA DO INÍCIO': $(this).data('start-date'),
                            'DATA DO FIM': $(this).data('end-date'),
                            'CIDADE': $(this).data('city')?.toUpperCase(),
                            'CARGA HORÁRIA': `${$(this).data('workload')}H`,
                            'NÚMERO DE SÉRIE': String($(this).data('number') || ''),
                        };
                        const newText = replacements[obj.text];
                        if (newText) {
                            const centerX = obj.left + obj.width / 2;
                            obj.set({
                                text: newText,
                                textAlign: 'center',
                                width: obj.calcTextWidth()
                            });
                            obj.left = centerX - obj.width / 2;
                        }
                    }
                });

                canvas.requestRenderAll();
                printCertificate(canvas);
                $canvasElem.remove();
            });
        });

        function formatDate(dateString) {
            if (!dateString) return '';
            dateString = String(dateString).trim();
            if (/^\d{4}-\d{2}-\d{2}$/.test(dateString)) return dateString;
            let parts = dateString.split('/');
            if (parts.length === 3) return `${parts[2]}-${parts[1]}-${parts[0]}`;
            return '';
        }

        function isDateInRange(date, start, end) {
            if (!date) return false;
            if (start && date < start) return false;
            if (end && date > end) return false;
            return true;
        }
    </script>
    <script>
        $(document).ready(function() {
            const pendingEditMode = false;
            const pendingFields = [];

            function normalizePendingLabel(value) {
                return String(value || '')
                    .normalize('NFD')
                    .replace(/[\u0300-\u036f]/g, '')
                    .toLowerCase()
                    .trim();
            }

            function lockAllEditableControls() {
                $('input, select, textarea')
                    .not('[type="hidden"]')
                    .not('[type="file"]')
                    .not('#checkInput')
                    .not('#save-button')
                    .prop('disabled', true);
            }

            function enableField(selector) {
                $(selector).each(function() {
                    const $field = $(this);
                    $field.prop('disabled', false).removeAttr('readonly');
                });
            }

            // function hideField(selector) {
            //     $(selector).each(function() {
            //         const $field = $(this);
            //         // adicionar class d-none no pai
            //         $field.closest('.mb-3, .mb-4, .mb-5, .mb-6').addClass('d-none');

            //     });
            // }

            function applyPendingEditMode() {
                if (!pendingEditMode || !Array.isArray(pendingFields) || pendingFields.length === 0) {
                    return;
                }

                const allowedTabs = new Set([
                    'basic-informations',
                    'responsible-informations',
                    'documents',
                    'uel-functions'
                ]);

                $('.nav-tabs .nav-link').each(function() {
                    const $link = $(this);
                    const href = $link.attr('href') || '';

                    if (!href.startsWith('#')) {
                        return;
                    }

                    const tabId = href.substring(1);
                    const $pane = $(href);

                    if (allowedTabs.has(tabId)) {
                        $link.closest('.nav-item').removeClass('d-none');
                        $pane.removeClass('d-none');
                    } else {
                        $link.closest('.nav-item').addClass('d-none');
                        $pane.removeClass('show active').addClass('d-none');
                    }
                });

                $('#basic-informations-tab').tab('show');

                const labels = pendingFields.map(normalizePendingLabel).filter(Boolean);
                const has = (label) => labels.includes(normalizePendingLabel(label));
                const responsibleLabels = [
                    'Responsável', 'Responsavel', 'Nome do Responsável', 'Nome do Responsavel',
                    'CPF do Responsável', 'CPF do Responsavel', 'Profissão do Responsável',
                    'Profissao do Responsavel', 'Endereço do Responsável', 'Endereco do Responsavel',
                    'Número do Endereço do Responsável', 'Numero do Endereco do Responsavel',
                    'Bairro do Responsável', 'Bairro do Responsavel', 'Cidade do Responsável',
                    'Cidade do Responsavel', 'CEP do Responsável', 'CEP do Responsavel'
                ];
                const hasResponsiblePending = responsibleLabels.some((label) => has(label));

                if (!hasResponsiblePending) {
                    const $responsibleLink = $('#responsible-informations-tab');
                    const $responsiblePane = $('#responsible-informations');

                    $responsibleLink.closest('.nav-item').addClass('d-none');
                    $responsiblePane.removeClass('show active').addClass('d-none');
                }

                const fieldMap = [{
                        labels: ['Nome'],
                        selectors: ['#associate-name']
                    },
                    {
                        labels: ['CPF'],
                        selectors: ['#cpf-number']
                    },
                    {
                        labels: ['Cidade de Nascimento'],
                        selectors: ['#birth-region', '#birth-city', 'input[name="birth-city-code"]']
                    },
                    {
                        labels: ['Data de Nascimento'],
                        selectors: ['#birthdate']
                    },
                    {
                        labels: ['Etnia'],
                        selectors: ['#skin-color']
                    },
                    {
                        labels: ['Escolaridade'],
                        selectors: ['#education']
                    },
                    {
                        labels: ['Profissão', 'Profissao'],
                        selectors: ['#select-occupation']
                    },
                    {
                        labels: ['Email'],
                        selectors: ['#main-email']
                    },
                    {
                        labels: ['Endereço', 'Endereco'],
                        selectors: ['#address', '#address-number', '#address-complement']
                    },
                    {
                        labels: ['Bairro'],
                        selectors: ['#address-district']
                    },
                    {
                        labels: ['Cidade de Residência', 'Cidade de Residencia'],
                        selectors: ['#region', '#city']
                    },
                    {
                        labels: ['CEP'],
                        selectors: ['#postal-code']
                    },
                    {
                        labels: responsibleLabels,
                        selectors: ['#primary-responsible-type', '#primary-responsible-name',
                            '#primary-responsible-short-name', '#primary-responsible-birthdate',
                            '#primary-responsible-gender', '#primary-responsible-search-document',
                            '#primary-responsible-search-button', '#add-primary-responsible',
                            '#secondary-responsible-type', '#secondary-responsible-name',
                            '#secondary-responsible-short-name', '#secondary-responsible-birthdate',
                            '#secondary-responsible-gender', '#secondary-responsible-search-document',
                            '#secondary-responsible-search-button', '#add-secondary-responsible'
                        ]
                    },
                    {
                        labels: ['RNE/Passaporte'],
                        selectors: ['#foreign-document-number', '#foreign-document-type',
                            '#foreign-document-file'
                        ]
                    },

                    {
                        labels: ['Cópia do documento oficial de identificação com foto e CPF',
                            'Copia do documento oficial de identificacao com foto e CPF',
                            'Documento de idoneidade ou certidão de antecedentes criminais',
                            'Documento de idoneidade ou certidao de antecedentes criminais'
                        ],
                        selectors: ['[id^="button-attach-document-"]', '[id^="file-"]', '.show-document']
                    },
                    {
                        labels: ['Categoria', 'Ramo', 'Função', 'Funcao', 'Nível', 'Nivel',
                            'Primeira Função', 'Primeira Funcao', 'Dados da Primeira Função',
                            'Dados da Primeira Funcao'
                        ],
                        selectors: ['#collapseFirstFunction select',
                            '#collapseFirstFunction input:not([type="hidden"])',
                            '#functions-save-button'
                        ]
                    }
                ];

                let matched = false;

                lockAllEditableControls();

                // A primeira funcao deve sempre ficar disponivel no modo pendente.
                enableField('#collapseFirstFunction select, #collapseFirstFunction input:not([type="hidden"])');
                matched = true;

                fieldMap.forEach((item) => {
                    const shouldEnable = item.labels.some((label) => has(label));

                    if (!shouldEnable) {
                        return;
                    }

                    matched = true;
                    item.selectors.forEach((selector) => enableField(selector));
                });

                //ver todos os campos disable e esconder

                $('input:disabled, select:disabled, textarea:disabled, .pendingDisabled').each(function() {
                    const $field = $(this);

                    // Nao interfere no toast de feedback (successFeedback).
                    if ($field.closest('#checkLoader').length || $field.closest('.toast-container')
                        .length) {
                        return;
                    }

                    if ($field.closest('#responsible-informations').length) {
                        return;
                    }

                    // Nao oculta wrappers de upload para manter descricao e anexos visiveis.
                    if ($field.hasClass('custom-file-input') || $field.is('[id^="file-name-"]')) {
                        return;
                    }

                    const $wrapper = $field.closest('[data-pending-hide-wrapper]');

                    if ($wrapper.length) {
                        $wrapper.addClass('d-none');
                        return;
                    }

                    $field.parent().addClass('d-none');
                });

                $('.tab-pane#basic-informations .accordion-item').each(function() {
                    const $item = $(this);
                    const $body = $item.find('.accordion-body').first();

                    if (!$body.length) {
                        return;
                    }

                    const hasVisibleControl = $body.find(
                        'input:not([type="hidden"]):visible, select:visible, textarea:visible, button:visible'
                    ).filter(function() {
                        const $control = $(this);

                        if ($control.closest('#checkLoader').length || $control.closest('.toast-container')
                            .length) {
                            return false;
                        }

                        return true;
                    }).length > 0;

                    if (!hasVisibleControl) {
                        $item.addClass('d-none');
                    }
                });

                if (!matched) {
                    return;
                }

                $('#footer-container').removeClass('d-none');
                $('#save-button').prop('disabled', false);
            }

            applyPendingEditMode();

            // SELECT COM CHECKBOX/DROPDOWN

            // Alterna a exibição do dropdown apenas para o .custom-select clicado
            $('.select-box').on('click', function(event) {
                event.stopPropagation(); // Impede o fechamento imediato ao clicar

                let dropdown = $(this).closest('.custom-select').find('.custom-dropdown');

                // Fecha todos os dropdowns antes de abrir o correto
                $('.custom-dropdown').not(dropdown).hide();
                dropdown.toggle();
            });

            // Atualiza as opções selecionadas dentro do mesmo .custom-select
            $('.custom-dropdown input[type="checkbox"]').on('change', function() {
                let customSelect = $(this).closest('.custom-select');
                let selectedOptions = [];

                customSelect.find('.custom-dropdown input[type="checkbox"]:checked').each(function() {
                    selectedOptions.push($(this).data('label'));
                });

                let textElement = customSelect.find('.select-box p');

                if (selectedOptions.length) {
                    textElement.text(selectedOptions.join(', '));
                } else {
                    textElement.text('Selecione');
                }
            });

            // Fecha apenas se clicar fora de qualquer .custom-select
            $(document).on('click', function(event) {
                if (!$(event.target).closest('.custom-select').length) {
                    $('.custom-dropdown').hide();
                }
            });

            function inputErrorFeedback(inputField) {
                // borda vermelha
                $(inputField).css({
                    'border': '#dc3545 solid 1px'
                });

                //sombra vermelha
                $(inputField).on('focus', function() {
                    $(this).css({
                        'box-shadow': '0 0 0 .25rem rgba(220, 53, 69, 0.25)',
                        'border': '1px solid #dc3545'
                    });
                });

                // remove a sombra clicando fora
                $(inputField).on('blur', function() {
                    $(this).css({
                        'box-shadow': 'none',
                        'border': '1px solid #dc3545'
                    });
                });
            }

            function inputErrorReset(inputField) {
                $(inputField).css({
                    'border': '1px solid #dee2e6', // Define a borda para o estilo cinza padrão
                    'box-shadow': 'none' // Remove qualquer sombra de caixa
                });

                // Define borda azul ao focar no campo
                $(inputField).on('focus', function() {
                    $(this).css({
                        'border': '1px solid #66afe9',
                        /* borda azul */
                        'box-shadow': '0 0 0 0.3rem rgba(194, 219, 254, 0.8)'
                    });
                });

                // Define borda cinza ao desfocar o campo
                $(inputField).on('blur', function() {
                    $(this).css({
                        'border': '1px solid #dee2e6', // Borda cinza
                        'box-shadow': 'none' // Remove sombra de caixa
                    });
                });
            }

            let originalAxisHtml = null;

            originalAxisHtml = $('#container-axis').html();

            $(document).on('click', '.btn-back-axis', function(e) {
                e.preventDefault();
                $('#container-axis').html(originalAxisHtml);
                $(this).addClass('d-none');
                $('.btn-page-back').removeClass('d-none');
            });
        });
    </script>
    <script>
        const checkLoader = document.getElementById('checkLoader')

        function successFeedback() {
            const toastBootstrap = bootstrap.Toast.getOrCreateInstance(checkLoader)
            $('#checkInput').prop('checked', false);
            toastBootstrap.show()
            setTimeout(() => {
                $('#checkInput').prop('checked', true);
            }, 1000);

            $(checkLoader).on('hidden.bs.toast', function() {
                $('#checkInput').prop('checked', false);
            })
        }
    </script>
    <script>
        $(document).ready(function() {
            $('#Camada_1').on('click', function() {
                if (localStorage.getItem('clicks') === null) {
                    localStorage.setItem('clicks', 1);
                } else {
                    localStorage.setItem('clicks', parseInt(localStorage.getItem('clicks')) + 1);
                }
                if (parseInt(localStorage.getItem('clicks')) === 20) {
                    alert('-..-. . .- ... - . .-. -....- . --. --.');
                    localStorage.removeItem('clicks');
                }
            });
        });
    </script>
    
        <script>
        (function() {
            function normalizePath(path) {
                if (!path) {
                    return '/';
                }

                var normalized = path.replace(/\/+$/, '') || '/';
                return normalized;
            }

            function getLinkPath(href) {
                if (!href || href === '#' || href.startsWith('javascript:')) {
                    return null;
                }

                try {
                    return normalizePath(new URL(href, window.location.origin).pathname);
                } catch (error) {
                    return null;
                }
            }

            function pathMatches(currentPath, linkPath) {
                if (linkPath === '/') {
                    return currentPath === '/';
                }

                if (currentPath === linkPath) {
                    return true;
                }

                return currentPath.startsWith(linkPath + '/');
            }

            function findBestMatch(links, currentPath) {
                var bestLink = null;
                var bestPath = '';

                links.forEach(function(link) {
                    var linkPath = getLinkPath(link.getAttribute('href'));

                    if (!linkPath || !pathMatches(currentPath, linkPath)) {
                        return;
                    }

                    if (linkPath.length > bestPath.length) {
                        bestLink = link;
                        bestPath = linkPath;
                    }
                });

                return bestLink;
            }

            function expandSidebarSection(link) {
                var collapse = link.closest('.collapse');

                if (!collapse) {
                    return;
                }

                collapse.classList.add('show');

                var toggle = document.querySelector('[data-bs-target="#' + collapse.id + '"]');

                if (toggle) {
                    toggle.classList.remove('collapsed');
                    toggle.setAttribute('aria-expanded', 'true');
                }
            }

            function activateSidebarMenus() {
                var currentPath = normalizePath(window.location.pathname);

                document.querySelectorAll('.sideBar').forEach(function(sidebar) {
                    var links = sidebar.querySelectorAll('.btn-sidebar-nav a[href]');
                    var bestMatch = findBestMatch(Array.prototype.slice.call(links), currentPath);

                    if (!bestMatch) {
                        return;
                    }

                    bestMatch.classList.add('active');
                    expandSidebarSection(bestMatch);
                });
            }

            if (document.readyState === 'loading') {
                document.addEventListener('DOMContentLoaded', activateSidebarMenus);
            } else {
                activateSidebarMenus();
            }
        })();
    </script>
    </body>

</html>
